subject: Let me introduce myself.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | |
---

Hi Friend,

**My name is Vivek Ramaswamy, and I am running for President of the United States. **

Our country is facing an identity crisis. When you ask people, "what does it mean to be an American?" you get a blank stare.

Meanwhile, Democrats are seeking to **DIVIDE** us and make us forget about all the reasons that we are **PROUD** to be Americans.

The Radical Left is**_OBSESSED_** with wokeness and gender ideology. They want to divide you based on race, gender, and political views.

**[That's not okay. I'm running for President to stop the Left's WOKE agenda.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=8c1787058a6145a394323fa8ef8cb884&_e=0iiPQW1huI6W9r3xz58-F0I27RycyKCQnEgw4BCW1-vnTTLHX6mFlHNA879Nv27JtxOeE9iHcs23DpbomYnr9iNO_6t1YcwY4Ulfs9Fr_tHokfSilrnMh8RwrEzVKBwqobp6BV5mdCtix1LqKqQJg4uKASbRnHy0b3KpPlzCd3Re4OfmWtq6-97uEtNNNjIVM_aREJSCRpXZqYnsoFyOKm2wHWoVnvb9ofhDth4EoX4anIX8NydrCGancXdIETLTJAQ8_TBc2zw5uYGxOEdoswBjJgmbIaRctg6B5BKmjbU15E1TonX3ARZDOKySKtlD1Z20Wpw2D2qi1oTcRlVaMjLJq_rMqtw6A-_lNfjp5Cu0_JcZyFZh-oEUVd6UV8CbsLpqCtunGyrZIv2nZ9HfmQ%3D%3D "That’s not okay. I’m running for President to stop the Left’s WOKE agenda. ")**

We need to revive the ideals that set this nation into motion over 250 years ago. Our country was founded on excellence, merit, free speech, Democratic self-governance over aristocracy. A nation of laws.

The same values that provide hope to the free world.

I am running for President with a vision to rediscover our national identity. E Pluribus Unum: When we stand as one, _**NOTHING**_ can stop us. That includes having a strong House Majority to support the next President.
**[Will you chip in $8 to help support House Republicans' crusade against the Radical Left?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=8c1787058a6145a394323fa8ef8cb884&_e=0iiPQW1huI6W9r3xz58-F0I27RycyKCQnEgw4BCW1-vnTTLHX6mFlHNA879Nv27JtxOeE9iHcs23DpbomYnr9iNO_6t1YcwY4Ulfs9Fr_tHokfSilrnMh8RwrEzVKBwqobp6BV5mdCtix1LqKqQJg4uKASbRnHy0b3KpPlzCd3Re4OfmWtq6-97uEtNNNjIVM_aREJSCRpXZqYnsoFyOKm2wHWoVnvb9ofhDth4EoX5j_Z1fOZ7fe2qjR3Gu92CpKHMBz-mPMinOWdSy4S8VrdnyJ6pspO7AM7IGeb0H9AiXx3SamUUXqUvMbBjYszumpe0GSbp6OJRA8_MR1fI3g4DwNIStveaLSJV7VrdQmPU_7I4osb_Ozm23qrzQD6WQu8F0NSKY1FaBE9bvhptuPg%3D%3D "Will you chip in $8 to help support House Republicans' crusade against the Radical Left? name: Shamaine Daniels
subject: Are you forgetting about someone?
body:
www.danielsforcongress.org [www.danielsforcongress.org]
As indictments are announced for Donald Trump over his attempt to overturn the 2020 election, it's important that we remember the key role Scott Perry played in that plot.
(This is NOT an email asking for donations)
https://www.politico.com/news/2023/08/01/trump-indictments-election-interference-key-players-00109050 [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/08/01/trump-indictments-election-interference-key-players-00109050]
Dear Friend,
Over the past two weeks I've been emailing to tell you why Scott Perry is the most dangerous member of Congress. With today's announcement of Donald Trump's impending indictments related to the attempted insurrection on January 6th, It's important to remind everyone of Perry's greatest hit - the central role he played in Trump's attempt to overturn the Presidential election.
Among the members of Congress who were complicit in trying to steal the 2020 election, Scott Perry stands out as a central figure in the plot. Notably, Perry was the key to the plan to install Trump sympathizer Jeffrey Clark as Attorney General in the run-up to January 6th. In 2022, Perry even had his phone seized by the FBI , and since then has been fighting in court to prevent investigators from accessing its contents.
Again, you don't have to take our word for it. From the Politico article:
"He's (Perry's) primarily known as the crucial connector between Trump and Clark. But he also texted with Meadows, a former House Freedom Caucus ally, about wild and false theories related to the CIA Director and European allies' purported efforts to manipulate the election."
( You can read the full article here [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/08/01/trump-indictments-election-interference-key-players-00109050] )
Among other things, Perry is an insurrectionist who played an active and central role in trying to overturn a free and fair election in the United States. he has no business serving in Congress, or any other place of public trust.
It is crucial that we defeat Scott Perry next year, but I am not going to excitedly ask you for a contribution. My team and I are working hard to build the strongest campaign possible. Regardless of where you live, we want you to be a part of our team and we are attempting to demonstrate in the most stark terms possible exactly what is at stake in this race.
To date, Scott Perry has managed to fly under the radar of the national press. Defeating him is going to require support from around the country, and we are asking you to help us spread the word about Perry and the danger he poses to our country.
How can you help?
*
Share
this
article,
and/or
the
graphic
at
the
top
of
this
email
on
your
preferred
social
media
platform
and
remember
to
include
a
link
to
DanielsForCongress.org
so
that
your
friends
can
learn
more
about
me
and
my
campaign.
*
Email
or
text
your
fellow
Democrats
to
let
them
know
about
the
danger
that
Scott
Perry
poses
to
our
Democracy
*
Through
email
or
social
media,
encourage
reporters
at
national
media
outlets
to
do
more
reporting
on
Scott
Perry
threatening
our
Democracy
through
his
central
role
in
the
insurrection,
our
national
security
through
his
opposition
to
the
Defense
Authorization
Act,
and
our
economic
security
through
the
debt
limit
debate.
This is more than a campaign, it is a movement to defeat a very real threat to our country. Scott Perry is a villain hiding in plain sight. In order to win, we need to expose him, and to do that we need your help.
Thank you for being a part of our team!
With Gratitude,
Shamaine
If you would like to make a contribution to support the campaign, you can do so using the button below
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
P.S. If you missed my announcement video, you can check it out below.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lQXcyDlej8Y [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lQXcyDlej8Y]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/PaidForByDanielsForCongressB.jpg]
Daniels For Congress
P.O. Box 60654
Harrisburg, PA 17106

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump JUST indicted in January 6 criminal case
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Just moments ago, a federal grand jury indicted Donald J. Trump with four new felony charges related to the January 6th insurrection at the U.S. Capitol.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3229%2E5257348%2E4b-c1d)
Derek — Just moments ago, a federal grand jury indicted Donald J. Trump with four new felony charges related to the January 6th insurrection at the U.S. Capitol.
**Let me repeat that: A former President of the United States, and the leading candidate for the Republican nomination for the presidency, was charged with four criminal counts: conspiracy to defraud, conspiracy to obstruct, obstruction and conspiracy to deprive Americans of their rights — that is, the right to vote and have their vote counted. All to stay in power and overturn the will of the people.**
This is unprecedented, Derek.
Through our investigation and the dogged work on the House Select Committee on the January 6 Attack, we uncovered damning evidence that Donald Trump conspired to defraud the American people and deprive them of their right to vote, in order to stay in power.
We should expect Trump to react the way he always has to these indictments: lies, attacks, and excuses. And we should expect his cronies to do the same. Already, Speaker McCarthy is spewing Trump talking points and trying to undermine confidence in our justice system.
But as always, we will continue to hold Trump and his enablers to account.
Now more than ever, we need leaders who have proven themselves able to withstand Trump’s lies and falsehoods and deliver the truth for the sake of our democracy. That’s why I’m asking:
**[I’m not afraid to stand up to forces working to undermine our democracy — even if it means standing up to Donald J. Trump and MAGA world. I’m ready to continue that work in the U.S. Senate. Will you chip in to our campaign so we can continue to stand strong and prevent demagogues like Trump from seizing the reins of power?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230801_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3229%2E5257348%2E4b-c1d)**

We should expect Trump to react the way he always has to these indictments: lies, attacks, and excuses. And we should expect his cronies to do the same. body:
It’s Felix Frisch – Adam Frisch’s son. When my dad told us that he was going to run against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I did what most 16-year-olds would do: I took a year off from school to be involved in the campaign.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67445534/419725924/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODA1MWNhNi1jYjMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8F5jHjhdA6q13r5fKGRc2o7pNgnJQIyHa8B2RwUfGbY=&emci=8d3ccc0b-cb30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=58051ca6-cb30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67445535/419725925/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODA1MWNhNi1jYjMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8F5jHjhdA6q13r5fKGRc2o7pNgnJQIyHa8B2RwUfGbY=&emci=8d3ccc0b-cb30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=58051ca6-cb30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hey there. It’s Felix Frisch – Adam Frisch’s son.
When my dad told us that he was going to run against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I did what most 16-year-olds would do: I took a year off from school to be involved in the campaign.
Technically, I went “online” for school – and yes, I definitely missed all my friends. But I wouldn’t go back and change it for the world.
My dad and I hitched a trailer to our red pickup truck and crisscrossed the entire district, taking turns at the wheel. He shook hands with voters, while I organized 130 interns virtually to make 700,000 phone calls for the campaign.
It felt like a 24,000-mile father-son road trip; just my dad, me... and the thousands of people we met at every stop along the way.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67445536/419725927/1610638071?refcode=em20230801pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=58051ca6-cb30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODA1MWNhNi1jYjMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8F5jHjhdA6q13r5fKGRc2o7pNgnJQIyHa8B2RwUfGbY=)
The campaign was hard. My sister and I knew they’d probably make up and say a lot of false things about our dad. But hearing and seeing the lies all over TV and social media is another thing entirely.
It was all worth it, though. We made hundreds of stops, met so many people, ate so much good food... And Dad came _so close_ to winning and defeating Boebert! It was an experience I’ll never forget.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67445537/419725945/1610638071?refcode=em20230801pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=58051ca6-cb30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODA1MWNhNi1jYjMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8F5jHjhdA6q13r5fKGRc2o7pNgnJQIyHa8B2RwUfGbY=)
Now, Dad’s running again, and I know that, with your help, he _will_ defeat Lauren Boebert this time.
**[It means a lot that people like you have got his back. So if you can, please make a donation now to my dad Adam Frisch’s campaign and help him defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67445538/419725982/1610638071?refcode=em20230801pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=58051ca6-cb30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODA1MWNhNi1jYjMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8F5jHjhdA6q13r5fKGRc2o7pNgnJQIyHa8B2RwUfGbY=)**
Thanks for everything you can afford to do for my dad and his campaign. It means a lot to him – and to our entire family.
Felix

| **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67445539/419725983/1610638071?refcode=em20230801pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=58051ca6-cb30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODA1MWNhNi1jYjMwLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8F5jHjhdA6q13r5fKGRc2o7pNgnJQIyHa8B2RwUfGbY=)**

...**Biden’s Department of Justice has ONCE AGAIN INDICTED me – this time, over the events that took place on January 6th.**

Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU**.

name: Mia Mason for Congress
subject: August is heating up!
body:
Things are getting hot! Mia’s campaign has been taking off! We have a few updates to share this week. First, we invite you to join Mia’s Discord cha
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=101253.979.1.40de85373204c391e83a236e55b4634d)
---
[](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=101253.980.1.e5869dead697982243da7d02e96c7a8f) |
---
# Things are getting hot!
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=101253.981.1.5c9cddfd6a7a314263ae8fd802c1831d) Discord
---
Mia’s campaign has been taking off! We have a few updates to share this week.
First, we invite you to join Mia’s Discord channel, where you can connect with other supporters, chat directly with Mia, and be the first to learn about upcoming events and opportunities. Mia has been in the news quite a bit the past two weeks; find all articles in the #News channel of the Discord. To join, simply login to Discord and search for @ Mia Mason 4 MD.
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=101253.982.1.5db7371e286686aae2c10af5661d6141) Volunteer
---
# Volunteer
With the campaign growing, we have open positions for volunteers. Do you have an hour a week to help? Are you interested in a part time or full time position or internship? Let us know! All inquiries can be submitted through our Volunteer Sign Up Form (click on the graphic to the left). We have positions for administrative tasks, graphic design, photography and videography, blog writers, and more.
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=101253.983.1.5c9b45d93ed97c49bb36b2a9f36480c9) Donate Today!
---
# Upcoming Events
We have a few upcoming events this week. If you are receiving this email as a supporter from Mia’s D-1 campaign in 2020, please let your friends and family in D-6 know about these! (District 6 includes much of Montgomery County, Frederick County, Washington County, Allegany County, and Garrett County).
August 4 - Meet Mia Mason in Allegany County (click [HERE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=101253.984.1.c78d591ff4497d041acd99e2e800e5f8) to sign up)
August 5 - Meet Mia Mason in Garrett County (click [HERE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=101253.985.1.2b38dfac94c8c2f4c192bb60394c867b) to sign up)
Lastly, July is coming to an end. Will you help us reach our $5,000 fundraising goal for the month? We are currently establishing our founding donors, and you’re invited! Make a difference for not only Maryland, but the entire country through supporting this outstanding candidate for Congress. Donations may be made at [www.Mia4MD.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=101253.986.1.ca48a5ea3992f5722d0cc252323e9c1d).
We hope to see you at one of our upcoming events and as always, we love hearing from you! This work is for YOU; help us ensure that your voice is heard.
**We the People means ALL the People,**
**Team Mia**

➡️ In New Hampshire, Democrats are FOUR seats away from **FLIPPING the House,** but that means defending _every_ seat in this year’s upcoming special elections.
➡️ In the Pennsylvania House, Democrats and Republicans are TIED – **next month’s special election will be majority-defining.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Barton?=
subject: Parental Rights
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bartonfordesoto/desoto-crime-lab-12614012?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| |
---
| When it comes to the issues, I’m not going to shy away from discussing them or a plan to address them. That goes for parental rights, too.
All across America, like in Virginia, Democrats are pushing for legislation at the state level that will make it a felony for parents to have a say-so in their child’s life - like education or gender.
Well, let me say this: Children are not the property of the state or politicians. They belong to their parents; and NOBODY knows better than mom and dad.
As District Attorney, I will always protect the constitutional rights of parents in DeSoto County and their right to be in the driver seat.
If the radical left take over our federal government (and I pray they don’t) and attempt to trample our constitutional rights, I will defend our God given rights as parents. If they challenge me: They will lose that fight.
---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton
_Sent from my iPhone_

PS: _If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - [you can click here to unsubscribe](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=340415aed2&e=3c5d31b5ad)[.](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=ebac2e95dd&e=3c5d31b5ad)_
---
| |
---

**Meet Matthew Barton**
---

Matthew Barton grew up in Petal, Mississippi in a blue-collar family. His mother was a director at Tupperware and his father owned the small, family business – Barton Fence Company – where Matthew worked growing up.
After attending public school, Matthew attended Pearl River Community College and Warner University, where he studied Business Administration. He holds a law degree from Ole Miss Law, where he graduated Cum Laude and received the interviewing and counseling award.
In 2011, Matthew married his high school sweetheart, Megan. After graduating from Ole Miss Law in 2015, they moved to DeSoto County where Matthew started a law firm and Megan continued working at the Desoto County Schools as a Certified Occupational Therapy Assistant.
During law school, Matthew served as an intern in the DeSoto County District Attorney’s Office where he presented cases to grand jury, tried cases to verdict, and performed all functions of a practicing attorney. He has served as a prosecutor for the City of Southaven and the City of Horn Lake and now serves as a special prosecutor for Southaven, Horn Lake, and DeSoto County Justice Courts – where he’s established a strict, tough on crime reputation.
As an attorney, Mathew has dealt with every type of criminal matter ranging from DUI to capital murder, in more than 37 courts across Mississippi.
Matthew is a member of the Federalist Society, a conservative legal association, an enhanced conceal carry permit holder, Krewe of Hernando member, NRA member, and donates his time serving as a pro bono attorney to Veterans every year.
Today, Matthew, his wife Megan, and their daughter Eleanor live in Hernando where Matthew owns his private law firm. Eleanor attends Pre-K at Hernando United Methodist Church and Megan is a stay at home mom after seven years with DeSoto County schools.
| | | | | | | [](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=4c2e5d20b9&e=3c5d31b5ad)

name: White House Update (via UD)
subject: Trump made history...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
but not in a good way

| Donald Trump made HISTORY (but not in a good way): a former president facing 37 federal charges and 34 New York state charges – arrested TWICE in just a few months. _We have two options here, Peter:_ **ONE:** We let Trump continue to raise money off of his indictments – riling his base into a fury, and winning his way back into the White House.

| | Friend,

---
I wanted you to hear this directly from me...

---
...**Biden’s Department of Justice has ONCE AGAIN INDICTED me – this time, over the events that took place on January 6th.**_
_
---
As you know, I did nothing wrong. It’s well-documented that I told Americans to act “PEACEFULLY” and discouraged the use of any violence.

---
This is nothing but an egregious act of Election Interference and a final act of desperation from Crooked Joe as he crashes in the polls.

---
The entire Biden Administration knows that I’m the _ONLY_ candidate who would defeat Crooked Joe in a free and fair election. They know how much support we have from the hardworking people of our country.

---
_**But more importantly, they know that I’m the only candidate who can dismantle the Deep State and end their stranglehold on our nation.**_

---
_So, their only hope is to try and send me to JAIL for the rest of my life._

---
A Soros-backed state prosecutor first tried to break us when he indicted and arrested me earlier this spring despite having committed no crime at all.

---
But when it became clear that his attack failed to break us, Crooked Joe summoned a federal prosecutor to INDICT me despite having committed no crime once again.

---
_**Now, they’re hoping that they’ve finally dealt the final blow by indicting me in the belly of the beast: Washington, D.C.**_

---
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they’re allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.

---
Their grip will close even tighter around _**YOU**_.

---
As I’ve always said, they’re not after me. They’re after YOU. I’m only standing in the way.

---
**And even after 3 indictments, I will continue to stand in their way, because the fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It’s not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well – and I will _NEVER_ let them take it from you.**

---
_If you’re doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day._

---
But if not, I don’t have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now.

---

clean_body: This is the THIRD ATTEMPT to destroy our movement.| | | | | Friend, I wanted you to hear this directly from me... ...Biden’s Department of Justice has ONCE AGAIN INDICTED me – this time, over the events that took place on January 6th. As you know, I did nothing wrong. It’s well-documented that I told Americans to act “PEACEFULLY” and discouraged the use of any violence. This is nothing but an egregious act of Election Interference and a final act of desperation from Crooked Joe as he crashes in the polls. The entire Biden Administration knows that I’m the ONLY candidate who would defeat Crooked Joe in a free and fair election. They know how much support we have from the hardworking people of our country. But more importantly, they know that I’m the only candidate who can dismantle the Deep State and end their stranglehold on our nation. So, their only hope is to try and send me to JAIL for the rest of my life. A Soros-backed state prosecutor first tried to break us when he indicted and arrested me earlier this spring despite having committed no crime at all. But when it became clear that his attack failed to break us, Crooked Joe summoned a federal prosecutor to INDICT me despite having committed no crime once again. Now, they’re hoping that they’ve finally dealt the final blow by indicting me in the belly of the beast: Washington, D.C. If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they’re allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me. Their grip will close even tighter around YOU. As I’ve always said, they’re not after me. They’re after YOU. I’m only standing in the way. And even after 3 indictments, I will continue to stand in their way, because the fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It’s not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well – and I will NEVER let them take it from you. If you’re doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don’t have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | | Thank you, Donald J. Hey,

I wanted you to hear it from me, friend: Twice indicted, failed former President Trump was just indicted — yet again.

This time, Trump has been handed a fresh set of federal charges from the Department of Justice in his campaign to overturn the 2020 election.

Look, all of America saw what Trump perpetrated on January 6, 2020. Not only do we deserve to know the truth behind that dark day in our democracy, but we also deserve to know that acts such as January 6 never happen again.

The reality is that I work in Congress with colleagues who still stand with Trump and his now THREE indictments. In fact, they’re so beholden to the MAGA agenda that they believe Trump is just a victim of a liberal “witch hunt.”

I’m fighting every day to prevent further assaults on our democracy and to remove the stain that Trump and the MAGA mob have left on our country. But make no mistake, if these three indictments aren’t enough to push Trump and the MAGA agenda into the past, America will be a country of chaos in 2024.

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Have you heard about this dangerous development?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | [](http://trk.libertyledger.-jSyQ)
---
Pro-Life American,

The abortion industry is moving the frontlines of the fight for life from the sidewalk to the mailbox, with "mail-order abortions" as the standard with no in-person medical oversight. This is a dangerous development that puts women and their unborn babies at greater risk!

For two decades, the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) had safety protocols in place to mitigate the risks of chemical abortions. These protocols required women to receive abortion pills in person from a doctor or clinic, and to have follow-up care available in case of complications.

However, in 2016, the Obama Administration weakened the FDA's safety protocols. And now, the Biden administration is poised to abandon these protocols altogether, making it legal for women to obtain chemical abortions through the mail!

[](http://trk.libertyledger.-da53RGKNiWgg)

[**This is a reckless and dangerous move as abortion pill-related ER visits have increased more than 500% over the last ten years.**](http://trk.libertyledger.-_gug5g)

Chemical abortions can have serious complications, including infection, hemorrhage, and even death. Without in-person medical oversight, women who experience complications may not receive the care they need in a timely manner.

SBA Pro-Life America is committed to protecting the health and safety of women and their unborn babies, unlike the Biden Administration and the abortionist lobby.

**[We urge you to join us in the fight to protect life and stop mail-order abortions.](http://trk.libertyledger.)**

Please contact your elected officials and let them know that you oppose the legalization of mail-order abortions and give a gift to SBA Pro-Life America to continue in their fight for the unborn.

You can give a gift today here: [https://secure.sbaprolife.org/da-big-abortion-agenda](http://trk.libertyledger._8PhOGHt1zZAheug)
|
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

**SBA Pro-Life America is fighting back against the Biden administration and its radical abortion agenda every single day. Make your gift now using this secure link:**

[ Count me in!](http://trk.libertyledger.-aXIQA)
Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Arlington, VA, 22206

name: Nikki Haley
subject: What I’ll do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Haley for President
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=4313c79daac8fc2360b1ba3131e10efeb1346be592baa35571fa1a558cbb42bd2d4b38604d4fec77180f8d9f2d9e0e758a0d2b8831b2f92dbbfc09bda738950b Peter, I have a plan to get America back on track as your next president. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=4313c79daac8fc2360b1ba3131e10efeb1346be592baa35571fa1a558cbb42bd2d4b38604d4fec77180f8d9f2d9e0e758a0d2b8831b2f92dbbfc09bda738950b Once you look this over, if this is the future you want to see, I am humbly asking you to join my team today with a generous donation of $5, $25, or even $47 or more today. So, what are some of the things I would do as President to fix the mess our country’s in? When it comes to our economy, we claw back the $500 billion of unspent COVID dollars that are still out there. Rather than 87,000 IRS agents going after middle America, let’s go after the hundreds of billions of dollars of COVID fraud that we know exist. If 8% of our budget is interest, quit borrowing! Cut up the credit cards! We will stop the spending, we will stop the borrowing, we will stop the earmarks. And I will veto any spending bill that doesn't take us back to pre-COVID levels. When it comes to education, there should be complete transparency in the classroom. You, as parents, should NEVER have to wonder what is being taught to your kids in schools. You have every right to know what’s happening! We need to make sure that parents can decide which schools they want their kids to go to. No child should be educated based on where they are born and raised. They should be educated on the fact that they deserve a good education, and their parents should be able to help them find it. We will put vocational classes back in our high schools and we will build things in America again! In South Carolina, we put apprenticeships all over our state so that our young kids could learn how to build things. Let’s put them in every single high school so that our kids are building things for America. When it comes to our universities, we’ll tell them: you either take Chinese money or you take American money, but the days of taking both are over. We will get that Chinese infiltration out of our universities once and for all. When it comes to crime, it's simple: Have the backs of our law enforcement and take the numbers of our criminals. We will bring law and order back! When you look at our foreign policy situation, let’s tell countries what we expect of them. Stop being reactionary! Let’s start getting things back on track. When I was at the UN, there were two things I knew that Russia, China, Iran, and our enemies never wanted America to have. They didn’t want us to have a strong military and they didn’t want us to be energy independent. We need to do both of those things! Strong militaries don’t start wars, strong militaries prevent wars. When it comes to energy independence, no more going hat-in-hand to Saudi Arabia, no more getting dirty oil from Venezuela! Let’s make sure we do things so that it’s our American producers supplying our American families. When it comes to our enemies, we must stop giving money to countries that hate us! Quit trying to buy friends, quit paying off our enemies! Last year we gave $50 billion in foreign aid. Do you know who we gave it to? Pakistan, who harbored terrorists that tried to kill our soldiers. Iraq, that has Iranian influence that says death to America. Zimbabwe, the most anti-American African country out there. Belarus, who is holding hands with Russia in their war against Ukraine. We give money to Communist Cuba, who we named a state sponsor of terrorism. And the one that is most embarrassing? We give money to China! How weak do we look? When I am President, we will no longer give money to countries that hate America! We have the solutions. We know what it means to get things done. Once you look this over, if this is the future you want to see, I am humbly asking you to join my team today with a generous donation of $5, $25, or even $47 or more today. So, what are some of the things I would do as President to fix the mess our country’s in? When it comes to our economy, we claw back the $500 billion of unspent COVID dollars that are still out there. Rather than 87,000 IRS agents going after middle America, let’s go after the hundreds of billions of dollars of COVID fraud that we know exist. If 8% of our budget is interest, quit borrowing! Cut up the credit cards! We will stop the spending, we will stop the borrowing, we will stop the earmarks. And I will veto any spending bill that doesn't take us back to pre-COVID levels. When it comes to education, there should be complete transparency in the classroom. You, as parents, should NEVER have to wonder what is being taught to your kids in schools. You have every right to know what’s happening! We need to make sure that parents can decide which schools they want their kids to go to. No child should be educated based on where they are born and raised. They should be educated on the fact that they deserve a good education, and their parents should be able to help them find it. We will put vocational classes back in our high schools and we will build things in America again! In South Carolina, we put apprenticeships all over our state so that our young kids could learn how to build things. Let’s put them in every single high school so that our kids are building things for America. When it comes to our universities, we’ll tell them: you either take Chinese money or you take American money, but the days of taking both are over. We will get that Chinese infiltration out of our universities once and for all. When it comes to crime, it's simple: Have the backs of our law enforcement and take the numbers of our criminals. We will bring law and order back! When you look at our foreign policy situation, let’s tell countries what we expect of them. Stop being reactionary! Let’s start getting things back on track. When I was at the UN, there were two things I knew that Russia, China, Iran, and our enemies never wanted America to have. They didn’t want us to have a strong military and they didn’t want us to be energy independent. We need to do both of those things! Strong militaries don’t start wars, strong militaries prevent wars. When it comes to energy independence, no more going hat-in-hand to Saudi Arabia, no more getting dirty oil from Venezuela! Let’s make sure we do things so that it’s our American producers supplying our American families. When it comes to our enemies, we must stop giving money to countries that hate us! Quit trying to buy friends, quit paying off our enemies! Last year we gave $50 billion in foreign aid. Do you know who we gave it to? Pakistan, who harbored terrorists that tried to kill our soldiers. Iraq, that has Iranian influence that says death to America. Zimbabwe, the most anti-American African country out there. Belarus, who is holding hands with Russia in their war against Ukraine. We give money to Communist Cuba, who we named a state sponsor of terrorism. And the one that is most embarrassing? We give money to China! How weak do we look? When I am President, we will no longer give money to countries that hate America! We have the solutions. We know what it means to get things done. But I need your help to win so we can get to work and right this ship! Please join me in the fight to save our country by pitching in a generous donation today. That’s why I urge you to read this important message... ” — Sean Hannity “In times of uncertainty, we need to be vigilant about protecting what’s ours. That’s why I urge you to read this important message... ” — Sean Hannity | | | Biden’s a predictable disaster. Ask him to lead the country in a time of crisis... Not a word. Ask him about the 40 year high inflation... Not a word. Ask him why you’re paying more for gasoline... Why it cost a fortune to heat and cool your home... | | | And why everything you buy at the store is more expensive... NOT A WORD. Instead, he’ll stand in front of a teleprompter and sell you on a repackaged “Build Back Broke” deal, paid for by your retirement savings. But wait! Biden says, “under my plan, nobody earning less than $400,000 a year will pay an additional penny in new taxes.” Yeah, is that right Joe? No new taxes? Don’t believe it. He voted for a new 50% tax on Social Security benefits in 1983... He voted for 85% taxes on Social Security benefits in 1994... He voted for Estate Taxes in 2000... Now, he wants to raise over $3.3 TRILLION in NEW taxes. Who do you think will pay for that? Are you prepared for higher inflation, higher costs, and less money for yourself... Or do you want to PROTECT YOUR HARD EARNED MONEY before it’s too late? If you have $50,000 or more in retirement savings... I think you should protect your retirement savings NOW, just like thousands of other Americans have already done... That’s why we put together an easy-to-follow blueprint that could help protect your retirement savings from Biden’s greedy hands. There’s NO Cost or Obligation The Kit is 100% FREE Even the FedEx Shipping is 100%FREE Inside you’re going to discover how simple it is to protect your retirement savings, and how you can do it 100% TAX FREE & PENALTY FREE.** Look, I’ve done my research... name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Protect Your Bank Account with THESE 3 Simple Steps
body:
Discover these 3 simple steps here.

| | | | | Dear Reader, Starting as soon as a few months from now, the United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide. It will give them unprecedented powers to control your bank account. They could closely track every transaction. They could even freeze it. Unless you protect yourself today. Fortunately, there are [3 simple steps](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdgdoq42fl29em3fmmpdg4jmhq04hetcnc9vufo8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjjm2p76cth2bs) you can take to safeguard your savings. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Leading the outsiders race
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWQgpCFDHN

Vivek 2024

As the first millennial to run for the GOP nomination, I
want to foster national pride....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWQgpCFDHN

Fellow American,

When I entered this race, I had
never run for office before. I didn't have years of campaigning
under my belt, or a list of political donors to help support my
campaign.

I bet most grassroots
conservatives only knew my name from Fox News appearances.

But now, 4 months after
announcing my campaign for President of the United States, I am
climbing in the polls - even polling ahead of a former Vice
President, a sitting U.S. Senator, and multiple governors.

I am proud of the outsider
campaign we are running. In addition to the millions my family
has personally invested, I am counting on folks like YOU to make
sure we have what it takes to continue to build on this momentum!

Can I count on you to step up -
even if it's just $1 or $5?

RUSH $1 →

RUSH $5 →

RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT
→

As the first millennial to run
for the GOP nomination, I want to foster national pride among
young Americans. I want to restore the values that make America
great: faith, family, patriotism, and hard work.

We need a PRIME spot on the
debate stage to discuss this with voters across the country, and
these poll numbers are KEY. But I really need help securing new
donors. Fellow American, please help however you can to make sure
we continue to take on the Washington elites.

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

CHIP IN NOW →

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Friend,
I'm in this race because I believe Southern Arizona deserves so much better than our current leadership. But I wouldn't be able to keep up this fight without your support.
So: thank you.
My campaign set a big fundraising goal for July. We had a great quarter earlier this year, but we have to keep up that momentum in order to take on my opponent's dark money donors and corporate PACs.
Because of the generosity of folks like you, we hit our goal!
Thanks for being on Team Engel. Together, our grassroots-powered campaign is going to make a difference.
Best,
Kirsten

# WEDNESday, August 2, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today is the 233rd anniversary of America's first official Census Day, as mandated by the Constitution. As of Aug. 2, 1790, the number of inhabitants in the new nation came to 3,929,214. ## Feds Indict Trump For Events of Jan. 6
Donald Trump was indicted for a third time Tuesday, this time on [four federal charges](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7ty6yAQgOGnQR2a9SLrUlCcRp1Pm1LDZbHXg4AR2ErePpPUqf_in-_jtt0MR073_2Yn3ULejGv8pg1miRLVhp3XgQhJdaQv4wLLNFyv2D20ceTVQn6cwTsbAl0u18k6ZYM1OMzQsUZABTMgLGqCqbczmQHchIObg1lIDECeWz76Z-bUHhTiV37T0bu8d1E_WitVqH8CV4HreZ59yJ-JzvrTBa4lR27sqsC1Ha-9SE6eXSMvayHHJkqXX6lSlOXIluTTJDl2h_bl5Bi5jpMY4L4bjr_D9if_OwAA__8xXV6y) in connection with the events of Jan. 6, 2021 at the Capitol. [The charges](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQRL_GdIvM2ndAQXFF6C5KlxL5zAIbGZvA3ln5-4jUqWakKebpfd6Hu-PAcX53K3UypcF54RcNugEENAMWYzcRIZmCuura6ra2lwsWS2eqhydnLWnvrJ-qSlPbWkNji86TNQV3qNHoRqNuTa3r8tGQs9rXaH0zuZaU1TSypL38ShxloSn8pBftpU9rEbpFZDuUuSnsFfY553I94rkp7CnC81DYR8pnbCmwsD-r7M91g4UFMssCRybaOM7AcWQvK0UBjuBCoJlGoGlKu4AkOI_luUdAjRookBdOUWHvdrjdKnr7-K6KvRu3zCHwca2V1fPqOPzRyr_ufgMAAP__eHZyoQ) include conspiracy to defraud the U.S.; conspiracy to obstruct an official proceeding; obstruction of and attempt to obstruct an official proceeding; and conspiracy against rights. Trump's arraignment will be Thursday at 4 p.m. Special Counsel Jack Smith described Jan. 6 as a "criminal scheme" to keep Trump in office after the election. [Trump denounced](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHOnDAQhJ_GdEbGcIALiitCqj9tSrRnr2Eje41s36HL00cXpUw1o5nm0_fza_sCCsT7D4i4VJ82sJVeuKlZaqn7TTdu8Yga-waXbjTKTMPtpptjmU03g_bzNHrnh4c3rjO3fjT9AKMbJ2xo0Ur3alZamX5SU_uYEQZlJz3Y2YNBMSh0VFNufyXieqAP7_TC3NoUm7ActZ5F9HehV6HX67raWPjzCb0iy2cRemW8PnGmQJXsp7rEEJys-RlPSezI1ohc_w0W4gm0s3TI6ckWiwxQsVRpD8g7FkksbYonZCqJ5UX1kAy_Se6YI_Bb6BWyvN87_Pa9YJMXd14UApVxEoPaI1D4i1__K_NPAAAA__9nYXnu) the charges, comparing them to Nazi-era persecutions.
## NASA Error Cuts Contact with Voyager 2
NASA's Voyager 2, launched in 1977 and still operating in deep space 12 billion miles from Earth, had its communications cut off by a [wrong command](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7GOrCAUgOGnwQ5z7hEFC4rb2M22W5ozeFA2CAbITHz7zW69L_D_-T4f64NCDGn_oJNt83kl18KLVzASJQ4rdpv1zMhDx_bfNMOs1Thid1ijpyc-FRnvFQNM2ntPbhznzfhR8dwFi4ADGECYBw26fxomBU6jcsbTzEIBb6Hl0n_lkNrBPt75xaV3-eyiPVq7qhj-C1wELtdx1z6XXeCS-F0FLj91CVomqiRf-aadi6wXOXaFfJPvktMuXU6NXOuPdsau2O16hxhDnbRQsJ8U4u-t_Wn_DgAA___nQ1uk) sent by flight controllers that misaligned the antenna. Officials say they've [picked up a weak "heartbeat" signal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FyhCAQgOGn0Q4HFxQtKNJcd2lTOgusd5sgOEh07u0zSZ36L_75Pu7LHTlyerzjRraueUFf-aRFTgIEqAXaYFciINWS7cdZzkYPA7RP653DMCgcEVzfzx5M6MMQRumDdpMPLVuQoOQkQc7KSNO5iVBLb0D7acWZGi0pcM2l-8yc6pPW-Monlc7nrY32Wet-NOqtgVsDt-u6umNHT7-1gduZX_igIkBwqlSOSjFiEXvJjoTP2_ad2GPlnIQrhF8hX6ktNuwXx8jHaBotHxty_LvVf-0_AQAA___tsV37) from the craft, indicating it's still broadcasting, and they're trying to turn its antenna around. If not, they hope an automatic reset in October fixes the problem. Voyager 2 was launched a few weeks after Voyager 1, and both ships have since left the solar system for interstellar space. Voyager 1 is now 15 billion miles from Earth, humanity's [most distant spacecraft.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQAL_G7ojwAgYXFK9Jl9deaS3L4nAixsIoUf7-lKuvHE0zmq_besNc8r79xwf7nuqK1POTV-kECFArjNEnZmA1sp_mRS5WGwPj3Wu3GBWSjczBBMdKM4U0GctGToRmzB4kKOkkyEVZaS_BMWpJFjS5hAsPWnLMvbbLd817v3Mq7_rkdqH6GIu_936cg_o3wHWAKx47v86P-kDrmQoPcN3xRPGsb9y4ifNAYmqYumi8Yd5PQXXvSF1gjKQwgktTnAOTVDDJYJxN8zLPKo7Nx-OVS8nnbActtwfm8hvS_9zyEwAA__9sD2RD)
## Man Travels to Every Nation Using No Planes
Danish traveler Thor Pedersen [visited every country](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFugzAQgOGnge0i5-yAPXjoki1dO6LDHPFVxkbgEPH2VTt3_pdf39djeJAkyc9PWtjXuQwUqhw8KAsIqAdsJz8zI-uW_bVzyvXmdsM2enbzaLQ2SBzCOClr51GPzl4Nqc7YrhWPCrWyCpXTveovo2UyKvRogp3JcWMUT1LLdvkukmvkOZ3l4O0SytImH2td90Z_NHhv8L5yWRP_pgbvE2XZIyyUISSSZYfIcMgulSfgg7cTQnnlup1QMjBtNcJbaiyvCq9d8hMI1kSZob91HTrTbn5a35KS7F3fGPVcSNLfR_1X5ScAAP__LctlUg) in the world without flying to any of them. The continuous trip took 10 years and 10 passports to make it to 203 different nations, some of them disputed territories. Instead of airplanes, Pederson traveled by foot, car, bus, train, and boat -- including [37 container ships](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAQgOGnwQ5nb0HRwiKN3aVN6SCsJxkEB_eOubfPJHWe4P_n-7ovdxtiSI9Pe9DEW16s4_CiBQaJEtWCjZ82IiTV0HTrRxiN7jps9skor7pRK0-rHmjre99Tr5yBVTtwvWnChIAKBkAYlQHTrgNZDc6gdsNmRxIayAfOpf3OIfFOW3znF5XW5aOJ0858XkJ9CJwFzrXW1q6uTcStfQqcE9VL4PzbkNBJ7ATOvOciT_JULkrS5eOMxHTJkp_JS95J1lyil1zCKWvgPT9ZbvEd0kPgfANUphtRN2XyZw0xhqs3QsPjsCH-XfG_Rj8BAAD__3QnZ2c). He said while other people have visited every country, he's the only one to do it without flying and in one continuous trip. The biggest complication came in early 2020, when he became stranded in Hong Kong for months because of the Covid lockdown. He says a documentary of his travels is in the works.

NASA Error Cuts Contact with Voyager 2 NASA's Voyager 2, launched in 1977 and still operating in deep space 12 billion miles from Earth, had its communications cut off by a sent by flight controllers that misaligned the antenna. Officials say they've from the craft, indicating it's still broadcasting, and they're trying to turn its antenna around. If not, they hope an automatic reset in October fixes the problem. Voyager 2 was launched a few weeks after Voyager 1, and both ships have since left the solar system for interstellar space. Voyager 1 is now 15 billion miles from Earth, humanity's Man Travels to Every Nation Using No Planes Danish traveler Thor Pedersen in the world without flying to any of them. The continuous trip took 10 years and 10 passports to make it to 203 different nations, some of them disputed territories. Instead of airplanes, Pederson traveled by foot, car, bus, train, and boat -- including . He said while other people have visited every country, he's the only one to do it without flying and in one continuous trip. The biggest complication came in early 2020, when he became stranded in Hong Kong for months because of the Covid lockdown. He says a documentary of his travels is in the works. name: Committee To Elect Stephen McDow
subject: Tre Schumacher is McDow campaigns new chief spokesperson
body:
Grassroots is at the heart
| | |
---
---
|
### Tre Schumacher joins as chief spokesperson & advisor

Tre was a high school student when he reached out to Stephen's former employer [NCBA CLUSA](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KH1Ba-PHzA1bBXd0boLTkxEDm4cOefkCuwRjZ0hYcdi5U1fdBJXXEZsJADwKNkLAQsyBhLUHRG-RLEOFwfAHlaToUOeJ0P3yHMVnxl4M_EQZMoTRYM4fieC6W1B5QAWkEAS1j34ceBcBT2JqvYs_IA==&c=DGHWg-u_FpWjSncaNAa6iE6-_q1dZjaiddHLIWQL0l3zC7TO4Tl2zQ==&ch=DAFJ7d-FCAD_Tzh8_6VCsG8-t-7svSn59YdLbRV1KCI9KSfWlQAvEA==). There, he spoke with Stephen and members of the team about the power of co-operative businesses. Tre wanted to learn more about the co-op model and was subsequently invited to attend the 2018 Co-op IMPACT Conference. He was sponsored by DotCo-op.
After engaging the co-op community he went on to run campaigns on the local, state and federal levels, as well as work on issue based campaigns. Tre also brings experience in leading campaign operations, grassroots organizing, and digital media.
When Tre is not overachieving he is a student at Widener University Delaware Law.
Tre will take over and assist the candidate with outreach to the community, media, and build upon the grassroots strategy.
Already making an impact
During Tre's first meeting the team was discussing what the community was lacking - specifically the business community.
Tre Schumacher, Chief Spokesperson:
"All organizations have to perform basic tasks such as hire and promote good employees, fire bad employees, pay taxes, administer employee benefits, and obtain and maintain licenses, permits, insurance, and financing. Let's make Maryland the best place to do business by making these processes as simple, quick, cheap, and easy as possible - and let's impact ALL businesses in America at the same time."
This goal starts with 100% broadband for all residents and businesses throughout the Western part of the district. Tre and team McDow vow to work with Governor Moore to ensure the 6th district gets what it needs.
Tre created the vision for an additional campaign slogan: Let's make Maryland the BEST place to do business!
Visit: [https://www.mcdowforcongress.com/team-4](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KH1Ba-PHzA1bBXd0boLTkxEDm4cOefkCuwRjZ0hYcdi5U1fdBJXXEeNwm35pH3zBWD9S-Zz8UML_agXbXQ94vJadB764kQSZig-d-6MX8Bv6d3dpaTS2LViyP3t36lhHcPs2r8wUSKDc7AgnFLN9hrBvQrZ_7fbFcPtMFL-LNTg=&c=DGHWg-u_FpWjSncaNAa6iE6-_q1dZjaiddHLIWQL0l3zC7TO4Tl2zQ==&ch=DAFJ7d-FCAD_Tzh8_6VCsG8-t-7svSn59YdLbRV1KCI9KSfWlQAvEA==)
---
|
---
| |
---
|
# A few of Stephen's 22 policy positions
---
|
---
The Cannabis Safe Law \- Does not intend to suggest an additional penalty should be added for those caring for a child who ingests edibles. A parent or caregiver of a child would automatically be reviewed by Child Protective Services or the courts. Stephen wants to protect children in the same way society has the expectation of car seats for infants and fire alarms in homes. Advocacy groups like American Academy of Pediatrics may support new prohibitions if cases of accidental cannabis ingestion keep occurring. It can also be said that Stephen is protecting children, the user and cannabis industry! [Click to read resolution](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KH1Ba-PHzA1bBXd0boLTkxEDm4cOefkCuwRjZ0hYcdi5U1fdBJXXEfcvCe3qwgaopUaKT2A1nhB_6vmtifkYTx8_ybWldnYaQMLy0QNTNUhDrcqwgX5qLUv0WxCTUH5PX-QSWHc0yanZ6LacOJP-efJ2v39-tVLtRp2uIuKVF__ms6SFjkFyisXpY4Lgzo5n&c=DGHWg-u_FpWjSncaNAa6iE6-_q1dZjaiddHLIWQL0l3zC7TO4Tl2zQ==&ch=DAFJ7d-FCAD_Tzh8_6VCsG8-t-7svSn59YdLbRV1KCI9KSfWlQAvEA==)
---
|
---
The National ACH/EFT Transfer Error & Mediation Law \- The intent is to bring consistency, safe conclusions, and a formal process for resolving cases where two unsuspecting parties cross paths due to an electronic bank transfer error. [Click to read resolution](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KH1Ba-PHzA1bBXd0boLTkxEDm4cOefkCuwRjZ0hYcdi5U1fdBJXXEfcvCe3qwgaopUaKT2A1nhB_6vmtifkYTx8_ybWldnYaQMLy0QNTNUhDrcqwgX5qLUv0WxCTUH5PX-QSWHc0yanZ6LacOJP-efJ2v39-tVLtRp2uIuKVF__ms6SFjkFyisXpY4Lgzo5n&c=DGHWg-u_FpWjSncaNAa6iE6-_q1dZjaiddHLIWQL0l3zC7TO4Tl2zQ==&ch=DAFJ7d-FCAD_Tzh8_6VCsG8-t-7svSn59YdLbRV1KCI9KSfWlQAvEA==)

---
|
---
Character Development Legislation \- The intent is to continue the work Stephen did with Dr. Edwin Powell during his DC City Council run in 2014. Stephen would like to add diversity through shared purpose and ensure young people have basic home economics skills. [Click to read original legislation](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KH1Ba-PHzA1bBXd0boLTkxEDm4cOefkCuwRjZ0hYcdi5U1fdBJXXEfcvCe3qwgaopUaKT2A1nhB_6vmtifkYTx8_ybWldnYaQMLy0QNTNUhDrcqwgX5qLUv0WxCTUH5PX-QSWHc0yanZ6LacOJP-efJ2v39-tVLtRp2uIuKVF__ms6SFjkFyisXpY4Lgzo5n&c=DGHWg-u_FpWjSncaNAa6iE6-_q1dZjaiddHLIWQL0l3zC7TO4Tl2zQ==&ch=DAFJ7d-FCAD_Tzh8_6VCsG8-t-7svSn59YdLbRV1KCI9KSfWlQAvEA==)

# Taking co-ops to the Capitol: Meet the movement leader standing for US Congress
By Rebecca Harvey [Executive Editor, Co-op News (UK)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KH1Ba-PHzA1bBXd0boLTkxEDm4cOefkCuwRjZ0hYcdi5U1fdBJXXEZsJADwKNkLArigMhWkZuNqoAP58bteiKc4d--Cp959iOrtLbO4MyuPjl8t2K_PDHZVn4s9xo8w6mkShav6kosOh4YaOrdNLhA==&c=DGHWg-u_FpWjSncaNAa6iE6-_q1dZjaiddHLIWQL0l3zC7TO4Tl2zQ==&ch=DAFJ7d-FCAD_Tzh8_6VCsG8-t-7svSn59YdLbRV1KCI9KSfWlQAvEA==)
---
| |
---
|
###

What drives someone to be a politician? Stephen Reginald McDow II, running as a Democratic candidate for Congress in Maryland District 6, says for him "it's about service to people ... and a burning desire to help improve my community".

Read article at Co-op News (Coming Soon)
---
| |
---
|
# COOP News (Global) Stephen Archives
---
|
---
| |
---
A group of co-operators based in the East Midlands came together on 31 March to explore solutions to food poverty. Organised by [Co-operatives East Midlands](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KH1Ba-PHzA1bBXd0boLTkxEDm4cOefkCuwRjZ0hYcdi5U1fdBJXXEZsJADwKNkLA1oyWDwXB3pD-QH0S6urTvRPHm_9f5AqqIxrTRmqZZjAuRSZkSK7qvRxNngOoatazyKXWIF8dpWMZV2GmjPr1KA==&c=DGHWg-u_FpWjSncaNAa6iE6-_q1dZjaiddHLIWQL0l3zC7TO4Tl2zQ==&ch=DAFJ7d-FCAD_Tzh8_6VCsG8-t-7svSn59YdLbRV1KCI9KSfWlQAvEA==), the event focused on the role of co-operatives in promoting food justice. [Read More](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KH1Ba-PHzA1bBXd0boLTkxEDm4cOefkCuwRjZ0hYcdi5U1fdBJXXEZsJADwKNkLA3EQnnTvpVZH7hRYGpQVZJQkDcuX6JA1CumyQ6DfHKw3yPuI482A91ZEynoeG2GkHVrHbyZug0fzGfn8Uf3peWqmkH-hlhSS-kRUHRmO6x3qeFeNouTBVB7eAD-RZYaUg_u1OPsCCiF2SA1MWoe9WbWZnaeQ71wQLF3DQYS9E7AvilHasTylxP9bvEKRMrG8nRqNIk8CgVY714BVou0lefw==&c=DGHWg-u_FpWjSncaNAa6iE6-_q1dZjaiddHLIWQL0l3zC7TO4Tl2zQ==&ch=DAFJ7d-FCAD_Tzh8_6VCsG8-t-7svSn59YdLbRV1KCI9KSfWlQAvEA==)

---
| |
---
Co-operative development in the USA has a unique set a challenges, largely underpinned by the sheer scale of geographies, politics and histories. On the east coast, the Keystone Development Center ([KDC](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KH1Ba-PHzA1bBXd0boLTkxEDm4cOefkCuwRjZ0hYcdi5U1fdBJXXEZsJADwKNkLAFlVDURtsMyOzt6gZJHtMWEiuzCGOJW8tUokmr6zrvmMsVyxXtE5y1J0BoViGJSHQJvx4rUV6bOo=&c=DGHWg-u_FpWjSncaNAa6iE6-_q1dZjaiddHLIWQL0l3zC7TO4Tl2zQ==&ch=DAFJ7d-FCAD_Tzh8_6VCsG8-t-7svSn59YdLbRV1KCI9KSfWlQAvEA==)) has been taking on these challenges for 20 years.. [Read More](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KH1Ba-PHzA1bBXd0boLTkxEDm4cOefkCuwRjZ0hYcdi5U1fdBJXXEZsJADwKNkLAi7A0_Mymhj6IRFnOj6pVhV2j_kZnFc1zQv4vt5130EoW_gCPBZZftByVCZ7PQ-JKkY0Ak0cgAETwWYpCnxOmq235Xs84nx33bzfz-AOHF0L3s-ht3nvY3J__3WbnpM9R0eyiIKNNaYKXYIiOrgCYwahdratuKXzixjcE3QkxXr3MJQoB4goDcQ==&c=DGHWg-u_FpWjSncaNAa6iE6-_q1dZjaiddHLIWQL0l3zC7TO4Tl2zQ==&ch=DAFJ7d-FCAD_Tzh8_6VCsG8-t-7svSn59YdLbRV1KCI9KSfWlQAvEA==)

# From Stephen's Vault
---
| Check out Stephen McDow and his mother, #actress "Ms. Spence" (Wanda Spence) on the show, The RoundTable Talkshow with [Sharifah Hardie](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KH1Ba-PHzA1bBXd0boLTkxEDm4cOefkCuwRjZ0hYcdi5U1fdBJXXEZsJADwKNkLASl8pznYsPef6RQgl_B2OqIRRyLUMLeQSuFqibcu-DGnfMKSk62wBSlLN-eXU30gpSSyy0O0Pn2cwuyYcd77CHQ==&c=DGHWg-u_FpWjSncaNAa6iE6-_q1dZjaiddHLIWQL0l3zC7TO4Tl2zQ==&ch=DAFJ7d-FCAD_Tzh8_6VCsG8-t-7svSn59YdLbRV1KCI9KSfWlQAvEA==), as they discuss #entrepreneurship, #coops, #COVID19, and community!
Ms. Hardie is a former candidate for [California Senate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KH1Ba-PHzA1bBXd0boLTkxEDm4cOefkCuwRjZ0hYcdi5U1fdBJXXEZsJADwKNkLAcfk5F724iSBIHAFYP_C8c6RbVNm58o5HqDeVy8QP-cPzjH2XostYMHvrOdJpnubgrwk0CeRPJfIwhkVQbu3kPhtJuXA8JWXO&c=DGHWg-u_FpWjSncaNAa6iE6-_q1dZjaiddHLIWQL0l3zC7TO4Tl2zQ==&ch=DAFJ7d-FCAD_Tzh8_6VCsG8-t-7svSn59YdLbRV1KCI9KSfWlQAvEA==) and the former president of the [Southern California Black Chamber of Commerce - Long Beach Area Chapter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KH1Ba-PHzA1bBXd0boLTkxEDm4cOefkCuwRjZ0hYcdi5U1fdBJXXEZsJADwKNkLACbthgKKV60HuxwoGKAr4h1rbFnv4cCi5PVvqfI4R9ChLx2YGZNA30eepsbdES-qVCGnVBzUedF_oKhE-_Igapjxot00BcQRYCPTv6BEnkcA=&c=DGHWg-u_FpWjSncaNAa6iE6-_q1dZjaiddHLIWQL0l3zC7TO4Tl2zQ==&ch=DAFJ7d-FCAD_Tzh8_6VCsG8-t-7svSn59YdLbRV1KCI9KSfWlQAvEA==).

clean_body: Grassroots is at the heart | | | | Tre Schumacher joins as chief spokesperson & advisor Tre was a high school student when he reached out to Stephen's former employer ==. There, he spoke with Stephen and members of the team about the power of co-operative businesses. Tre wanted to learn more about the co-op model and was subsequently invited to attend the 2018 Co-op IMPACT Conference. He was sponsored by DotCo-op. After engaging the co-op community he went on to run campaigns on the local, state and federal levels, as well as work on issue based campaigns. Tre also brings experience in leading campaign operations, grassroots organizing, and digital media. When Tre is not overachieving he is a student at Widener University Delaware Law. Tre will take over and assist the candidate with outreach to the community, media, and build upon the grassroots strategy. Already making an impact During Tre's first meeting the team was discussing what the community was lacking - specifically the business community. Tre Schumacher, Chief Spokesperson: "All organizations have to perform basic tasks such as hire and promote good employees, fire bad employees, pay taxes, administer employee benefits, and obtain and maintain licenses, permits, insurance, and financing. Let's make Maryland the best place to do business by making these processes as simple, quick, cheap, and easy as possible - and let's impact ALL businesses in America at the same time." This goal starts with 100% broadband for all residents and businesses throughout the Western part of the district. Tre and team McDow vow to work with Governor Moore to ensure the 6th district gets what it needs. Tre created the vision for an additional campaign slogan: Let's make Maryland the BEST place to do business! Visit: == | | | | A few of Stephen's 22 policy positions | The Cannabis Safe Law \- Does not intend to suggest an additional penalty should be added for those caring for a child who ingests edibles. A parent or caregiver of a child would automatically be reviewed by Child Protective Services or the courts. Stephen wants to protect children in the same way society has the expectation of car seats for infants and fire alarms in homes. Advocacy groups like American Academy of Pediatrics may support new prohibitions if cases of accidental cannabis ingestion keep occurring. It can also be said that Stephen is protecting children, the user and cannabis industry! == | The National ACH/EFT Transfer Error & Mediation Law \- The intent is to bring consistency, safe conclusions, and a formal process for resolving cases where two unsuspecting parties cross paths due to an electronic bank transfer error. == | Character Development Legislation \- The intent is to continue the work Stephen did with Dr. Edwin Powell during his DC City Council run in 2014. Stephen would like to add diversity through shared purpose and ensure young people have basic home economics skills. == | | | Taking co-ops to the Capitol: Meet the movement leader standing for US Congress By Rebecca Harvey == | | | What drives someone to be a politician? subject: Proud to #BackTheBlue
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GEORGIANS FOR JOHN KING
body:
| | |
---
Friend, Over the last week, I’ve had the honor of spending time with law enforcement across Georgia. I spent time on the coast with police chiefs and sheriffs. On Sunday, I was back in Doraville — where I myself served as a police chief — for National Night Out.
---
---
Having spent my career in law enforcement, standing with our LEOs and first responders is personal to me. They’re heroes, they deserve our support, and I will always have their backs.
---
---
John KingGeorgia Insurance Commissioner

Commissioner John King got his start as a beat cop with the Atlanta Police Department. He worked various assignments, including Red Dog and Organized Crime, before joining the Doraville Police Department. Before becoming Chief of Police, he served as a Detective and Deputy Chief. During his 17 years as Police Chief, Commissioner King tackled corruption, implemented community policing in at-risk neighborhoods, and cracked down on gang violence through early intervention programs at local schools. In addition to his career in law enforcement, Commissioner King spent four decades serving in the U.S. Army National Guard — enlisting as a private and retiring as a major general. He deployed to Bosnia, Iraq, and Afghanistan — earning the Bronze Star Medal, Combat Infantry Badge, El Salvador gold medal for achievement, meritorious service medals, and a NATO award along the way. Commissioner King retired from active duty in 2023. As Georgia’s Insurance and Safety Fire Commissioner, Commissioner King has disrupted the status quo, put Georgia families first, and held the powerful accountable. He was appointed by Governor Brian Kemp in 2019 and elected to a full term in 2022, making him Georgia’s first Hispanic statewide elected official.
---

subject: Jim Himes is Now the Center-Pawn for House Democrat Messaging
body:
Campaign Update
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---
| | |
---
August 2, 2023 Now that Adam Schiff has been back-benched by House Democrat leadership as 'damaged goods,' his replacement as messaging mouthpiece has emerged. Schiff, totally exposed as a bold-faced liar at House microphones for years, was ousted from the House Intelligence Committee by Speaker McCarthy. And who has been pushed forward to take his role - none other than CT-4 Congressman, Jim Himes. So, it seems as one pawn has been captured for relentless lying, he is now considered sacrificed by the Democrats - the Dem leader Hakeem Jeffries advances forward the next pawn in the line - one Jim Himes! Himes has taken Schiff's spot as 'ranking member' on the House Intelligence committee. In that role he has to go to the mikes espousing and defending the entirety of the Biden Administration's foreign policy and its myriad faux-pas, blunders, and ill-advised foreign adventures. But, with Schiff gone, House Democrat leadership needs another all-purpose water-carrier, ah-em, 'messenger,' and Jim Himes, has been advanced into the breach. After a rather widely circulated Friday [Video](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SsSmeClnkGoUbovu4G5gaNnlxzbjauPZe8czdA1uOYyzdxAbS46ybe7URfvoWR1_3kOYGnRsWVZpiESHZuqm1IAz5E41dLnW47qva9Br1QJ-PfliktkJaqWP-OtTIikp8jAOKxxWQJS64mk7U2ZPHg==&c=gHbtEQCrL55mbAx6ZwkBfn4NcGdamRK7v4RmlUkJyV6CN5c5baDFnQ==&ch=QK3MwfYwBRg-X_oFE_SVbjMWEaBl0ANePtoxQp0jHsP9pLTQNUjdBQ==) wherein Himes spends ninety percent of his time speciously defending Joe Biden and bashing Republicans, Himes mouths a side-note to reality by saying that Hunter should be held accountable 'IF' he's broken the law. Naturally, mainstream print media, leads with headlines of Mr. Himes' call for "accountability" for Hunter's tax evasion only, and in TV video they clip off ten percent of it to show Himes' call for Hunter's prosecution for what he's already admitted, and Himes' indignant phrase that "no Republican has ever called out Trump". Is Himes really unaware of Chris Christie and the never Trump crowd's verbal salvos unleashed on Trump over many years? This episode is a textbook case of corporate media flying cover for a notable Dem official's very cumbersome public defense of Joe Biden, while headlining the official's statement that the sky is blue (Hunter had already gone into court to plea guilty to tax evasion). Himes was sent out to defend Joe Biden, which he did full-throated with alternating bashing of Republicans as "fever dream" "conspiracy theory" peddlers. He repeated these phrases along with "zero, zero, zero evidence" endlessly throughout the interview. Then, in an attempt to inoculate himself, he says that Hunter should be prosecuted, and "if, if, if," evidence of Joe Biden's corruption surfaces, he too should be "held accountable." He then quickly reverts, and closes out the interview bashing Trump and Republicans, ridiculing McCarthy, and throwing in a couple closing "fever dreams" just for good measure. But both mainstream and 'conservative' TV media ran with the inoculation quote trying to advance the ludicrous meme that there remains a heartbeat of fairness among the Democrats. Evidently, Mr. Himes thinks we, his constituents, are stupid, and will swallow his line rather than believe our "lying eyes." Does he really think we don't know "evidence" when we see it. IRS whistleblower, [Joseph Ziegler](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SsSmeClnkGoUbovu4G5gaNnlxzbjauPZe8czdA1uOYyzdxAbS46ybe7URfvoWR1_K3qItKj1dOnyeY5jZQdHUcG3XIvqYT7uRC3Bivhg7PW-RyatI5YZBPgR8uN1W4IgvOkD7ULzrEMQZGUiGCOOkVggCKGSNiqtmRg7occUOYJHXra62Aaxit5J5HdlAzJ2Hp5GJhWQxLkZe49TkFjhlkuHZU4kbgSaHt-E03sHDdr7GJRMQspG9qibDVWMSxJrbJxPbiP769U3i_RxPloO6053_JWtZEcXlSg99iS04Hg=&c=gHbtEQCrL55mbAx6ZwkBfn4NcGdamRK7v4RmlUkJyV6CN5c5baDFnQ==&ch=QK3MwfYwBRg-X_oFE_SVbjMWEaBl0ANePtoxQp0jHsP9pLTQNUjdBQ==) testified to the House under oath to Hunter's tax evasion and the Justice Dept's efforts to prevent him from documenting the financial trail to the balance of the Biden family. Meetings documented by a 'confidential human source' in Ukraine were documented in this finally unclassified doc: [CHS Reporting Document](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SsSmeClnkGoUbovu4G5gaNnlxzbjauPZe8czdA1uOYyzdxAbS46ybe7URfvoWR1_FBvE3YuzLWGrA4q0O-7ITtnNRDrNe-rgHgjOge7BdYqPG2rG2gjAQqhQ77wOhdvJuUh7FNc0sB4bNp1KSUxH1Tp5eeNZFnSuyI34JE_Cpv8LlE7N3hOZsN7mRBZm_kX7o6yiB7n1SKlcnGNHR3E1dP1IP3FsdFoDqxjaK0GYQApTT23aCeL3z9WelFV0fgfJxePvRuPQ4PLiMB08Vk29eyZ_35o2UZPM2Crfx2Uo_lM=&c=gHbtEQCrL55mbAx6ZwkBfn4NcGdamRK7v4RmlUkJyV6CN5c5baDFnQ==&ch=QK3MwfYwBRg-X_oFE_SVbjMWEaBl0ANePtoxQp0jHsP9pLTQNUjdBQ==). Additional "evidence" is [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SsSmeClnkGoUbovu4G5gaNnlxzbjauPZe8czdA1uOYyzdxAbS46ybe7URfvoWR1_d-vDoVUKVNHyr3WkgIPeyplp7_sUmaBM2YiYkAOp0ngWNqRRKvXLXYObIwNhr2XE_VcsneOu9I50e-OQSJ-utYcmoG9pgR0V7qFY1aaw_2Q9BGskZTB-H0v2OSWJqhcNruGimAIMcn4N-CE_n2hnHIYNTAdyMj21M3eOy3_64pRGNiy6JMmocqjLOP0ziDx_&c=gHbtEQCrL55mbAx6ZwkBfn4NcGdamRK7v4RmlUkJyV6CN5c5baDFnQ==&ch=QK3MwfYwBRg-X_oFE_SVbjMWEaBl0ANePtoxQp0jHsP9pLTQNUjdBQ==), [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SsSmeClnkGoUbovu4G5gaNnlxzbjauPZe8czdA1uOYyzdxAbS46ybe7URfvoWR1_rnzWqw8I09N7grGYvtjrteGmdsmPdrjsGuMAejxKc9rqL_WKNwG6iqQKySXxkCLfK_TxQJPl70ImB-zEc1FfQZQHMu5QWeGPOy1KxuTUWRomu3OkQDC_tltGTX9uD4nRdBs5CaLxnDEUfif2isW4aGqo6uRiP_60IV-VRVRiiII=&c=gHbtEQCrL55mbAx6ZwkBfn4NcGdamRK7v4RmlUkJyV6CN5c5baDFnQ==&ch=QK3MwfYwBRg-X_oFE_SVbjMWEaBl0ANePtoxQp0jHsP9pLTQNUjdBQ==), [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SsSmeClnkGoUbovu4G5gaNnlxzbjauPZe8czdA1uOYyzdxAbS46ybe7URfvoWR1_qwBu5J4Va-Bapcet_AFA6Ts9cisiW_uKpPG8RAASrn7uKom0TJc_vnKGdHbxdfKOpmLppCPS1yPEozbykQuuIYUF7y8xbsJaNuzTR4FdlYptTzJDp70aH1vwWjQE65Fv7QkziyxE9YPi3ZZASgVQ17b7y3hQDIjfYWLtmEpuRW6i0c5g9_bgmg==&c=gHbtEQCrL55mbAx6ZwkBfn4NcGdamRK7v4RmlUkJyV6CN5c5baDFnQ==&ch=QK3MwfYwBRg-X_oFE_SVbjMWEaBl0ANePtoxQp0jHsP9pLTQNUjdBQ==), [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SsSmeClnkGoUbovu4G5gaNnlxzbjauPZe8czdA1uOYyzdxAbS46ybe7URfvoWR1_yGcZMmn4kiFr0bweJqJB3eco4i3uCf5yURVKXGssnCiNqlTlTQZpkA13WCz6IIxHXrmfojbcyRJM4NPYVje1dfreCGmuUnGEnRChQIw9z30YQhwvnIonKNStj1yyuwpauPWAfvBTSxeh-Xs_Wyr5Y1LbKUdxZr-en3sYmxBnUUQXpv8kTar7VSr8cIevV8i3-hT6EdKSWGNFTDTa1nEjLUvVnogt7pw4&c=gHbtEQCrL55mbAx6ZwkBfn4NcGdamRK7v4RmlUkJyV6CN5c5baDFnQ==&ch=QK3MwfYwBRg-X_oFE_SVbjMWEaBl0ANePtoxQp0jHsP9pLTQNUjdBQ==), [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SsSmeClnkGoUbovu4G5gaNnlxzbjauPZe8czdA1uOYyzdxAbS46ybe7URfvoWR1__LwZUjDJ6pyyHbLC6pEdPLK1PJakYmG-36Zd4hmaHMUB3OxT_zwE1B1ohBNm1SCLgR1aOictcXQbcm-BlCmUX3W-tGfZB9tEQUDYh3iWS4Mux-b39Bgg_bOFl2oVFXBSH_QLd4vcNqJ7U9vFoDn8mMA6QkJzHpFwvN7ym4Zm2WY4mDQocp7MBQ==&c=gHbtEQCrL55mbAx6ZwkBfn4NcGdamRK7v4RmlUkJyV6CN5c5baDFnQ==&ch=QK3MwfYwBRg-X_oFE_SVbjMWEaBl0ANePtoxQp0jHsP9pLTQNUjdBQ==), [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SsSmeClnkGoUbovu4G5gaNnlxzbjauPZe8czdA1uOYyzdxAbS46ybe7URfvoWR1_d2shcS6vDnXikuEJ2B-ZwwasACBTgYIW5E_-Q9yXHrgY7r8L6l2McUV06-ab73ID5EITFu48hmWYv1rMHBR-1Bx_LECRsxvvuRdjQQajLICG4ouoYonWIkmJJhbKsUL_ahd78SrJZtFbzucDumOFEzaqLdJc3H1O&c=gHbtEQCrL55mbAx6ZwkBfn4NcGdamRK7v4RmlUkJyV6CN5c5baDFnQ==&ch=QK3MwfYwBRg-X_oFE_SVbjMWEaBl0ANePtoxQp0jHsP9pLTQNUjdBQ==).
So, here we have Jim Himes, who stood gulping nervously behind Adam Schiff as he lied through his teeth at countless DC pressers over six years. To this day, Himes remains one of the most nervous-looking congressional interviewees we regularly see on the tube. And he should be, for he well-knows the massive fraud he's attempting to hide with his slick verbal gymnastics. Himes' recent behavior informs a look behind the scenes to perceive the new House Democrat leadership dynamic at play, now that Nancy Pelosi is no longer leading the Dems as a House majority. House Democrats are now led by Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries, of Brooklyn, NY. Jeffries stepped into this minority leadership role in January and needed to select new lieutenants in the wake of the failed human wreckage of the defeated Pelosi regime. Schiff and Swalwell are utterly damaged back-benchers, Hoyer and Clyburn are credibility-challenged, worn-out back-benchers, and Maloney was unseated. Hakeem Jeffries filled the formal leadership spots in January, and in Pelosi's wake he's had to field a new team of messengers, specifically selected to deceptively spin Democrat talking points of the day. These slick-talking messengers are the new Pawns to be advanced into the most partisan battles on Capitol Hill. Pelosi considered Himes a 'fair-haired boy' and usually spared him from the most challenging and self-exposing Democrat messaging challenges. Evidently, Hakeem Jeffries has decided it's time for Himes to get dirty, and has called him into action. Himes' face when interviewed these days evidences that Jeffries' bayonet is placed firmly in his back. Like it or not, Jim Himes has been yoked by his leadership, and is now a Pawn being advanced into the battle for defense on the political chessboard. Not the look he'd prefer to be reflected back to CT-4, but indeed, a most accurate one. There will plenty more skirmishes requiring Mr. Himes to stand in front of the microphones and lie through his teeth to the American public. And my campaign will be sure to hold HIM accountable on every one!
But first up - Mr. Himes vowed in Friday's interview, "IF Joe Biden has committed the kind of offenses Republicans allege, I will also be in front of the cameras saying the President should be held accountable."
* We'll be right here to assure he makes good on that pledge!... and in light of 170+ financial 'Suspicious Activity Reports,' currently filed on the Bidens, we may not have very long to wait.

So, it seems as one pawn has been captured for relentless lying, he is now considered sacrificed by the Democrats - the Dem leader Hakeem Jeffries advances forward the next pawn in the line - one Jim Himes! Himes has taken Schiff's spot as 'ranking member' on the House Intelligence committee. In that role he has to go to the mikes espousing and defending the entirety of the Biden Administration's foreign policy and its myriad faux-pas, blunders, and ill-advised foreign adventures. But, with Schiff gone, House Democrat leadership needs another all-purpose water-carrier, ah-em, 'messenger,' and Jim Himes, has been advanced into the breach. Then, in an attempt to inoculate himself, he says that Hunter should be prosecuted, and "if, if, if," evidence of Joe Biden's corruption surfaces, he too should be "held accountable." He then quickly reverts, and closes out the interview bashing Trump and Republicans, ridiculing McCarthy, and throwing in a couple closing "fever dreams" just for good measure. But both mainstream and 'conservative' TV media ran with the inoculation quote trying to advance the ludicrous meme that there remains a heartbeat of fairness among the Democrats. This is nothing but an egregious act of Election Interference and a final act of desperation from Crooked Joe as he crashes in the polls. The entire Biden Administration knows that I'm the ONLY candidate who would defeat Crooked Joe in a free and fair election. They know how much support we have from the hardworking people of our country. But more importantly, they know that I 'm the only candidate who can dismantle the Deep State and end their stranglehold on our nation. So, their only hope is to try and send me to JAIL for the rest of my life. A Soros-backed state prosecutor first tried to break us when he indicted and arrested me earlier this spring despite having committed no crime at all. But when it became clear that his attack failed to break us, Crooked Joe summoned a federal prosecutor to INDICT me despite having committed no crime once again. Now, they 're hoping that they've finally dealt the final blow by indicting me in the belly of the beast: Washington, D.C. If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me. Their grip will close even tighter around YOU. As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way. And even after 3 indictments, I will continue to stand in their way, because the fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It 's not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well - and I will NEVER let them take it from you. If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day.
