name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Hold factory farms accountable
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1909793?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Help PROTECT innocent animals and our planet from factory farms! [Act now!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1909794?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** Did you know that in the early days of the COVID-19 pandemic, your taxpayer dollars helped Big Ag corporations to **GAS and SHOOT millions of animals** amid slaughterhouse shutdowns? The _**total number of animals killed is still unknown.**_ This is just one example of the cruelty of factory farms -- there are countless more. In transit from farms to slaughterhouses, hens are**CRAMMED** into cages so tiny they **can’t even spread their wings.** Pregnant mother pigs are being **FORCED** into metal pens small enough that they can’t even turn around. Once animals reach slaughterhouses, their **THROATS ARE SLASHED** and they’re left to bleed out. The unsanitary conditions in which these poor animals are kept create a public health hazard for people too. **Fecal waste and other pollution can POLLUTE community drinking water.** Air pollution can create TERRIBLE ODORS. And factory farms can be a **dangerous breeding ground for bacteria and disease -- which can lead to MASS, CRUEL SLAUGHTERS.** **Your taxpayer dollars are supporting this cruel, unjust, and inhumane system -- but Congress has a bill to help change that.** The Industrial Agriculture Accountability Act will help hold Big Ag corporations accountable and prevent some of the most inhumane ways of slaughtering animals, but it needs more support to pass. That’s where you come in, Friend. [**If just 1 of every 8 people reading this email sends a message to their Members of Congress, we can help DEFEND people, our planet, and helpless animals from factory farms. Please take action by 11:59pm TONIGHT!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1909795?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1909796?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
You might have grown up being fed fairy-tale images of farms. Green rolling pastures where cows roam, mud pits where pigs joyfully slide around, and seed-littered dirt that chickens peck at for food.
**This is NOT where most of your meat and dairy products come from.** Small and family-owned sustainable farms may bear some resemblance to the farm images from your childhood, but they’re being CRUSHED by titanic corporations whose only goal is to churn out more meat and maximize profits, regardless of the consequences.
That’s why this bill is important, Friend. Factory farms cause so much pain -- to our communities, to small and family-owned farms, to innocent animals, and to our entire planet. **With so much at risk, we NEED YOUR HELP to pass this bill. [Please, Friend, will you take just 30 seconds to send your Members of Congress a message to help FIGHT greedy factory farm corporations? >> ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1909797?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1909796?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Chloë Waterman
Climate-friendly food senior program manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: 🚨 Indictments & Rep. Bergman 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
POTUS 45, Indictments,
and Jack Bergman
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
CONTRIBUTE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
Our previous President was indicted for his efforts to overturn the 2020 election. Read details about the charges at the bottom of this e-mail.
Subversion of our Democracy
This is the third time Trump has been criminally indicted and probably the fourth shortly to come.
*
Unprecedented
in
US
history.
*
We
are
a
Nation
of
laws.
*
We
are
a
Nation
that
cherishes
democracy.
*
We
support
our
Constitution.
*
We
are
a
Nation
of
diversity
of
opinions.
*
But
we
aren’t
a
Nation
of
lies,
dishonesty,
or
sedition
What about Jack Bergman?
Rep. Jack Bergman was center stage in the Big Lie in Antrim County that started our Nation down this misguided path to overturn the 2020 election.
(Learn more with the links here [https://www.votedrbob.com/so/15Ocrr4Wt/c?w=NWnpXr3gF8t3CXu_2hFWzqQztF0zH835DeP8vzFoyA4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm90ZWRyYm9iLmNvbS9wb3N0L2JlcmdtYW4tcy1pbnZvbHZlbWVudC1pbi1lbGVjdGlvbi1sYXdzdWl0LXVudXN1YWwtaW5hcHByb3ByaWF0ZS1kaXN0dXJiaW5nLWRyLWJvYiIsInIiOiJiODZiYjIyNy1lNzgyLTQ3MDQtYWU4ZS1jYzUzNDRmYTkxODIiLCJtIjoibHAifQ] and here [https://www.votedrbob.com/so/15Ocrr4Wt/c?w=L6gUoCgW9cESM3jHx47IFcIe0XR_xIvUHue5xwUH4VI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm90ZWRyYm9iLmNvbS9wb3N0L2FudHJpbXJlcG9ydCIsInIiOiJiODZiYjIyNy1lNzgyLTQ3MDQtYWU4ZS1jYzUzNDRmYTkxODIiLCJtIjoibHAifQ] ).
He believed it then and still does today.
Doubling down on a lie isn’t strength; it’s dishonorable.
He has undying support for Trump and his Freedom Party colleagues in the House.
Is there enough evidence to convict our former President?
The juries will decide.
Is there enough evidence not to vote for either of them?
Surely.
Let all of us show the world we believe in our Democracy [https://www.votedrbob.com/so/15Ocrr4Wt/c?w=bAqYJ1552CKW6lXuvcG_J0r9bEY25bdVHiZ15KAyoOw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2Fib3V0LWJvYiIsInIiOiJiODZiYjIyNy1lNzgyLTQ3MDQtYWU4ZS1jYzUzNDRmYTkxODIiLCJtIjoibHAifQ] , rule of law, truth-telling and integrity.
Bergman may have dodged indictment, but the role he played propagating conspiracies against the United States, against the will of the voters, and in violation of the Constitution deserve consequences at the polls in 2024.
, help me defeat seditious Jack Bergman. [https://www.votedrbob.com/so/15Ocrr4Wt/c?w=n_Q43DWmhW2M6LwcloDDq6JLPjHMFdOjfWm15742upo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL2FjdGJsdWUuY29tL2RvbmF0ZS9hYm91dC1ib2IiLCJyIjoiYjg2YmIyMjctZTc4Mi00NzA0LWFlOGUtY2M1MzQ0ZmE5MTgyIiwibSI6ImxwIn0] Trust, honesty, and integrity are vital to our survival as a Nation.
It is a matter of national security! Our moral and civic character is being tested, and we need to defend who we want to be as Americans. That is why I am running.
Together, we can make it possible.
Thank you,
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan & the UP
Democrat, MI01

The Charges
*
Conspiracy
to

the
United

*

Special counsel stated:
“The defendant must be presumed innocent until proven guilty.”
January 6 insurrection was "fueled by lies ... Lies by the defendant, targeted at obstructing a bedrock function of the US government — the nation's process of collecting, counting and certifying the results of the presidential election."
The indictment, and any conviction, would not bar Trump from running. Our previous President has had a First Amendment right to lie about the election but not “unlawful means of discounting legitimate votes and subverting the election results.”

| | Save Virginia, Save America Weekly Roundup
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Friend, The campaign to Save Virginia and Save America continued this past week with opportunities to meet leaders in the Asian American and Pacific Islander communities; a presentation before the Prince William County Republican Committee; a meeting with Emord endorser and former Assistant United States Attorney General Joseph A. Morris and his wife Kathy; a presentation before the James City County GOP; an appearance on the Robert Scott Bell Show; an appearance at the Veterans Issues Forum with Team Emord; a meeting with Youngevity International, Inc. distributors and members of the Wholistic Health Coaching program; and a meeting with twenty-five new members of Team Emord.
---
| | |
---
| | STRAW POLL
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | On July 23, Health Care Leader and NOVA Director of Rally Virginia Srilekha Palle introduced me to several prominent religious and political leaders in the Asian American and Pacific Islander communities of Northern Virginia in attendance at the Sixth Sense Meditation and Wisdom event with Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar at John Campe High School in Aldie, Virginia. I appreciate the many concerns expressed to me about woke policies in Virginia schools and have a well-developed legislative program to end those policies by making the transitioning ofyouth a federal felony; by making Critical Race Theory indoctrination, segregation, and race-based admissions policies illegal through federal enforcement of the Equal Protection Clause of the United States Constitution, and by making entry of biological males into girls and women’s bathrooms, locker rooms, and sports teams illegal through the amendment of Title IX of the Civil Rights Act.
---
| |
---
| | | [**Follow me on Facebook**](https://www.emordforva.com/so/cbOcjGpKt/c?w=asNpwZ7y9o6Hv21GVF-_wDf62cm83T71Anu3HsW9sBM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0pFbW9yZDE3NzYiLCJyIjoiYWQ3Nzc5MzktZTk4OS00ZGZhLTk4YzUtODUxMGRmZDllZGY3IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiODEwMDFlZjItMTg5MS00MGYwLWJmN2QtYjJhNmM2ZjVjZWUyIn0)
---
| | |
---
| | On July 24, I met with and made a presentation to members of the Prince William County Republican Committee. I appreciate the many statements of endorsement and support received that evening. I welcome to Team Emord the many who expressed their willingness to spread word of our candidacy and positions to the residents of Prince William County.
---
| | | [**Support Team Emord Now**](https://www.emordforva.com/so/cbOcjGpKt/c?w=IAlp-TmYxvs5TBG4ZOKj3CHJW8tFE7h2hTkoT9Lm1vY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9lbW9yZGZvcnZhL2RvbmF0ZSIsInIiOiI3NjJhN2JiNC03ZWZlLTRlNGUtZTAyMy1jMzU2Y2IxMmYwYzgiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI4MTAwMWVmMi0xODkxLTQwZjAtYmY3ZC1iMmE2YzZmNWNlZTIifQ)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | On July 25, I met with former Assistant United States Attorney Joseph A. Morris and his wife. Joe reiterated his strong endorsement of the Emord campaign. I deeply appreciate the many former members of the Reagan Administration who have expressed to us their support for our campaign to Save Virginia and Save America.
---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| | On July 26, I had the privilege of addressing the James City County GOP. The overwhelming support of the members of that GOP unit is greatly appreciated as we work together to takeback our state and nation. We met many existing Emord Team members and supporters and made many new friends at that event.
---
| | | [**Listen to my Weekly Robert Scott Bell Interview Here**](https://www.emordforva.com/so/cbOcjGpKt/c?w=mSs31TjFDGw03LLrMC5MNoN5fcT0UW7sVFfODbd6XlY.)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | On July 28, several members of Team Emord and I appeared at a Veterans Issues Forum sponsored by LTG Bob Wood of American Veterans Vote along with hosts Vito and KristiGerminario. The Guest Speaker was Daniel Gade, combat veteran, former U.S. Senate candidate, and present Commissioner of Governor Youngkin’s Department of Veterans Services.
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | On July 29, we welcomed twenty-five new members to Team Emord at an event at my home in Clifton, Virginia. These dedicated patriots from across the state have become a part of our campaign to Save Virginia and Save America. I am so grateful for every one of you. Your numbers are growing daily and you will soon reach battalion strength. Your outreach efforts from door knocking, attending events, and distributing yard signs and literature are indispensable to our campaign. I cannot thank you enough. I am particularly grateful for the incredible efforts of Emord Field Commander Cheri Fox and her dedicated team of patriots. They have knocked on over 1,050 doors in Northern Virginia and are fanning out with Emord captains across the state to help build this incredible movement to restore the rule of law, enforce the Constitution’s limits on power, and end the woke agenda in the military and schools.
---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| | On July 29, I had the privilege of meeting with leaders in Youngevity International, Inc., a health and wellness company, and with leaders of the Wholistic Health Coaching program. They are proving that exceptionalism, best achieved through enterprise unrestrained by government, is the key not only to personal success but also to American greatness.

clean_body: Friend, The campaign to Save Virginia and Save America continued this past week with opportunities to meet leaders in the Asian American and | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | Save Virginia, Save America Weekly Roundup | | | | | | | Friend, The campaign to Save Virginia and Save America continued this past week with opportunities to meet leaders in the Asian American and Pacific Islander communities; a presentation before the Prince William County Republican Committee; a meeting with Emord endorser and former Assistant United States Attorney General Joseph A. Morris and his wife Kathy; a presentation before the James City County GOP; an appearance on the Robert Scott Bell Show; an appearance at the Veterans Issues Forum with Team Emord; a meeting with Youngevity International, Inc. distributors and members of the Wholistic Health Coaching program; and a meeting with twenty-five new members of Team Emord. | | | | | STRAW POLL | | | | | | | On July 23, Health Care Leader and NOVA Director of Rally Virginia Srilekha Palle introduced me to several prominent religious and political leaders in the Asian American and Pacific Islander communities of Northern Virginia in attendance at the Sixth Sense Meditation and Wisdom event with Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar at John Campe High School in Aldie, Virginia. I appreciate the many concerns expressed to me about woke policies in Virginia schools and have a well-developed legislative program to end those policies by making the transitioning ofyouth a federal felony; by making Critical Race Theory indoctrination, segregation, and race-based admissions policies illegal through federal enforcement of the Equal Protection Clause of the United States Constitution, and by making entry of biological males into girls and women’s bathrooms, locker rooms, and sports teams illegal through the amendment of Title IX of the Civil Rights Act. | | | | | | | | | | On July 24, I met with and made a presentation to members of the Prince William County Republican Committee. I appreciate the many statements of endorsement and support received that evening. I welcome to Team Emord the many who expressed their willingness to spread word of our candidacy and positions to the residents of Prince William County. | | | | | | | | | | On July 25, I met with former Assistant United States Attorney Joseph A. Morris and his wife. Joe reiterated his strong endorsement of the Emord campaign. I deeply appreciate the many former members of the Reagan Administration who have expressed to us their support for our campaign to Save Virginia and Save America. | | | | | | | | On July 26, I had the privilege of addressing the James City County GOP. The overwhelming support of the members of that GOP unit is greatly appreciated as we work together to takeback our state and nation. We met many existing Emord Team members and supporters and made many new friends at that event. | | | | | | | | | | On July 28, several members of Team Emord and I appeared at a Veterans Issues Forum sponsored by LTG Bob Wood of American Veterans Vote along with hosts Vito and KristiGerminario. The Guest Speaker was Daniel Gade, combat veteran, former U.S. Senate candidate, and present Commissioner of Governor Youngkin’s Department of Veterans Services. | | | | | | | On July 29, we welcomed twenty-five new members to Team Emord at an event at my home in Clifton, Virginia. These dedicated patriots from across the state have become a part of our campaign to Save Virginia and Save America. I am so grateful for every one of you. Your numbers are growing daily and you will soon reach battalion strength. Your outreach efforts from door knocking, attending events, and distributing yard signs and literature are indispensable to our campaign. I cannot thank you enough. I am particularly grateful for the incredible efforts of Emord Field Commander Cheri Fox and her dedicated team of patriots. They have knocked on over 1,050 doors in Northern Virginia and are fanning out with Emord captains across the state to help build this incredible movement to restore the rule of law, enforce the Constitution’s limits on power, and end the woke agenda in the military and schools. | | | | | | | | On July 29, I had the privilege of meeting with leaders in Youngevity International, Inc., a health and wellness company, and with leaders of the Wholistic Health Coaching program. They are proving that exceptionalism, best achieved through enterprise unrestrained by government, is the key not only to personal success but also to American greatness. | | | | | | | | See you on the campaign trail, Jonathan | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Sign Up for Updates | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . name: Mondaire Jones
subject: I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi team,

I'm Mondaire Jones and I’m running to flip NY-17. In a moment, I’ll
introduce myself more, but first, I have some exciting news to share:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19013?t=1001&akid=3456%2E346206%2E0RTbnd ]I’m running for Congress. If you’re fired up and ready to flip this
district and take back the House majority, make a donation of $20 to
Charles Booker and my campaign today.

Let me introduce myself and share why I’m running to represent the Hudson
Valley in Congress.

Growing up poor, Black, and gay, I never saw anyone like me running for
office, let alone the U.S. House of Representatives. In fact, someone like
me had never been elected to Congress—whether from the Hudson Valley or
anywhere in America.

But I decided to run anyway—to be a voice for working families like my
own. And with the help of our grassroots, people-powered movement, we
shocked Washington’s political establishment and won.

I was proud to be part of the most productive Congress in modern
history—rescuing the American economy during COVID, lowering prescription
drug costs for seniors like my grandma, negotiating passage of the
infrastructure law, creating millions of jobs, defending our democracy,
and fighting for the freedom to have an abortion.

But despite this and the other progress we made, New York redistricting
and political machinations pushed me out of Congress.

For the past few months, I have watched with the rest of America as the
extreme MAGA Republican majority has passed policies that hurt everyday
people. And they have rallied behind a twice-impeached, serially indicted
criminal defendant, Donald Trump, who threatens to further undermine our
democracy.

Right now, Mike Lawler represents my district after winning by only 1,820
votes. A career political operative, Lawler will say anything you want to
hear, but do whatever Kevin McCarthy and the extreme MAGA Republicans tell
him to do. He’s slick like the Big Oil industry he used to lobby for. And
he must be defeated in order for Democrats to retake the House.

That’s why I'm not done fighting. I'm getting back in the ring.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19013?t=1002&akid=3456%2E346206%2E0RTbnd ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19013?t=1003&akid=3456%2E346206%2E0RTbnd ]We've got a chance to send Lawler packing. In 2020, President Joe Biden
won this House district by 10 points. If we don’t flip NY-17, Democrats
are simply not taking back the House in 2024. So we’ve set a huge $500,000
online launch goal to get my campaign off the ground. Split a donation
between my campaign and Charles Booker today.

Here’s the thing; I didn’t have it easy growing up. But it was the lessons
I learned from my family and Hudson Valley neighbors that got me here
today.

My grandfather was a janitor, and my grandmother cleaned homes. Mom
struggled with mental illness, and we often relied on government
assistance to put food on the table. But thanks to the support and
encouragement I received from my family and Rockland community, I went
from East Ramapo public schools to Harvard Law and the halls of Congress.

As a key player in the most productive Congress in history, the policies
we enacted were personal to me. But there’s more work to do for the
American people, including:

* Lowering the cost of prescription drugs for everyone, even those not
on Medicare
* Codifying Roe v. Wade into law and protecting the freedom to have an
abortion
* Banning assault weapons and enacting universal background checks to
keep our communities safe
* Defending our democracy from the Republican assault on voting and fair
elections
* Protecting Social Security and Medicare from Republican cuts

Our country is at a crossroads, and I refuse to sit on the sidelines.

We still need leaders in Congress for whom policy is personal — leaders
committed to creating real opportunity for all.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19013?t=1004&akid=3456%2E346206%2E0RTbnd ]This race isn’t about me; it’s about the people of the Hudson Valley.
With your support, we’re going to flip this district and take back the
House majority—are you ready? Watch my launch video, then split a donation
between Charles Booker and my campaign by making a donation of $20 or more
today >>

Let's do this,

Mondaire

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230802-3456-footer&t=1005&refcode2=3456_346206_0RTbnd&akid=3456%2E346206%2E0RTbnd

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3456%2E346206%2E0RTbnd

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I am CHARGED UP
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vslvelFDMN

Vivek 2024

I wanted to personally share some good news with you.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oslvelFDMN

Fellow American,

Five months ago, I launched this
campaign & my polling numbers were at 0%. Now... I'm tied for
second place!

We're surging in the polls and we
haven't even had the first debate yet!

I AM CHARGED UP, but I need your
help to see this through. I am not beholden to the donor class -
I've invested my own money in this race & I am counting on
grassroots leaders like you! Will you help?

CHIP IN $5 ➔

CHIP IN $10 ➔

CHIP IN $20.24 ➔

CHIP IN $50 ➔

I am running to lead a national
revival and I'm ready to win this race with you in my corner!

Thanks,

Vivek

WATCH NOW →

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:

name: Tim
subject: I’m out of time and options
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
This could make or break my campaign. So I’m turning to the one person I know I can count on.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zajmup90rcbiddasjn1l1p52b189vgkkhncejss0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjie4o32c9h2bs "TIM SCOTT - FAITH IN AMERICA")
---

Hi Friend, it's Tim Scott!

I'm sorry, but I'm out of time and I'm out of options.

**First:** I announced my Presidential campaign to restore faith in America and save the American Dream.

**Then:** We launched TV ads in Iowa and New Hampshire and I've been traveling all over the country to earn the support of voters like you.

**Now: I need to hit my Donor Goal before the end of week deadline! This could make or break my campaign.**

---

Your immediate support can help me overcome a major obstacle and spring this campaign forward.

If you're ready to restore hope in our country, create new opportunities for everyone, and protect the America we know and love, **_[will you please rush a donation today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi7na17vp378hhu4k3q2u47qrrq69kit36s43318_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjie4o32c9h2bs "will you please rush a donation today?")_**

Tim Scott

---

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt0n5r87ge3ao1h8it48qf5to82r090vqmjptli8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjie4o32c9h2bs "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfn73r2ripjsd2c6j620hnvhirf8t4kavch147co_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjie4o32c9h2bs "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

---

Thank you for your support!

-Tim

subject: Protect Your Bank Account with THESE 3 Simple Steps
body:
United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide

| | | | | Dear Reader, Starting as soon as a few months from now, the United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide. It will give them unprecedented powers to control your bank account. They could closely track every transaction. They could even freeze it. Unless you protect yourself today. name: Team Kennedy
subject: RFK, Jr. denied Secret Service Protection
disclaimer_text: paid for by the taxpayers
body:
If President Biden will not provide security for Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., we the American people will.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_denied_secret_service_n&n=1)
---
Peter, In what is a **new low for the Biden administration’s politics of fear and loathing** , it has refused a request, supported by 63 pages of confidential documentation, to provide Secret Service protection for our presidential candidate, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. Think about this: President Biden placed a bust of Robert F. Kennedy, Sr., in the Oval Office. **Now Biden is denying Mr. Kennedy’s namesake protection** , while the Secret Service provides his own son, Hunter Biden, with protection. **The Democratic Party is stirring up hate against Mr. Kennedy** for running against President Biden, while President Biden denies Mr. Kennedy protection. Biden will not provide protection for Mr. Kennedy, but **you can by going to**[**Kennedy24.com/donate**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_denied_secret_service_n&n=2)**now to help fund Mr. Kennedy’s personal security team** while he campaigns. Here is how Mr. Kennedy sees this move by the Biden administration: “The White House and the DNC are playing hardball pitching hate and vilifying me in the press with hate speech and the most odious defamations that might reasonably incite violence while simultaneously denying me the security to which I’m entitled.” Has the Biden administration's lust to hold onto power caused them to forfeit their humanity? Where are their hearts, their souls? Mr. Kennedy is totally fearless, but we must defend him. **He has a security team, and**[**now we must fund it**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_denied_secret_service_n&n=3)**.** | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_denied_secret_service_n&n=4 "DONATE TODAY") [DONATE TODAY](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_denied_secret_service_n&n=4)
---
At least one out of every three campaign dollars spent today goes for our candidate’s security. President Biden will campaign and have Secret Service protection, paid for by the taxpayers.
We can and we will make this right. **If President Biden will not provide security for Robert F. name: ICYMI News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb9a4mlo036s38dg8dpo4q4qhhgj90arjplritio_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjieco76c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs6ckd3u060v3jok5mp0ot9f2hfsnp0ckr514p5g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjieco76c1h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh0ue9c70labao98ka673barunr2n5maqn5pt98g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjieco76c1h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. ** You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 ICYMI News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Peter, will you please personally endorse Ruben Gallego today?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
This is no ordinary ask
#

Peter -
We need to ask you to do something important today.
Can you add your name to say you personally endorse Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate in Arizona? It's a small and simple act, but it's a big deal for this campaign — especially at this stage of the race.
If that's all you need to hear, use this link to tell Ruben you’ve got his back:
[**https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/Ruben-Endorse**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230801_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230802-1-30&refcode2=876.734936.wpQk7o&akid=876%2E734936%2EwpQk7o)
Otherwise, here's why this is important. Please give it some thought:
Winning this race will require us to unite Democrats behind our effort, and that includes national Democrats whose endorsements matter.
Those folks are paying attention to three things: the polls, how much money we raise, and the grassroots enthusiasm for our campaign.
They don't want to be on the opposite side of a campaign that has broad grassroots appeal.
That's where these endorsements come in. When Ruben has these conversations, this is the story he is telling: the polls, the money and the grassroots support.
That starts with people like you. So please:
[**Use this link to add your name as a personal endorser of Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate in Arizona. It's a small act that means a big deal to our chances.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230801_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230802-1-30&refcode2=876.734936.wpQk7o&akid=876%2E734936%2EwpQk7o)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230801_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230802-1-30&refcode2=876.734936.wpQk7o&akid=876%2E734936%2EwpQk7o)
Thank you,
Ruben Gallego for Arizona
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230801_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230802-1-30&refcode2=876.734936.wpQk7o&akid=876%2E734936%2EwpQk7o)

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=876%2E734936%2EwpQk7o). name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9pcb4qbuh60vl95fbg333qhpr7vhsrkd8os5img_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjieaor4cjh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znrlat7qbaoohnibk3gmd3dbt2nai17il4ih6gqo_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjieaor4cjh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgqostlu6ftgvdsf4stosmfru0vue4liqp8f2ogo_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjieaor4cjh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z902g08didqh6s5n5usav2rca80cv396fe4orj3o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjieaor4cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

American Action News
---

Politicians in Mississippi have a long tradition of visiting churches throughout the state and talking to Christian voters. But as old as the tradition is, so is the government's threat to churches.
In its ongoing dirty campaigning fashion, Team Delbert has hit a new low, now intimidating Churchgoers online and threatening the church's non-profit status for inviting his political opponent, Sen. Chris McDaniel, to church.
Sen. Jeremy England, a state senator on the coast and one of the most outspoken supporters of the moderate-at-best Delbert Hosemann, went to Facebook on Monday, saying, "If you go to a church that allows a visiting politician to take up a spot behind the pulpit on Sunday to address the congregation, I suggest talking to your pastor and your church elders." England's long rant continued and even went into the comments, with England agreeing with one post saying, "Maybe that church should have their non-profit status looked into."
It is sickening that elected politicians would threaten and intimidate Christians for inviting candidates to church, but not surprising from the Delbert team. When you don't have a conservative record to run on, you turn to mudslinging. And the cornerstone of Delbert's campaign has been built on mud.
But threatening the 501(c)3 status of churches is not a new trick from the left. In 2015, when Obama was president, Texas pastors famously received subpoenas to turn over their sermon notes so that politicians could review them for content they deemed "political", and if pastors refused to comply with the subpoena, they were threatened with arrest.
I personally believe that the development of the 501(c)3 status and the government forcing churches to apply and be approved for the status was a deliberate and vile acts of de facto government control over churches.
But we as Christians MUST get involved in the political process, regardless of the threats from politicians.
I believe churches for far too long have been silenced and told "politics is too dirty for Christians" or "Let's just keep politics and religion separate." But THIS is the reason why our government has continued to strip away our God-given rights. When Christians refuse to get involved in politics or are intimidated by politicians to stay out of politics, why would we be surprised when we end up with politicians who refuse to legislate based on our Christian beliefs?
I urge you to not only get involved in the political process but also get out and Vote this coming Tuesday, August 8th. Vote for the politicians who aren't afraid to face Church members like Chris McDaniel, not the ones threatening the churches. And after the election is over, stay involved in the process.
Christian music artist Warren Barfield said it best in his song "The Time is Now":
> I learned to walk in the ways of light and truth
> And I was told not to speak til I was spoken to
> I've seen somethings that a man just can't ignore
> And this world's gone see what I am standing for
> I've kept my peace, I can't hold my tongue anymore
> You can't buy my silence, you can't steal my voice
> You can't keep me quiet, I will bring the noise
> Try to beat me down, tell me to shut my mouth
> But there's a time to speak and the time is now.
[](https://substack.com/profile/135347872-steven-utroska)| A guest post by| [Steven Utroska](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e908bc4b-1cf7-4ec5-be35-e46ee97aed04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)MS Director State Freedom Caucus Network. Mississippi Native. Engineer. Platform purist. Partisan Hack Job. Laissez-faire. ₿. No king, but Christ.[Subscribe to Steven](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/534eedd8-5979-4b92-ab74-0914c48c6045?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zguk864ae9vsa331cjibr62s8mg2per6oq6ss488_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjieaor4c1h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z04uu7hd5s9p1v9e01qfvupane0s21l125mts1o8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjieaor4c1h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5vbb32cdkt28kb8k4fch69fn31toscbob4gbiu0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjieaor4c1h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvjfq8lgmtqao1ghaqg941vfs18nsp3bjpv3cle8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjieaor4c1h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: Team Daniels
subject: FW: Are you forgetting about someone?
body:
We've all been waiting for it, and yesterday Special Counsel Jack Smith announced the indictment of Donald Trump for his attempt to overturn the 2020 election.
Trump didn't act alone, and there are important questions yet to be answered about the role others played in the plot, especially the role of other elected officials.
Is Shamaine's opponent, Scott Perry, one of the unindicted co-conspirators referenced in the indictment? We don't know yet. Regardless, one thing is certain, we must raise awareness of the role Perry played, and we MUST defeat him next November.
Please take a moment to read the message below for more details.
- Team Daniels
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
Begin Forwarded Message:
As indictments are announced for Donald Trump over his attempt to overturn the 2020 election, it's important that we remember the key role Scott Perry played in that plot.
(This is NOT an email asking for donations)
https://www.politico.com/news/2023/08/01/trump-indictments-election-interference-key-players-00109050 [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/08/01/trump-indictments-election-interference-key-players-00109050]
Dear Friend,
Over the past two weeks I've been emailing to tell you why Scott Perry is the most dangerous member of Congress. With today's announcement of Donald Trump's impending indictments related to the attempted insurrection on January 6th, It's important to remind everyone of Perry's greatest hit - the central role he played in Trump's attempt to overturn the Presidential election.
Among the members of Congress who were complicit in trying to steal the 2020 election, Scott Perry stands out as a central figure in the plot. Notably, Perry was the key to the plan to install Trump sympathizer Jeffrey Clark as Attorney General in the run-up to January 6th. In 2022, Perry even had his phone seized by the FBI , and since then has been fighting in court to prevent investigators from accessing its contents.
Again, you don't have to take our word for it. From the Politico article:
"He's (Perry's) primarily known as the crucial connector between Trump and Clark. But he also texted with Meadows, a former House Freedom Caucus ally, about wild and false theories related to the CIA Director and European allies' purported efforts to manipulate the election."
( You can read the full article here [https://www.politico.com/news/2023/08/01/trump-indictments-election-interference-key-players-00109050] )
Among other things, Perry is an insurrectionist who played an active and central role in trying to overturn a free and fair election in the United States. he has no business serving in Congress, or any other place of public trust.
It is crucial that we defeat Scott Perry next year, but I am not going to excitedly ask you for a contribution. My team and I are working hard to build the strongest campaign possible. Regardless of where you live, we want you to be a part of our team and we are attempting to demonstrate in the most stark terms possible exactly what is at stake in this race.
To date, Scott Perry has managed to fly under the radar of the national press. Defeating him is going to require support from around the country, and we are asking you to help us spread the word about Perry and the danger he poses to our country.

name: Matthew Diemer via ActionNetwork.org
subject: This Tuesday is a big day
body:
| | | Dear Peter, With just under a week left until an important election on August 8th, I want to draw your attention to an issue that is of paramount significance for our democratic process. On this day, we, the people of Ohio, will have the opportunity to decide whether to maintain a simple majority in our democratic system, a principle that lies at the heart of our representative government. This election is not about party politics; it transcends partisan lines, with both Republicans and Democrats coming together to denounce it as a blatant power grab by the current GOP members of the state legislature in Columbus. It is a moment where we must stand united as concerned citizens and put the interests of the Ohio people above party affiliations. The current elected members of the Ohio Republican Party have shown a concerning lack of backbone. They prioritize party loyalty over the needs and wishes of the people they represent. Former Republican Governors and local republican candidates openly denounce Issue 1. However, current elected officials and hopefuls are willing to sacrifice the principles they claim to hold dear to maintain favor with the party, including my former opponent. It is disheartening to witness these elected officials selling out their fellow Ohioans for political expediency. Their allegiance to their party over the people is a betrayal of the very essence of democracy. We cannot allow this pattern to continue unchallenged. On August 8th, we have the opportunity to make our voices heard loud and clear. We must reject Issue 1, which seeks to undermine the power of the people in our democratic process. I implore you all to mark your calendars and head to the polls on August 8th to vote NO. Let's send a resounding message to those in power that we will not stand idly by while our democracy is undermined. Our united stand will serve as a reminder to these elected officials that they must represent the interests of the people, not their own party agendas. Thank you for your commitment to our shared values, and I look forward to standing alongside each and every one of you on August 8th as we vote to protect the future of our great state. Vote NO on August 8th! Warm regards,Matthew Diemer Find your polling location here: https://www.ohiosos.gov/elections/voters/toolkit/polling-location/

| Peter -
Dan Crenshaw is fighting for you against the far-left and working hard to advance the priorities you care about.
As Chairman of the Congressional Cartel Task Force, Dan is spearheading the effort to combat the Mexican drug cartels that are pumping deadly fentanyl into our country and killing Americans.
As a member of the Energy and Commerce Committee, Dan is protecting good-paying oil and gas jobs and is fighting back against radical environmentalists who want to destroy American energy independence.
And, despite the left's rabid attacks against his efforts, Dan is leading the fight to protect our children from the dangerous transgender ideology that is pushing sex changes for minors.
That's why the left is putting unprecedented resources into the fight for control of the House of Representatives. They know how effective Dan and the Republican Majority have been in prosecuting the case against the left's failures and providing better policy alternatives for the American people.
The Democrat machine is relying on big-money, liberal donors to fund their operations to take back the House. And they will do everything in their power to outraise and outspend us just as they have in the past.
That's why Dan needs your help. You've been a loyal supporter of Dan's, and it's more important now than ever before that you stay in this fight and give it everything you have.
[Please pitch in anything you can afford - $100, $50, $25, even $5 - to help Dan fight back against the radical left and ensure the House stays in Republican control.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001isRPBXkA-ZErpRPtldfYUbt6H8butpAqPpCxi4MEavYM0p2hERtQsWpBVYl_N23JxphdcimMjwzuUUAUlIsWXdg6oPmHW959albHhvSOdV6mhWRdhy52PT_tL6ZrvtR-EHbbLIi-GfkuakRN0xRc400FEktzQlO8w0fguwI30S1_IjV97GPKSF9PEhC92yDTE1sHyGph6vUjMMwz5mJrMGWs92n9RSfzCS8jdzMcDA9VbkSD_sW5SPsR7sLkJmvVW4GJhJtpJlv-W-MFYEexY7lCMNnG_Nry2aLM1cWHxoVQwYyWfsdUFQWNSQkgaY89P-Y6lf4tfyK5AUz7OoPYWXnjiNQ8eumOodJgQDZ0O-w=&c=omCZ4B_ua6D1BIGgJEDT_fucDdeK2TohXJQXqJjt0EjYMe7NeitpoQ==&ch=XMbpYuRlMCz4Tjb5thhTfVQ_Q8SH--K9azvmQJr_rIXBnJU_QQ5XaQ==) Every penny you send Dan will be put to immediate use in growing our conservative movement and growing our majority in Congress.
With your help and resources, we know we can win against the left, their allies in the press, and their big-money donors who want to take our country back to the failed agenda of complete Democrat-control of Washington.
Can Dan count on you to stay in this fight?

| | Friend,

---
I wanted you to hear this directly from me...

---
...**Biden’s Department of Justice has ONCE AGAIN INDICTED me – this time, over the events that took place on January 6th.**_
_
---
As you know, I did nothing wrong. It’s well-documented that I told Americans to act “PEACEFULLY” and discouraged the use of any violence.

---
This is nothing but an egregious act of Election Interference and a final act of desperation from Crooked Joe as he crashes in the polls.

---
The entire Biden Administration knows that I’m the _ONLY_ candidate who would defeat Crooked Joe in a free and fair election. They know how much support we have from the hardworking people of our country.

---
_**But more importantly, they know that I’m the only candidate who can dismantle the Deep State and end their stranglehold on our nation.**_

---
_So, their only hope is to try and send me to JAIL for the rest of my life._

---
A Soros-backed state prosecutor first tried to break us when he indicted and arrested me earlier this spring despite having committed no crime at all.

---
But when it became clear that his attack failed to break us, Crooked Joe summoned a federal prosecutor to INDICT me despite having committed no crime once again.

---
_**Now, they’re hoping that they’ve finally dealt the final blow by indicting me in the belly of the beast: Washington, D.C.**_

---
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they’re allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.

---
Their grip will close even tighter around _**YOU**_.

---
As I’ve always said, they’re not after me. They’re after YOU. I’m only standing in the way.

---
**And even after 3 indictments, I will continue to stand in their way, because the fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It’s not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well – and I will _NEVER_ let them take it from you.**

---
_If you’re doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day._

---
But if not, I don’t have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now.

---

But more importantly, they know that I’m the only candidate who can dismantle the Deep State and end their stranglehold on our nation. So, their only hope is to try and send me to JAIL for the rest of my life. A Soros-backed state prosecutor first tried to break us when he indicted and arrested me earlier this spring despite having committed no crime at all. But when it became clear that his attack failed to break us, Crooked Joe summoned a federal prosecutor to INDICT me despite having committed no crime once again. Now, they’re hoping that they’ve finally dealt the final blow by indicting me in the belly of the beast: Washington, D.C. If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they’re allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me. Their grip will close even tighter around YOU. As I’ve always said, they’re not after me. They’re after YOU. I’m only standing in the way. And even after 3 indictments, I will continue to stand in their way, because the fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It’s not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well – and I will NEVER let them take it from you. If you’re doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don’t have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za2smjo7u1gmrqn8h0idump7h8mpnt7rruapcts8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjie9oj4c9h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z10jl3ck9nscltrldkhbrmukvnci4qk1vcao3q10_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjie9oj4c9h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfh8stud6rg2ap6rokc0sk02qc86r24pr6sr66tg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjie9oj4c9h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za5nfeo9op1mkn2ibur06mojp4110ju9ho37i0ho_rp22sh2s8i66p70cjie9oj4c9h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

name: CPT Sam Brown
subject: My life in pictures.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
I want to tell you my story and why I chose to serve.

| | |
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663001%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cjzVR%2fqF6%2fY%2fxepOXANCDw&sysid=1)
---
Friend, My name is Sam Brown and **[I’m running for the U.S. Sen](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663002%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ocVxiggv8llY9vVHBVBsOA&sysid=1)[ate in Nevada](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663003%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2ff7q%2foDWRP5CaGxs61BJ3Q&sysid=1).** I’ll talk more about that in a minute, but first, I want to tell you my story and why I chose to serve.
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663001%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cjzVR%2fqF6%2fY%2fxepOXANCDw&sysid=1)
---
My father was the first to teach me about service. I was the first of five children in my family, and my dad worked hard everyday to provide for us, serving in the military. _He instilled this truth in us: One of the noblest things a person can do is serve their country._ In my teens, I knew that joining the military was something I’d like to do but I wasn’t all in. But after the 9/11 attacks, my desire to serve my country transformed from a desire to an ironclad resolve. Soon after 9/11, I applied to the U.S. Military academy at West Point. I graduated and was commissioned as an infantry officer and I answered the call from my country to fight in Afghanistan. **[Before we go any further, would you consider chipping in to help me accept the call to serve once again?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663004%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6LMwrHSS5knseMvRubTJwg&sysid=1)**
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663001%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cjzVR%2fqF6%2fY%2fxepOXANCDw&sysid=1)
---
Four months into my deployment, my life changed forever. It all happened in an instant. My team and I were on our way to provide support to an embattled platoon. On our way to the engagement zone, my team and I rolled over a roadside bomb. The explosion soaked me in diesel and flames ignited all over my body. My gunner was able to put out the flames and save my life. If I’d been on fire for another minute I wouldn’t be writing this message to you today.
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663001%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cjzVR%2fqF6%2fY%2fxepOXANCDw&sysid=1)
---
I was rushed back to a hospital in Texas where I’d undergo countless surgeries and 3 years of rehabilitation. I’m not telling you my story because I want you to pity me, or see me as a hero. I was injured while serving my country. I’m not the first and I’m not the last. Still, I consider myself to be blessed beyond measure. As I’ve learned through my life: God’s plans are greater than any man can conceive of. While recovering from my injuries, I met my wife Amy, and since then we’ve had 3 incredible children. **_As soon as I was able to, I got back to work._** Nothing taken for granted and not a second wasted. While working a warehouse job, I built a business that gave me the opportunity to continue to serve Americans: sprinting around the red tape and providing emergency pharmaceutical care to veterans outside of the Veterans Health Administration. **_Friend, if you help send me to the U.S. Senate, this is the exact attitude I will bring with me._** I will NEVER take your support for granted - and I won’t waste a second fighting to protect our country from the radical left.
---
[**Help Send CPT Brown to the Senate!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663015%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4uL%2f26dj3lgj09FqZTYZiA&sysid=1)
---
I wish I could take on the Democrat establishment on my own, and I wish I could beat their $100 million war chest by myself. **But the simple fact is that I can’t do this without YOUR support, Friend, If you can chip in anything today, I’d be grateful.** Duty First,
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663001%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cjzVR%2fqF6%2fY%2fxepOXANCDw&sysid=1)
---
CPT Sam Brown, U.S. Army (Ret.)
---

---

name: Mark Warner
subject: The Majority Project
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
we’re all in.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67463438/419794918/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWNhMDBjNi00MDMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4oATUP3eL2LRbVL4uQYUnvVjh8DSflqV6b_oetU3QEY=&emci=c5d08627-9f30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=01ca00c6-4031-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Last week, I wrote to you about Virginia Democrats’ new innovative early-voting campaign, the Majority Project. This campaign has been a long time coming. And when I say a long time coming, I don’t mean we’ve been planning this for just a few months. Our efforts to get people to sign up for early voting began last year, as soon as the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_. When we saw thousands of Virginians sign up to become permanent absentee voters so they’d automatically get a mail-in ballot every year, we knew we had to capitalize on this momentum. Thus, the Majority Project was born. And frankly, I can’t overstate how massive this effort is – it’s truly an all hands on deck situation. And boy oh boy, do we have a pretty incredible team, with over 100 dedicated paid organizers throughout the Commonwealth. We’re all ready to turn Virginia blue this November, but we need your help. __[**Can you support our early-voting campaign by splitting a $5 contribution with the Democratic Party of Virginia today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67463439/419794919/-115636117?refcode=mw_em_230802_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWNhMDBjNi00MDMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4oATUP3eL2LRbVL4uQYUnvVjh8DSflqV6b_oetU3QEY=)__ What we’re really trying to accomplish with the Majority Project is to make sure that every single person in Virginia has the information that they need to vote early. And we want to be sure that voters understand exactly how detrimental a Republican controlled General Assembly would be, especially when it comes to our reproductive rights and gun violence prevention. To make this happen, we’re transforming our ground game. While we continue to knock on doors and canvas throughout the state, we’re also utilizing new technology to identify key voters at community events and persuade them to cast their ballot early. And those 100 paid organizers I mentioned earlier? Every day, they’re in touch with field directors all across Virginia, so there’s a constant flow of communication about every single House and Senate race, allowing each district to support one another. So, Derek, here’s where you come in. My fellow Democrats and I are already on the road bringing the Majority Project to life – campaigning with Democrats by helping them make calls to voters and walk through our neighborhoods to discuss what’s on the ballot this year and get out the vote. But to continue this crucial work, we need this grassroots movement to give us everything you’ve got. __[**So I’m asking: Can you help us kick off the Majority Project on the right foot by donating anything you can? Your contribution is what allows this massive early-voting campaign to continue. Together, we can protect our Democratic majority in the Virginia Senate and take back the House of Delegates.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67463440/419794920/-115636117?refcode=mw_em_230802_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWNhMDBjNi00MDMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4oATUP3eL2LRbVL4uQYUnvVjh8DSflqV6b_oetU3QEY=)__ Let’s get it done. Thank you, Mark Warner ******[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67463441/419794921/-115636117?refcode=mw_em_230802_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWNhMDBjNi00MDMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4oATUP3eL2LRbVL4uQYUnvVjh8DSflqV6b_oetU3QEY=)******

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Join RFK, Jr. and farmers to revitalize our food, farms, and soil
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
It is my pleasure to invite you to join Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., for a free, online Roundtable on Transforming Food, Farming, and Soil Policy this Thursday, August 3 at 8pm EST

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=1)
---
Hello Peter, [](https://www.kennedy24.com/farm_policy_roundtable?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=2) It is my pleasure to invite you to join Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., for a free, online Roundtable on Transforming Food, Farming, and Soil Policy this Thursday, August 3 at 8pm EST / 5pm PST. | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/farm_policy_roundtable?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=3 "RSVP Today!") [RSVP Today!](https://www.kennedy24.com/farm_policy_roundtable?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=3)
---
Agriculture provides a pathway to human and global planetary health. Our wild and working landscapes–when stewarded harmoniously–provide oxygen and nutrient dense food, sequester carbon, and regulate the hydrological cycle which is earth’s air conditioning system, essential for climate resilience and mitigation.
America has much of the best agricultural soil on earth. Farmers and agriculture are a country’s economic backbone and yet they are struggling. For decades, America's farmers have been devastated by policies that have driven up farm debt and increased their vulnerability to climate change.
Fortunately, a new generation of farmers is focused on working with nature by rebuilding their soils using regenerative practices that increase biodiversity, improve their resilience to drought and floods, and increase on-farm profits.
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., is making agricultural policy a top priority to turn our nation's farms around. How will he do that? He'll start by learning from some of America's most innovative farmers–and you can join him in this learning.
**[Join us live on August 3](https://www.kennedy24.com/farm_policy_roundtable?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=4)** for Mr. Kennedy in conversation with **Ben Dobson** of Hudson Carbon in New York, **Reginaldo Haslett-Marroquin** of Tree Range Farms, Inc. in Minnesota, **John Kempf** of Advancing Eco Agriculture of Ohio, **Bob Quinn** of Quinn Farm & Ranch in Montana, **Judith McGeary** of Farm & Ranch Freedom Alliance in Texas, **Will Harris** of White Oak Pastures in Georgia, **Gail Fuller** of Fuller Farms in Kansas, **Kerry Hoffschneider** of The Graze Master Group in Nebraska, and **Wayne Swanson** of Swanson Family Farm in Georgia.
Together we will hear stories of heartbreak and success, loss and regeneration, as Mr. Kennedy charts a course for the revitalization of farming in America.
Land stewardship and farming hold the key to human and ecological security and a livable planet. Learn the exciting ways in which we can save ourselves while developing policies that support farmers.
**[Please RSVP](https://www.kennedy24.com/farm_policy_roundtable?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=5)** , mark your calendars, and join us LIVE on Thursday, August 3 at 8 p.m. EST/5 p.m. PST for this inspiring conversation!
**If you know someone passionate about farming, regenerative agriculture, or sustainable and healthy food, please share this email with them and encourage them to attend the online event!**
I look forward to seeing you and your friends on Thursday!
Elizabeth Kucinich
Regenerative Systems Advisor
Team Kennedy
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=6)[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=7)[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=8)[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=9)[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=10)[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=11)[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=12)[https://www.kennedy24.com/](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=13)
[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=14) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=15) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=16) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=farming_rountable_non_opens_2&n=17)
