name: VoteVets
subject: Important PACT Act information for Veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
The PACT Act deadline for receiving retroactive benefits hits on August 9th, just seven days from now
#
Derek —
Couple things here as we start August:
First, thank you so much for your support last month. We accomplished a TON, and couldn’t have done it without you.
Second, an important deadline for Veterans is approaching.
The PACT Act deadline for receiving retroactive benefits hits on August 9th, just seven days from now.
What that means is, if you are a Gulf War or Vietnam Veteran, or a post 9/11 Veteran, and may have a condition related to toxic exposure, you should file a claim – OR submit your intent to file a claim – ASAP.
You can find more information from the VA here:
**[PACT Act and your VA benefits](https://act.votevets.org/go/4135?t=1&akid=13893%2E3013755%2EaaTnGb)**
There are a number of reputable Veteran Service Organizations that will assist you with your claim, among them the VFW and Disabled American Veterans. If you contact any of them they’ll be able to help you out.
And if you need further help or have questions, feel free to respond to this email. We’ll try to get you the answers you need.
We worked incredibly hard to get this coverage, so it’s important that you take advantage of it. Too many Veterans didn’t get the chance.
Thanks again team, and make sure you get your benefits.
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=13893%2E3013755%2EaaTnGb).

name: Diana

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Please don't delay
Hey team -- It’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

With the 2024 elections heating up and the battle for Senate control at a fever pitch, we need to stay on top of our strategy. That’s why James Carville reached out and requested your input for an exclusive strategy interview.

**But he didn’t get an answer from you -- and now he's 17 responses short of what he needed in Pennsylvania!**

[**We NEED enough top Democrats like you to participate in this strategy interview to drive us to victory, but the deadline to respond is midnight tonight. Please, will you take 3 minutes and help us WIN? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230802-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230802-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11523%2E9716520%2EAB26t-)

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230802-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230802-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11523%2E9716520%2EAB26t-)
---

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data**_

Thank you for being a crucial part of our team,

Diana, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: James Carville
Date: Aug 1, 2023
Subject: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania...
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m real excited to hear from you.

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, click here to get started right now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230802-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230802-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11523%2E9716520%2EAB26t-)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230802-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230802-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11523%2E9716520%2EAB26t-)
---

I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate next year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewAugust/](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230802-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230802-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11523%2E9716520%2EAB26t-)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230802-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230802-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11523%2E9716520%2EAB26t-)
---

Thank you

\- James

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/14408?ask=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230802-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230802-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=11523%2E9716520%2EAB26t-)

Friend,
I wanted you to hear this directly from me...
...**Biden 's Department of Justice has ONCE AGAIN INDICTED me - this time, over the events that took place on January 6th.**
As you know, I did nothing wrong. It's well-documented that I told Americans to act "PEACEFULLY" and discouraged the use of any violence.
This is nothing but an egregious act of Election Interference and a final act of desperation from Crooked Joe as he crashes in the polls.
The entire Biden Administration knows that I'm the ONLY candidate who would defeat Crooked Joe in a free and fair election. They know how much support we have from the hardworking people of our country.
_**But more importantly, they know that I 'm the only candidate who can dismantle the Deep State and end their stranglehold on our nation.**_
So, their only hope is to try and send me to JAIL for the rest of my life.
A Soros-backed state prosecutor first tried to break us when he indicted and arrested me earlier this spring despite having committed no crime at all.
But when it became clear that his attack failed to break us, Crooked Joe summoned a federal prosecutor to INDICT me despite having committed no crime once again.
_**Now, they 're hoping that they've finally dealt the final blow by indicting me in the belly of the beast: Washington, D.C.**_
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU**.
As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way.
**And even after 3 indictments, I will continue to stand in their way, because the fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It 's not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well - and I will _NEVER_ let them take it from you.**
_If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day._
But if not, I don't have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now.

This is the THIRD ATTEMPT to destroy our movement. | | | Friend, I wanted you to hear this directly from me... ...Biden 's Department of Justice has ONCE AGAIN INDICTED me - this time, over the events that took place on January 6th. As you know, I did nothing wrong. It's well-documented that I told Americans to act "PEACEFULLY" and discouraged the use of any violence. This is nothing but an egregious act of Election Interference and a final act of desperation from Crooked Joe as he crashes in the polls. The entire Biden Administration knows that I'm the ONLY candidate who would defeat Crooked Joe in a free and fair election. They know how much support we have from the hardworking people of our country. But more importantly, they know that I 'm the only candidate who can dismantle the Deep State and end their stranglehold on our nation. So, their only hope is to try and send me to JAIL for the rest of my life. A Soros-backed state prosecutor first tried to break us when he indicted and arrested me earlier this spring despite having committed no crime at all. But when it became clear that his attack failed to break us, Crooked Joe summoned a federal prosecutor to INDICT me despite having committed no crime once again. Now, they 're hoping that they've finally dealt the final blow by indicting me in the belly of the beast: Washington, D.C. If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me. Their grip will close even tighter around YOU. As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way. And even after 3 indictments, I will continue to stand in their way, because the fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It 's not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well - and I will NEVER let them take it from you. If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don't have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | | Thank you, | Donald J. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: How we are winning hearts & minds for the conservative cause
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/affirmativeaction-11570940?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**The Mississippi Center for Public Policy started life thirty years ago. In that time, we have had some notable victories. **

**Last year, we won the battle to cut Mississippi’s state income tax to a flat 4 percent. The year before, we helped pass a law to combat Critical Race theory.** Shortly before that, we helped change the law to allow Charter Schools and more school choice.

**None of these wins would be possible without good communication. **It is only by campaigning effectively that we are able to popularize the case for change - and overcome liberal media bias.

Thirty years ago, great communications mostly meant good newspaper coverage. Today, we still get that. **So far this year, we have been featured 381 times in newspapers across the state – and 35 times in columns across the country.**
---
|
---
| **Our Saturday email is now opened & read over 150,000 times a month – and some months has been opened and read over 200,000 times.** To put that in perspective, when I sent out my very first Saturday email in early January 2021, it was read by fewer than 1,800 people.
---
|
---
| **When Riley Gaines, the swimmer, came to speak to us about women and sport, about 150 people were in the room. Since then, 1.8 million people across America have watched one of our videos of Riley’s talk at River Hills in Jackson. **Riley has become the national champion for women’s rights in sport standing up to those with a radical agenda.
---
|
---
| **There has long been a liberal bias in the media, but today it is explicit. Many media organizations have stopped even pretending that they are even-handed. **

We have built up a large online audience, on multiple different platforms. **We have found a way to overcome anti-conservative bias – and we believe we are winning the battle for hearts and minds as a result.**

I believe we are on course to become one of the more high-profile free market advocacy organizations in the southern United States.

**None of this would have happened without your support – thank you!**
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=baeecda044&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=c50b3943af) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=c50b3943af).

subject: ▶️ watch our campaign launch video!
body:
We've been working hard and are so excited to share it with you. |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter, we've been working hard on this...our team just released our official ** **CAMPAIGN LAUNCH VIDEO**** and we can't wait to share it with you.

In the video, titled "Meet Max Ukropina," I share my story about my upbringing here in OC, my family, my career, and why I'm running for Congress: to fight for the Orange County dream.

[_**Click here to watch our campaign launch video...**_](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=0a001fe8df&e=86e91e802d)
_[**Then please CLICK HERE to FORWARD our video to a friend so they can watch it too**](https://us21.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=50f4cef39b&e=86e91e802d)!_
---

---
| We both know that A LOT of voters in our community are frustrated with Washington, tired of career politicians, and hungry for a new generation of leadership in Orange County.

To win this election, we need to reach as many of them as possible. This video is the latest step in our grassroots campaign to do just that.

[**__If you forward our video to even just one friend, you will have a HUGE impact helping us expand our network of supporters.__**](https://us21.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=50f4cef39b&e=86e91e802d)

Hope you enjoy the video, and see you out on the campaign trail!

Max Ukropina

name: News Alert via Courier Newsroom
subject: Fox News is helping Donald Trump spread misinformation again.
body:
Let’s be clear, Peter: there would be no January 6th without Fox News.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1317%2E120351%2EI_vOpT)
Peter —
Last night Donald Trump was indicted for a third time by Special Counsel Jack Smith — this time, for his plot to overturn the 2020 election.
Despite the gravity of the charges, **Fox News went all in on defending Trump:**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230802?refcode=em20230802&amount=5&refcode2=1317_120351_I_vOpT&akid=1317%2E120351%2EI_vOpT)
**Let’s be clear, Peter: there would be no January 6th without Fox News.**
In the days following the 2020 Election, Fox News was central to spreading Trump's Big Lie, including pushing the 'fake electors' scheme that is a key part of this latest federal indictment.
With Trump as the runaway favorite to win the Republican nomination, it's clear Fox News is ready to do it all over again. By smearing the justice system and the investigation with lies and misinformation, they’re helping Trump win in the court of public opinion while bringing higher ratings to their network.
**Here is the good news, Peter. This time, we’re ready to fight back.**
[**2024 is an unprecedented election and Courier Newsroom will be there every step of the way to correct the record in key battleground states where Donald Trump and Fox News’ election lies could take hold. Will you chip in $5 now to power our news teams and help us stop bad information?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230802?refcode=em20230802&amount=5&refcode2=1317_120351_I_vOpT&akid=1317%2E120351%2EI_vOpT)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230802?refcode=em20230802&amount=5&refcode2=1317_120351_I_vOpT&akid=1317%2E120351%2EI_vOpT)**
Thank you,
Courier Newsroom
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1317_120351_I_vOpT&akid=1317%2E120351%2EI_vOpT)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1317%2E120351%2EI_vOpT)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

clean_body: Republicans across the nation are working tirelessly to keep control of the Virginia House. We’re calling on all of our grassroots donors to help Democrats flip control. | | | | | The results of this November's elections in Virginia will determine the path our country takes for years to come. That’s why Hillary Clinton is calling on grassroots Democrats, including you, to make a difference: For the past two years, our Democratic majority in the state Senate has acted as a barrier against Virginia Republicans' dangerous agenda. But we risk losing this essential check on GOP power if Democrats are defeated this November. Virginia Republicans have already rolled back voting rights, and their proposed budget favors tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. If the GOP flips the state Senate and keeps control of the House, abortion rights could be first up on the chopping block. Their far-right governor has already endorsed plans to threaten abortion doctors with jail time – it's horrible. The stakes are high, and we cannot afford to lose. This team has stepped up time and time again to help drive our mission forward, so we know you'll come through this year, too. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you for everything. House Democrats are:

– Bringing manufacturing jobs back home
– Investing in our communities and keeping Americans safe
– Protecting Social Security and Medicare benefits for our seniors

We will continue to build upon the work that has been done to move America forward – not from the top down, but from the middle out and the bottom up.

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Protect Your Bank Account with THESE 3 Simple Steps
body:
United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide

| | | | | Dear Reader, Starting as soon as a few months from now, the United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide. It will give them unprecedented powers to control your bank account. They could closely track every transaction. They could even freeze it. Unless you protect yourself today. Fortunately, there are [3 simple steps](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b30c61752bb455a954360b186ddda56&_e=uihhFWur7GGDSwsdb8kjY8fz3Pwg5MwHS6V1Bqds5mGBqS1YgYQ1jsA6XKGb8SRch79q0q1Mu0UJ3uy1hlPV-OHUCBjXnYnL1D2MFv9d4tTLxscHIe-EipFgxTySPOsHyfl1HQ2-FRhK4qt2XLkbdm-MulQJUGK14sjBvEDVVMkWusHHYS8L7oiDuASQ1wknvG2FTELrPqvSpoIrcwEy8enaHVOq0vmIvq3_rixJs-fXLwsqxP8OEhDykjCxLJAIDTCDJMgej-XDuP9E6PMa7Q%3D%3D) you can take to safeguard your savings. [Discover these 3 simple steps here.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b30c61752bb455a954360b186ddda56&_e=uihhFWur7GGDSwsdb8kjY8fz3Pwg5MwHS6V1Bqds5mGBqS1YgYQ1jsA6XKGb8SRch79q0q1Mu0UJ3uy1hlPV-OHUCBjXnYnL1D2MFv9d4tTLxscHIe-EipFgxTySPOsHNcyeZgsoxqI490pfi6apgQuXpAh3nGflSUmIhiuWh85OI32RJwRYY_YuyKxaXtFQ-6tgpS9dG8W9E8-nGd__GsRxt0sucG3x3mHAipNqooO5HsRrUUReDehz94Dn71WM88UMMe9lYXqqlvLZop_ewA%3D%3D) Good luck and God bless! |

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Protect Your Bank Account with THESE 3 Simple Steps
body:
United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide

| | | | | Dear Reader, Starting as soon as a few months from now, the United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide. It will give them unprecedented powers to control your bank account. They could closely track every transaction. They could even freeze it. Unless you protect yourself today. Fortunately, there are [3 simple steps](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=920c7b7c806340e1b12a217b57e5f636&_e=I5wR6Go4xiJcyEko2Bj4vXTBkcrW_w1dTdSX50iptwyc08nss9OW_FkMloZ65RPDIuOOQu8jHK3O6IwmmmhB_O-E7zXZAowsRk0uOmbH67qZIRVjaWSu2znr4CN-uvO_4eKGQvnBFQRrF08sgnSF2gLXkSqHAQ0B1oG49LQmKGa3ThXcNq2v4pjGtdPlI82e1jJJZV0W1f92lGWG2BKG1VvdbvFYoXUTQEQB8LussuWmhNu4pXpOdiXVDUybrZLeSk9VuO77TNQQN15ygUhtzg%3D%3D) you can take to safeguard your savings. [Discover these 3 simple steps here.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=920c7b7c806340e1b12a217b57e5f636&_e=I5wR6Go4xiJcyEko2Bj4vXTBkcrW_w1dTdSX50iptwyc08nss9OW_FkMloZ65RPDIuOOQu8jHK3O6IwmmmhB_O-E7zXZAowsRk0uOmbH67qZIRVjaWSu2znr4CN-uvO_AnoFugzu0HIEIQ8sze0HJX3manRzE1fEc_Yy6gbQerDQnGh8cK9d5Nd8zJbcLMKXaQE2qXv1sxI5njOC3YjAZ8s5yd3LAYZBu0PPafPRHYeQihUrirywlRitbSR0VRVbr1nA2B4L9ryt2LDJVQxsOA%3D%3D) Good luck and God bless! |

body:
Your generosity helps me advocate for the issues that matter most to our region, and I'm honored to be serving you in Congress every day.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67469378/419816910/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzhkNzhiODMtNGMzMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=x3y7k8Wju2b6i-BPTW7VZF_-sXP4TB-z9rGgSCTWpRs=&emci=d5c47f47-3a31-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=38d78b83-4c31-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Peter, I wanted to take a moment to say THANK YOU.

Thanks to your unwavering commitment, we reached our fundraising goal for the month of July! Your contributions and the collective efforts of our team are a direct representation of the strength of our people-powered movement as we continue to forge ahead.

Your generosity helps me advocate for the issues that matter most to our region, and I'm honored to be serving you in Congress every day. **Your belief in our cause inspires me to roll up my sleeves and fight tirelessly for our shared values and aspirations.**

Without supporters like you, none of our progress would be possible. _Together, we are making a real difference in our region and beyond!_

As always, it's an honor to represent you,

Derek

Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.

and we’re tired of no one HOLDING Biden accountable.

subject: Urgent Call to Action: Sign to Combat Climate Change!

Peter, the fight for LGBTQ+ rights and equality has come under attack as Republican extremist state legislatures have passed a record number of anti-LGBTQ+ legislations.
We cannot remain silent while the rights of the LGBTQ+ community are threatened.
To make matters worse, corporations like AT&T, UPS, Comcast, Home Depot, and General Electric are contributing to the problem by donating millions to politicians who actively work against LGBTQ+ rights. Such actions are unacceptable and a direct attack on the LGBTQ+ community's right to exist. If you agree, add your name now! [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-stand-against-corporate-donations-to-anti-lgbtq-politicians-3/?source=20230710antiLGBTQpoliticians_BAA&referrer=group-blue-amp-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fyyz_ja%3Frefcode%3Dbaa_antilgbtqcorporatedonationja2307%26amount%3D15]
Add Your Name! [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-stand-against-corporate-donations-to-anti-lgbtq-politicians-3/?source=20230710antiLGBTQpoliticians_BAA&referrer=group-blue-amp-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fyyz_ja%3Frefcode%3Dbaa_antilgbtqcorporatedonationja2307%26amount%3D15]
As allies and advocates, we must hold these corporations accountable. It is not enough for them to wave the rainbow flag during Pride month while simultaneously funding politicians who seek to roll back hard-won LGBTQ+ rights.
Join us in demanding that corporations stop funding hate and start investing in love and acceptance. Sign the petition now to stand against corporate anti-LGBTQ+ donations and support the rights and equality of all. About BlueAmp Action:
We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world.
We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits.
And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t.
When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.
Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.
So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia.
Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

In a groundbreaking revelation, exclusive documentation has been obtained that exposes the California GOP's clandestine efforts to modify the bylaws governing the Presidential delegation process in the state.

The evidence implicates key figures within the California GOP, including Chairwoman Jessica Patterson, RNC national committee woman Harmeet Dhillon, and committee man Shawn Steel.

This disclosure sheds light on the secretive maneuvers within the California GOP leadership and their potential impact on the upcoming presidential election.

name: Gabrielle Fink
subject: Thank you!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=399%2E552475%2EgTmp59)
Hi Peter, it’s Gaby, Bob’s digital director.
**I want to personally reach out to thank you for being on this team!** 💙 Your support will help ensure we have the resources to re-elect Bob Casey and defend our Democratic Senate majority.
As the person in charge of all things digital, I can tell you that online donations really add up — and your generosity will help Bob keep serving Pennsylvania and improving the lives of working families across our Commonwealth and throughout the country.
Another great thing about being on our online team is you can share your thoughts with us directly. **That’s why I want to plug our ongoing 2024 Priorities Survey!**
**[Will you take a second to answer Team Casey’s one-question priorities survey? Your opinion matters to our whole team.](https://go.bobcasey.com/survey/2024-priorities-survey/?source=em20230802-1&akid=399%2E552475%2EgTmp59)**
**[Take Our Survey ››](https://go.bobcasey.com/survey/2024-priorities-survey/?source=em20230802-1&akid=399%2E552475%2EgTmp59)**
Thanks as always for showing your support, Peter!
Gabrielle Fink
Digital Director, Bob Casey for Senate

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=399%2E552475%2EgTmp59)

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=399%2E552475%2EgTmp59)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

Peter, we wanted to take a moment to wish President Obama a happy and healthy 62nd birthday – and we hope you'll join us!
**President Obama's tireless work and sacrifices for progress gave us the foundation that we have today. **

He took the first steps toward reforming our badly broken health care system, opposed and challenged the gun lobby, was our _first_ president to openly support same-sex marriage, and was a fierce advocate of reproductive health.
Peter, President Obama continues to be an inspiration for the Black community and fighters for progress alike – and we couldn't let this day go by without honoring him and his lasting legacy.
**We put together this card to send over to him on his birthday, and we invite you to add your name. We're hoping to have 5,000 signatures before midnight tomorrow, so please:**
**[Will you join me in wishing President Obama a happy birthday by signing our card to him?!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67471448/419824287/748454251?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1148-su-nd&refcode=jtk1148-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzNmNDUwNy00ZjMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lI837ApjlIkIUMjeHx7XsogntT0fzvMfyOwknINn_sI=&emci=44c4b9b9-aa30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=f73f4507-4f31-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Uncovering the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning.**_

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. clean_body: The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable | | | | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority. The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is damning. But here 's the thing: When the Clintons went after Trump... When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump... When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump... And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump... They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES. Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. "Can my colleagues and I count on you?" | | | | | | Democrats' dark money dollars are pouring in to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. subject: We did it, team

body:
Team, I just got off the phone with my finance team, and I’m _thrilled_ to let you know we absolutely crushed our first end-of-month fundraising goal.

The outpouring of support is remarkable. I can’t thank you enough for stepping up when we need you to bring real change for everyday people in the lower Hudson Valley.

We’ve still got a long road ahead, and Kevin McCarthy and his GOP allies are all eyes on this race. Rest assured, as one of the most competitive races in the country, they’ll spare no expense to hold this seat, keep their slim Republican majority in the House, and continue to push a far-right agenda.

But I beat the odds the first time with a powerful grassroots team behind me, and your show of support for our first end-of-month fundraiser proves we can do it again.

Please know, every action you take—no matter how big or small—builds our movement and gets us closer to the finish line to deliver a better, brighter, and more equitable future for all.

Thanks again,

Mondaire

I pulled out all the stops - texting, emailing, begging - and we still failed. I'm really unsure what's going to happen next, but I'm sure of one thing: there's no way we can retake the Senate majority or the White House if we don't have support from patriots like you. Every single patriot and every single dollar counts, so please be sure to make your impact NOW! | I'll even do you one better. Your donation will have a 1000% impact. You can't pass up this opportunity. Please make a difference in the next few minutes. Thanks again, JD Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. # Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America

Donald J. Trump August 1st, 2023
**Bedminster, NJ —** President Donald J. Trump is proud to receive additional key endorsements from Ohio, a perennial bellwether state that President Trump carried by over 8% in the 2016 and 2020 Presidential elections.
A recent survey showed President Trump with a commanding 52% lead in the Ohio Presidential primary election. In the survey, President Trump earned 64%, as his nearest competitor, Vivek Ramaswamy, polled at 12%. Ron DeSantis received 9%.
President Trump looks forward to expanding his movement across Ohio to compete for and earn the support of Ohio's Delegates to the Republican National Convention and to win Ohio’s Presidential election for a third time next November.
**U.S. Representative Bill Johnson (OH-06):** “Prior to COVID coming ashore from China, the American economy was booming and everyday goods were affordable; we had the best economy we’d had in nearly 5 decades; nearly every American was paying less in taxes; we were energy independent for the first time in 70-years; we were feared by global adversaries and trusted by our friends and allies; and, we were finally getting a handle on security at our southern border. Now, prices are high everywhere; energy prices have skyrocketed; hostile regimes and actors are on the move; and our security at home is weakened because of the non-enforcement of our immigration laws. America simply cannot continue down this dangerous and reckless path chosen by Joe Biden and his extremist administration. It's time to return to the America First, common-sense policies of the first-term of President Donald Trump, and that's why I am pleased to endorse him in 2024.”
**U.S. Representative Troy Balderson (OH-12):** “President Trump has a commanding lead among Ohio voters because they remember the record low unemployment, energy independence, and secure borders during his presidency. President Trump was there for me in my campaign for Congress and I am there for him in 2024.”
**Ohio Treasurer Robert Sprague:** “Under President Trump’s leadership, our nation’s economy was strong, we were achieving energy independence, our allies respected us and our enemies feared us. Things have changed a lot in just a few short years. America is again in need of a strong leader who is battle-tested and able to conquer the many obstacles facing the American people under Joe Biden’s administration.”
These America First conservatives join additional Ohio leaders in support of President Trump:
**U.S. Senator J.D. Vance (OH):** “In Mr. Trump’s four years in office, he started no wars despite enormous pressure from his own party and even members of his own administration...But Mr. Trump did more than simply keep the peace. He brokered the Abraham Accords, a historic agreement between Israel and Sunni Arab states providing the best hope of a long-term counterbalance to Iran. He began the long, slow process of decoupling the U.S. from its economic reliance on China. He opened diplomatic talks with North Korea after a half century of stagnation. And he pushed hard—to much derision—for Europe to take more responsibility for its own defense, precisely so that the U.S. wouldn’t be drawn so deeply and dangerously into a conflict like the one in Ukraine...Donald Trump’s presidency marked the first real disruption to a failed consensus and the terrible consequences it wrought...But there is much more to do, and I’m supporting him for president in 2024 because he’s the only person certain to do it.”[[1]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#_ftn1)
**U.S. Representative Jim Jordan (OH-04):** “No one has demonstrated that they will do what they said and get things done like he did, and he did it with everyone in that town against him. And that's what I still respect about President Trump, and I'm for him all the way”[[2]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#_ftn2)
**U.S. Representative Mike Carey (OH-15):** “With President Trump back in the White House, I have no doubt that America will rise from these crises and become great again. I completely endorse President Trump’s campaign and look forward to serving the American people under his leadership.”[[3]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#_ftn3)
**U.S. Representative Max Miller (OH-07):** “Donald J. Trump’s Presidency led to a strong and prosperous America. Adversaries feared our military, new alliances formed, there was peace in the Middle East, our economy was humming, and America was confidently leading. Contrast that with America today and the choice to endorse Donald Trump for President is easy. He has my full support, and I will do everything I can to deliver Ohio for President Trump once again.”[[4]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#_ftn4)
**Ohio Secretary of State Frank LaRose:** “President Trump has been one of the most relentless and resilient warriors in American politics. His enemies, foreign and domestic, will stop at nothing in their attempt to keep him from winning this race. I learned in the Army that when you’re headed into battle, you want to be led by someone who’s both fearless and feared. We’re in a battle for the heart and soul of our nation, and President Trump is that leader.”[[5]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#_ftn5)

**U.S. Senate candidate Bernie Moreno:** “Under then-President Donald Trump, America became a net energy exporter for the first time in 75 years, had a secure border, was respected on the world stage, and had a booming economy...Trump put America first by cutting taxes, ending needless regulations, and fighting for fairer trade deals...Trump delivered peace in the Middle East through the Abraham Accords, stood up to China on trade, kept us out of new wars, and began the process of responsibly withdrawing from Afghanistan...At the end of the day, I care more about actions, and Trump’s actions made us stronger, safer, and more prosperous...Ohioans know deep down that none of the disasters we are facing under Biden would have happened if Trump were sitting in the Oval Office. For that reason, he has my full and unequivocal support for president in 2024...Our country needs him back in the White House.”[[6]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#_ftn6)

clean_body: Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | ---|---|--- | | | | | ---|---|--- Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump August 1st, 2023 Bedminster, NJ — President Donald J. Trump is proud to receive additional key endorsements from Ohio, a perennial bellwether state that President Trump carried by over 8% in the 2016 and 2020 Presidential elections. A recent survey showed President Trump with a commanding 52% lead in the Ohio Presidential primary election. In the survey, President Trump earned 64%, as his nearest competitor, Vivek Ramaswamy, polled at 12%. Ron DeSantis received 9%. President Trump looks forward to expanding his movement across Ohio to compete for and earn the support of Ohio's Delegates to the Republican National Convention and to win Ohio’s Presidential election for a third time next November. U.S. Representative Bill Johnson (OH-06): “Prior to COVID coming ashore from China, the American economy was booming and everyday goods were affordable; we had the best economy we’d had in nearly 5 decades; nearly every American was paying less in taxes; we were energy independent for the first time in 70-years; we were feared by global adversaries and trusted by our friends and allies; and, we were finally getting a handle on security at our southern border. Now, prices are high everywhere; energy prices have skyrocketed; hostile regimes and actors are on the move; and our security at home is weakened because of the non-enforcement of our immigration laws. America simply cannot continue down this dangerous and reckless path chosen by Joe Biden and his extremist administration. It's time to return to the America First, common-sense policies of the first-term of President Donald Trump, and that's why I am pleased to endorse him in 2024.” U.S. Representative Troy Balderson (OH-12): “President Trump has a commanding lead among Ohio voters because they remember the record low unemployment, energy independence, and secure borders during his presidency. President Trump was there for me in my campaign for Congress and I am there for him in 2024.” Ohio Treasurer Robert Sprague: “Under President Trump’s leadership, our nation’s economy was strong, we were achieving energy independence, our allies respected us and our enemies feared us. Things have changed a lot in just a few short years. America is again in need of a strong leader who is battle-tested and able to conquer the many obstacles facing the American people under Joe Biden’s administration.” These America First conservatives join additional Ohio leaders in support of President Trump: U.S. Senator J.D. Vance (OH): “In Mr. Trump’s four years in office, he started no wars despite enormous pressure from his own party and even members of his own administration...But Mr. Trump did more than simply keep the peace. He brokered the Abraham Accords, a historic agreement between Israel and Sunni Arab states providing the best hope of a long-term counterbalance to Iran. He began the long, slow process of decoupling the U.S. from its economic reliance on China. He opened diplomatic talks with North Korea after a half century of stagnation. And he pushed hard—to much derision—for Europe to take more responsibility for its own defense, precisely so that the U.S. wouldn’t be drawn so deeply and dangerously into a conflict like the one in Ukraine...Donald Trump’s presidency marked the first real disruption to a failed consensus and the terrible consequences it wrought...But there is much more to do, and I’m supporting him for president in 2024 because he’s the only person certain to do it.”[[1]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#ftn1) U.S. Representative Jim Jordan (OH-04): “No one has demonstrated that they will do what they said and get things done like he did, and he did it with everyone in that town against him. And that's what I still respect about President Trump, and I'm for him all the way”[[2]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#ftn2) U.S. Representative Mike Carey (OH-15): “With President Trump back in the White House, I have no doubt that America will rise from these crises and become great again. I completely endorse President Trump’s campaign and look forward to serving the American people under his leadership.”[[3]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#ftn3) U.S. Representative Max Miller (OH-07): “Donald J. Trump’s Presidency led to a strong and prosperous America. Adversaries feared our military, new alliances formed, there was peace in the Middle East, our economy was humming, and America was confidently leading. Contrast that with America today and the choice to endorse Donald Trump for President is easy. He has my full support, and I will do everything I can to deliver Ohio for President Trump once again.”[[4]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#ftn4) Ohio Secretary of State Frank LaRose: “President Trump has been one of the most relentless and resilient warriors in American politics. His enemies, foreign and domestic, will stop at nothing in their attempt to keep him from winning this race. I learned in the Army that when you’re headed into battle, you want to be led by someone who’s both fearless and feared. We’re in a battle for the heart and soul of our nation, and President Trump is that leader.”[[5]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#ftn5) U.S. Senate candidate Bernie Moreno: “Under then-President Donald Trump, America became a net energy exporter for the first time in 75 years, had a secure border, was respected on the world stage, and had a booming economy...Trump put America first by cutting taxes, ending needless regulations, and fighting for fairer trade deals...Trump delivered peace in the Middle East through the Abraham Accords, stood up to China on trade, kept us out of new wars, and began the process of responsibly withdrawing from Afghanistan...At the end of the day, I care more about actions, and Trump’s actions made us stronger, safer, and more prosperous...Ohioans know deep down that none of the disasters we are facing under Biden would have happened if Trump were sitting in the Oval Office. For that reason, he has my full and unequivocal support for president in 2024...Our country needs him back in the White House.”[[6]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#ftn6) * [[1]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#ftnref1) "" [[2]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#ftnref2) [[3]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#ftnref3) "" [[4]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#ftnref4) "" [[5]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#ftnref5) "" [[6]](applewebdata://E7B884C3-DC91-4D7E-BA3F-22F3B39C0C88#ftnref6) "" | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- We are up against the FAKE NEWS media, their Democrat Partners, and Big Tech who all want to see us FAIL. We need to do whatever it takes to get the TRUTH out. Thank you, Donald J Trump 45th President of the United States P.S. Text TRUMP to 88022 to receive direct updates from yours truly. I'll be sending a text soon, so don't wait. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. body:
The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable

| |

| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning.**_

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. _**[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d3125733c364ab08d5935b800c962e0&_e=MPUxm3wPX6Z-9YBE2AeXzYNeNx29ksnOnm_N8NtEszl-2GG9l7C5ZDiOtReEXQsg2I31h94Q4Qvp80eF5s8Ntl7z66nJSmWP9sgdGLLu02Vx3n4MqiCcsEygpEcipvMF7EK-DLJkl-VnJtUYOrDFOOuAGf-Yn77HweXvJHGuJh7-bUXC0ek4CxoaFA5kJKY57ifvoRFdvLSnOUsfYl_AHHRtHgcACWiNIYUaw1ZFnTWuNi6OOWPqEyTm1Q9XVM7nHGHHdPINC227xBnGd0FZzWWuTjEd5KTOrdEE1m95SS1DfCVX58DLc2euFF1GHoez9yHoaOTM-2Bk96tEyWB_7Dq0g6bOA5JUAox9IcV1422FqqnSM8IYkUbnRviOSxoiK0pynk9kx50xkseHAGrMl-PFekRBpiW-rzX7T_Q6Ksk6U8jTkeyjht5gUwNkmzuKWQXcFiAqj-DpchImDPhw3w%3D%3D "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**_

clean_body: The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable | | | | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority. The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is damning. But here 's the thing: When the Clintons went after Trump... When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump... When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump... And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump... They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES. Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. "Can my colleagues and I count on you?" | | | | | | Democrats' dark money dollars are pouring in to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. "PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:" | | | | | | Thank you for your time and support, Kevin McCarthy | | * | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Now the question is: What do we do about it?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67472675/419829158/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWM2YWQwNDItNTMzMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zrFMJCiqBwFGC3ydsg1bbGgs57LnMFAWOVGTt5OtbWQ=) Team –

The climate crisis is here. The record heat and difficult water issues we face should end any question about it: Arizona is ground zero for the climate crisis. [**I joined NBC 12 Sunday Square Off to discuss just that – check out the clip:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67472676/419829159/1273604259?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.02_b1_ac_all&amount=3&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWM2YWQwNDItNTMzMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zrFMJCiqBwFGC3ydsg1bbGgs57LnMFAWOVGTt5OtbWQ=) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67472677/419829160/1273604259?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.02_b1_ac_all&amount=3&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWM2YWQwNDItNTMzMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zrFMJCiqBwFGC3ydsg1bbGgs57LnMFAWOVGTt5OtbWQ=) If you believe in the urgency of tackling the climate crisis and want to see real change in Arizona and beyond, I humbly ask for your support. **Together, we can make a difference and secure a sustainable future for generations to come.** My campaign relies on the generosity and dedication of people like you who are passionate about fighting for the future of our planet.

**[Your contribution, no matter the size, will play a crucial role in driving progress and ensuring that Arizona remains at the forefront of the fight against climate change. Your $3, $30, or more will directly support our efforts to bring about positive change.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67472678/419829161/1273604259?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.02_b1_ac_all&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWM2YWQwNDItNTMzMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zrFMJCiqBwFGC3ydsg1bbGgs57LnMFAWOVGTt5OtbWQ=)**

I spent nearly a decade as the CEO of an environmentally-focused alternative to the Big Banks, empowering people to combat climate change through their financial decisions. We helped millions of people take on Big Oil by moving their money. We planted over 100 million trees around the world – including right here in Phoenix. Now, as a candidate for Congress, I am committed to continuing this fight on a larger scale with your support.

This big threat also presents a big opportunity that I know we can tackle. _**Arizona can be THE Solar State.**_ We can be for clean energy what Detroit is to cars or Silicon Valley is to computers. We can fight climate change and improve the economy and create jobs in Arizona at the same time.

Your support can make a meaningful impact on the course of our state's future. Join me in this critical endeavor by contributing to my campaign for Congress. Together, we can lead the charge in building a sustainable and prosperous tomorrow. Thank you for standing with me in the battle against the climate crisis. | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67472679/419829162/1273604259?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.02_b1_ac_all&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWM2YWQwNDItNTMzMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zrFMJCiqBwFGC3ydsg1bbGgs57LnMFAWOVGTt5OtbWQ=)

Thank you,

– Andrei

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=53a2ff5738e446848304c1a293b22d44&_e=KptkhxBvb77PIc-9iQTf2LMjPOO-K7xNm2BH-gpF2B-QR_2W0rnG7r6xx4lL8Vga6MVBqDKhcTXRUf2KKA2RLdPjl6AHtPfXTO1awMFHYNIgeDxwHNLi6HvrjpmflmHMd6hE623ROFCHJ_4tpo8mQ3kxR2ysIG-i3dapxPhbWN1Yu1vxIHKoZ-98tBGqHmyz4FG1_bXVFrBcrOYmA7od6r_tqnIgg9ryGdrOmsdVw0v_B1kNCMlgt40IIdvTR2OkCSFK02bKkBI6m1rTsxcoi2en0mUzfXBO5mv5CVLRUVVT8wR-ugFXY8F6M8nQcL4NxwsSRpdTS1703C9LkQAyQpdCYVaZ_3tFH2OqxrI3ZUC39Z4j2H6q1iPiQtMHS1LoAQWBCz9ioczfadQQS1ton_SU7kXyhv96mLm6zbeDYeg%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=53a2ff5738e446848304c1a293b22d44&_e=KptkhxBvb77PIc-9iQTf2LMjPOO-K7xNm2BH-gpF2B-QR_2W0rnG7r6xx4lL8Vga6MVBqDKhcTXRUf2KKA2RLdPjl6AHtPfXTO1awMFHYNIgeDxwHNLi6HvrjpmflmHMd6hE623ROFCHJ_4tpo8mQ3kxR2ysIG-i3dapxPhbWN1Yu1vxIHKoZ-98tBGqHmyz4FG1_bXVFrBcrOYmA7od6r_tqnIgg9ryGdrOmsdVw0v_B1kNCMlgt40IIdvTR2OkCSFK02bKkBI6m1rTsxcoi5aqol40z1JDnFyiwn9b_W6Mti9arvqmsMk4zEsmxMiml2ED_kdIeW36pfBN8_PT35hOSg8ZtPbCcmqFsJxrBO9m-wIJnzka4r4aaR2itkVfDqUTH6kGJUNths7Knm42A1JFxN5HTsbRhaZ7HUh0q2Y%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=53a2ff5738e446848304c1a293b22d44&_e=KptkhxBvb77PIc-9iQTf2LMjPOO-K7xNm2BH-gpF2B-QR_2W0rnG7r6xx4lL8Vga6MVBqDKhcTXRUf2KKA2RLdPjl6AHtPfXTO1awMFHYNIgeDxwHNLi6HvrjpmflmHMd6hE623ROFCHJ_4tpo8mQ3kxR2ysIG-i3dapxPhbWN1Yu1vxIHKoZ-98tBGqHmyz4FG1_bXVFrBcrOYmA7od6r_tqnIgg9ryGdrOmsdVw0v_B1kNCMlgt40IIdvTR2OkCSFK02bKkBI6m1rTsxcoi35HXufGN9n-U_Ytf7rp6VhMcNwArQiJGidoQdSRzO3nAt52A0ugaMBO9swbDPUTOomiorGuW5J1dDj1Y3xVY6M__Nej73yUV7VMZVhTFm4-4E0t-ufoOeH6J-0R2syR2CABjtz5Wi9MlGYqGAn-33I%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=53a2ff5738e446848304c1a293b22d44&_e=KptkhxBvb77PIc-9iQTf2LMjPOO-K7xNm2BH-gpF2B-QR_2W0rnG7r6xx4lL8Vga6MVBqDKhcTXRUf2KKA2RLdPjl6AHtPfXTO1awMFHYNIgeDxwHNLi6HvrjpmflmHMd6hE623ROFCHJ_4tpo8mQ3kxR2ysIG-i3dapxPhbWN1Yu1vxIHKoZ-98tBGqHmyz4FG1_bXVFrBcrOYmA7od6r_tqnIgg9ryGdrOmsdVw0v_B1kNCMlgt40IIdvTR2OkCSFK02bKkBI6m1rTsxcoi0vamuk0uGije9k3AUTCvz0KM2UU6miQYhIgh_H4amaJ1PSYZBlVOMMrLQvgCIHePUgWtpyJoVm6xzfJS--NBwdFZcZYDq6j8WmXoGlDw7pzu0LqCg1lBr8VEigaVWyiNRzM_j3evwFPOo_CtRsP6mI%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=38fc0d2fef8a4e4990eb88e1d55deb07&_e=nLQXyQshGcpwo9eALEpU6t30OPWUj5cnfx-4BTwsBOOk32qUr9yL3LD-wCeSUYPC_GGtu1K0sOqOsXNRbHhGgEqmxIqkkcDZSES9x1XkvHwEGQ2HIrUfqZRV3lB3-CEZWoJ6cEyvzEaJ-JHt1NNUjxduqaCMyctvlSIsxKO-FRI6xPitr5pgFznzVa5MUz5fPa0lZ3E7pL1gZ-6_flFLe5ekcpeWJHkY725ufV0BrT8fe0jnenHEY98egWU7PDlVWcJHre6pTwUgeVUA9R3ZiWHa7my4I0Xah7M1xQyxLWLNuT-efVb6-B-9HnjX6SVCC-OcL4HA_3UmqohZzPFlVwe4ZM_DDpFgLgl21-QlGbi54EnJxWQ-5L9BQj4ooW9ogpY4p9JMFYxg2vqQHQxjI4n_0d4B754xK2FN5dxQlYdaUZKdPC977TjdUBXHiwFWR5D8alu6gU5OcxLjD9CpUHMA2j9SzK_2wjNXeSeijfJ_ZZ-7tV_9hWwLSyxMqffK)
---
| | Friend,

---
I have a lot to say in this email – but it all comes from the HEART.
---
Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull’s eye on my back._
_
---
My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government.

---
_But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene.
_
---
**_When the Deep State invades your own home, it’s a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse._**

---
The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 – and a sign of what’s to come if I chose to defy their demands.

---
I could’ve obeyed. I could’ve said, “I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family.”

---
But that thought never even crossed my mind.

---
**_I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could’ve dreamed of. America will always be worth saving._**

---
Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who’ve become drunk with power never was and never will be an option.

---
So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into...

---
...I have since been INDICTED _**THREE**_ TIMES as an innocent man. I’ve been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning.

---
**They’ve made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR** _**LIFE**_**as an innocent man.**

---
Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man.

---
**_But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn’t come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God._**

---
**_The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny._**

---
So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign...

---
...Let me make myself 100% clear: _OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL _CONTINUE_ TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024._

---
We’ve built the greatest political movement in the history of our country – and I will NEVER ABANDON it.

---
**We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class – and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America’s** _**TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY**_**.**

---
Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you.

---
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._

---
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA – for 1,500% impact.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=38fc0d2fef8a4e4990eb88e1d55deb07&_e=nLQXyQshGcpwo9eALEpU6t30OPWUj5cnfx-4BTwsBOOk32qUr9yL3LD-wCeSUYPC_GGtu1K0sOqOsXNRbHhGgEqmxIqkkcDZSES9x1XkvHwEGQ2HIrUfqZRV3lB3-CEZWoJ6cEyvzEaJ-JHt1NNUjxduqaCMyctvlSIsxKO-FRI6xPitr5pgFznzVa5MUz5fPa0lZ3E7pL1gZ-6_flFLe5ekcpeWJHkY725ufV0BrT8fe0jnenHEY98egWU7PDlVWcJHre6pTwUgeVUA9R3ZiWHa7my4I0Xah7M1xQyxLWLNuT-efVb6-B-9HnjX6SVCC-OcL4HA_3UmqohZzPFlV6YeGEB0dFHGPNtssp4jJaIpt1o4BUgoWzaOQ5SA6SpIczuKSlqrXeqd4maUD1pGWujX7NIWootJlBeqM7CPWlu0xgOztc4MZ0_wsLKgKkxyMM8XqA7SplzsBwR-Wxs654bOffngr4LLT6FFwFMyfYHB10E3yI41CVJbRhnmmDXD)**

Trump Save America JFC, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding President Trump, and we’re glad you’re on our team. If you want to ensure our emails always go to your inbox, please add [contact@support.donaldjtrump.com](mailto:contact@support.donaldjtrump.com) to your address book.

Thank you for joining Team Trump. It’s because of grassroots supporters like YOU that we’ve been able to consistently call out the Fake News media EVERY SINGLE TIME they try to spread misinformation or outright LIES about the important work President Trump is doing to SAVE AMERICA. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU Friend, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_s=38fc0d2fef8a4e4990eb88e1d55deb07&_t=C28LBXCfQRhOhxgzQ72fbjmVOV7tX--_hmeLAYAg6uDZn4NHnoSWiEXJJAGwtRkWsaSykwWo1iog5wYbZyvAadR_66RrevjaBlLn0-v8UsA%3D)

clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -| | | | | Friend, I have a lot to say in this email – but it all comes from the HEART. Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull’s eye on my back. My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government. But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene. When the Deep State invades your own home, it’s a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse. The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 – and a sign of what’s to come if I chose to defy their demands. I could’ve obeyed. I could’ve said, “I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family.” But that thought never even crossed my mind. I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could’ve dreamed of. America will always be worth saving. Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who’ve become drunk with power never was and never will be an option. So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into... ...I have since been INDICTED THREE TIMES as an innocent man. I’ve been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning. They’ve made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFEas an innocent man. Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man. But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn’t come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God. The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny. So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign... ...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL CONTINUE TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024. We’ve built the greatest political movement in the history of our country – and I will NEVER ABANDON it. We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class – and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America’s TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY. Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you. But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. | | Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: I am writing to ask if you can make a contribution directly to the North Carolina Democratic Party. Please let me explain why they called to ask if we could help.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
This is one of the states we have to strategically invest in, and we all have a role to play in manifesting the outcome of the election.

Hey there, everyone. Gavin Newsom here with an important request.
I wasn't planning on sending out a fundraising email so close to the one we sent on Monday, but the North Carolina Democratic Party called me directly and asked for our help. This one is important, for all of us...
If that's all you need to hear, use this link to rush a contribution directly to the North Carolina Democratic Party:
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/NC-Dems**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-nc-dems?refcode=em230802-1-full&refcode2=1524_4767699_dq-t4S&akid=1524%2E4767699%2Edq-t4S)
Otherwise, let me explain what's happening in North Carolina and why it matters to all of us.
$5 to re-elect Joe Biden. In 2020, Joe won the state by just 1.4 percentage points. We win here, we keep a Democrat in the White House, period. Even if Republicans make gains in a different state Biden won in 2024. This is the most flippable state on the map.
$5 because the House majority is on the line and there are seats we have to defend in North Carolina. If we can re-elect the president, hold the Senate and take back the White House, it would be a BFD for the party, and for families across the country.
$5 because there is an important governor's race in North Carolina and the Republicans are likely to nominate a popular far-right conspiracy theorist who said COVID was a "globalist" plot to defeat Trump.
There is so much at stake in North Carolina. Control of the White House. Control of the House. And issues like abortion access, voting access, and health care access are on the ballot for North Carolina families.
So please. I know $5 may not seem like it can help win a whole state. But the DNC is chipping in. Lots of people are responding to this email. And it all adds up FAST if everyone does their part.
This is one of the states we have to strategically invest in, and we all have a role to play in manifesting the outcome of the election. So please:
[**Can I count on you to use this link to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford directly to the North Carolina Democratic Party today? It will all add up FAST if we're all chipping in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-nc-dems?refcode=em230802-1-full&refcode2=1524_4767699_dq-t4S&akid=1524%2E4767699%2Edq-t4S)
Or you can pick an amount here:
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Indiana Republican Party HQ
subject: You can still be a part of it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/293b9181291618e5/ca50a263581acdfdc3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Friend, Our biggest event of the year is fast approaching, and you can still be a part of it. Not only will the evening feature the graduation of the 2023 cohort of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series, but it will also feature a keynote address from **Congressman and Republican U.S. Senate candidate Jim Banks.** **A proud Hoosier conservative and unafraid of a fight, Congressman Banks has been fighting for Hoosier values in the halls of Congress since 2017. ** As a member of the House Armed Services Committee, he recently led the charge in securing the largest pay raise for our service members in over 20 years. And as a member of the House Select Committee on China, he has worked to hold China accountable for its role in the fentanyl crisis that has harmed communities across the country and here in Indiana.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/293b9181291618e5/864b0f1798cb2a3fc3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
**Don't miss this exciting night,****Friend.** Join hundreds of your fellow Republicans and hear Congressman Banks discuss the important road ahead as we _fight_ for victory in the 2024 elections. For all of the details, including sponsorship opportunities, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/293b9181291618e5/b95a5d781f5b15f5c3d6b838967d376c/40313). See you soon. — Indiana Republican Party HQ

clean_body: | | | Friend, Our biggest event of the year is fast approaching, and you can still be a part of it. Not only will the evening feature the graduation of the 2023 cohort of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series, but it will also feature a keynote address from Congressman and Republican U.S. Senate candidate Jim Banks. A proud Hoosier conservative and unafraid of a fight, Congressman Banks has been fighting for Hoosier values in the halls of Congress since 2017. As a member of the House Armed Services Committee, he recently led the charge in securing the largest pay raise for our service members in over 20 years. And as a member of the House Select Committee on China, he has worked to hold China accountable for its role in the fentanyl crisis that has harmed communities across the country and here in Indiana. Don't miss this exciting night,Friend. Join hundreds of your fellow Republicans and hear Congressman Banks discuss the important road ahead as we fight for victory in the 2024 elections. For all of the details, including sponsorship opportunities, . See you soon. — Indiana Republican Party HQ | | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. body:
| | |

[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c8b004f6302640c3bb5cfbc154d8dfc1&_e=AKBQkCJ8KRTh_b1i6jTsfLbelWusvtmfcnVfPbpIJy29ORcUaxM6qCihSeVB548nEU_lXtc_PfumSljK1lOI6MbFAfdV1EIBSmkFYaczwtS6wCdX9FLIQ-M2IydjzprdcGXw8P4yz2BhDLeW5WEIgO0cluhGnZagZ2HkbO1rwRn0OKgjM99OvVwjutwUoIWDyXnjcKua7lgCvADH3ClNAsp8HNY3fGLbbHxZaG3UCz_S7AJxC25wprMYCqbbJ4qQv4KxKIYWjnJgfsGVt6ToyAmrC5VZeMOI9E3h5-TlqXOItoZBfulVGFTlFuxYMpVrvM3aqcRpvkg0JSpg3i33W8IgiO0VYgYi1QmT2jnpJVfKhG23uIu-1X25kD21STvfFaY-GJTBFl7izhrVWtAyUm-Cnt2DioDpYSgxz9LYyxrItuBwBsGLSmREiqVMdvuLpSo9hAMCen71fZ4ojGsrEFXuMmdfAGObzYsASc6IKRu47oX2kbb6V-MdBBAYv6nP)
