Friend, My name is Sam Brown and **[I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Nevada](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c8b004f6302640c3bb5cfbc154d8dfc1&_e=AKBQkCJ8KRTh_b1i6jTsfLbelWusvtmfcnVfPbpIJy29ORcUaxM6qCihSeVB548nEU_lXtc_PfumSljK1lOI6MbFAfdV1EIBSmkFYaczwtS6wCdX9FLIQ-M2IydjzprdcGXw8P4yz2BhDLeW5WEIgO0cluhGnZagZ2HkbO1rwRn0OKgjM99OvVwjutwUoIWDyXnjcKua7lgCvADH3ClNAsp8HNY3fGLbbHxZaG3UCz_S7AJxC25wprMYCqbbJ4qQv4KxKIYWjnJgfsGVt6ToyAmrC5VZeMOI9E3h5-TlqXOItoZBfulVGFTlFuxYMpVrvM3aqcRpvkg0JSpg3i33W8IgiO0VYgYi1QmT2jnpJVd-m6HG_BbWSKrjQut0gA0memuoJgpH17OL72shZCz2r1vbHV6ejFanNnlq1_0U92_zVZgdssHoQINtgAbVU95XFlHVdX-T_b7QYQCFrraRzrh0-tKU2ssuAPpXaUIlt4eWf8ciKF8qXsYho90bcBNJ).** I'll talk more about that in a minute, but first, I want to tell you my story and why I chose to serve.
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c8b004f6302640c3bb5cfbc154d8dfc1&_e=AKBQkCJ8KRTh_b1i6jTsfLbelWusvtmfcnVfPbpIJy29ORcUaxM6qCihSeVB548nEU_lXtc_PfumSljK1lOI6MbFAfdV1EIBSmkFYaczwtS6wCdX9FLIQ-M2IydjzprdcGXw8P4yz2BhDLeW5WEIgO0cluhGnZagZ2HkbO1rwRn0OKgjM99OvVwjutwUoIWDyXnjcKua7lgCvADH3ClNAsp8HNY3fGLbbHxZaG3UCz_S7AJxC25wprMYCqbbJ4qQv4KxKIYWjnJgfsGVt6ToyAmrC5VZeMOI9E3h5-TlqXOItoZBfulVGFTlFuxYMpVrvM3aqcRpvkg0JSpg3i33W8IgiO0VYgYi1QmT2jnpJVdyTYTnCu2Gvzo4q2auGkURxbDUuPA9vq45TJ_LQRdXK75eO9w_slmCjxWRf0ZS_XN8BDjVX6KHFQpD6u-yyw7Fxgmi-rnjbol2hSmOSO2nt2gw6f-C1Lqb8udMlkNnvKZEtMekUV62nwCItU8o2Crn)
---
My father was the first to teach me about service. I was the first of five children in my family, and my dad worked hard everyday to provide for us, serving in the military. _He instilled this truth in us: One of the noblest things a person can do is serve their country._ In my teens, I knew that joining the military was something I'd like to do but I wasn't all in. But after the 9/11 attacks, my desire to serve my country transformed from a desire to an ironclad resolve. Soon after 9/11, I applied to the U.S. Military academy at West Point. I graduated and was commissioned as an infantry officer and I answered the call from my country to fight in Afghanistan. **[Before we go any further, would you consider chipping in to help me accept the call to serve once again?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c8b004f6302640c3bb5cfbc154d8dfc1&_e=AKBQkCJ8KRTh_b1i6jTsfLbelWusvtmfcnVfPbpIJy29ORcUaxM6qCihSeVB548nEU_lXtc_PfumSljK1lOI6MbFAfdV1EIBSmkFYaczwtS6wCdX9FLIQ-M2IydjzprdcGXw8P4yz2BhDLeW5WEIgO0cluhGnZagZ2HkbO1rwRn0OKgjM99OvVwjutwUoIWDyXnjcKua7lgCvADH3ClNAsp8HNY3fGLbbHxZaG3UCz_S7AJxC25wprMYCqbbJ4qQv4KxKIYWjnJgfsGVt6ToyAmrC5VZeMOI9E3h5-TlqXOItoZBfulVGFTlFuxYMpVrvM3aqcRpvkg0JSpg3i33W8IgiO0VYgYi1QmT2jnpJVfLQuucWTy6c7QvDRBfTlvJs7sYFDrQOrxJILbMjZXuFP7BK3j7nZPG-ihAAHCCPIu-xCiZCGTuc3wf06YZ76rukU72LYNO7uVqWQeheC2_Ras7yb9QNDp__b1WFFmF-qnt4kO7iYjIcrVnRnU76Dt-)**
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c8b004f6302640c3bb5cfbc154d8dfc1&_e=AKBQkCJ8KRTh_b1i6jTsfLbelWusvtmfcnVfPbpIJy29ORcUaxM6qCihSeVB548nEU_lXtc_PfumSljK1lOI6MbFAfdV1EIBSmkFYaczwtS6wCdX9FLIQ-M2IydjzprdcGXw8P4yz2BhDLeW5WEIgO0cluhGnZagZ2HkbO1rwRn0OKgjM99OvVwjutwUoIWDyXnjcKua7lgCvADH3ClNAsp8HNY3fGLbbHxZaG3UCz_S7AJxC25wprMYCqbbJ4qQv4KxKIYWjnJgfsGVt6ToyAmrC5VZeMOI9E3h5-TlqXOItoZBfulVGFTlFuxYMpVrvM3aqcRpvkg0JSpg3i33W8IgiO0VYgYi1QmT2jnpJVen8dwJhJNYb4cioE7c4OOePXlVAZfNIKeVYtmf-PC6gXmsihiZxPBxup7C6VbRAQgCa2JpvIj0wCzhKLx6A0SjRd38ywHO87iupqLQv1_B_YXECToRtCp6Ta7qBspLC1SrrE-DZYMQa6pgGvzUZSXv)
---
Four months into my deployment, my life changed forever. It all happened in an instant. My team and I were on our way to provide support to an embattled platoon. On our way to the engagement zone, my team and I rolled over a roadside bomb. The explosion soaked me in diesel and flames ignited all over my body. My gunner was able to put out the flames and save my life. If I'd been on fire for another minute I wouldn't be writing this message to you today.
---

clean_body: | | | Friend, My name is Sam Brown and . I'll talk more about that in a minute, but first, I want to tell you my story and why I chose to serve. My father was the first to teach me about service. I was the first of five children in my family, and my dad worked hard everyday to provide for us, serving in the military. He instilled this truth in us: One of the noblest things a person can do is serve their country. In my teens, I knew that joining the military was something I'd like to do but I wasn't all in. But after the 9/11 attacks, my desire to serve my country transformed from a desire to an ironclad resolve. Soon after 9/11, I applied to the U.S. Military academy at West Point. I graduated and was commissioned as an infantry officer and I answered the call from my country to fight in Afghanistan. - Four months into my deployment, my life changed forever. It all happened in an instant. My team and I were on our way to provide support to an embattled platoon. On our way to the engagement zone, my team and I rolled over a roadside bomb. The explosion soaked me in diesel and flames ignited all over my body. My gunner was able to put out the flames and save my life. If I'd been on fire for another minute I wouldn't be writing this message to you today. I was rushed back to a hospital in Texas where I'd undergo countless surgeries and 3 years of rehabilitation. I'm not telling you my story because I want you to pity me, or see me as a hero. I was injured while serving my country. I'm not the first and I'm not the last. Still, I consider myself to be blessed beyond measure. As I've learned through my life: God's plans are greater than any man can conceive of. While recovering from my injuries, I met my wife Amy, and since then we've had 3 incredible children. As soon as I was able to, I got back to work. Nothing taken for granted and not a second wasted. While working a warehouse job, I built a business that gave me the opportunity to continue to serve Americans: sprinting around the red tape and providing emergency pharmaceutical care to veterans outside of the Veterans Health Administration. Friend, if you help send me to the U.S. Senate, this is the exact attitude I will bring with me. I will NEVER take your support for granted - and I won't waste a second fighting to protect our country from the radical left. I wish I could take on the Democrat establishment on my own, and I wish I could beat their $100 million war chest by myself. But the simple fact is that I can 't do this without YOUR support, Friend, If you can chip in anything today, I'd be grateful. Duty First, CPT Sam Brown, U.S. Army (Ret.) | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. body:

Good news, Peter:

**Thanks to your support, we met our July monthly fundraising goal.**

Even though it’s still early in the campaign, I’m heartened to know that grassroots contributors like you have consistently shown up for us so far.

In a toss-up district like CA-27, it will be crucial to continue meeting our fundraising benchmarks as the campaign progresses. We’ll need all the resources we can muster to buy TV ads, grow our campaign staff, and equip our volunteers – all so we can flip this seat blue and bring responsible leadership to Southern California.

Yes, this campaign is more of a marathon than a sprint, and we’re not taking anything for granted. But every monthly goal we hit brings us one step closer to flipping CA-27, and with it, hopefully the House majority. That’s why I’m so grateful for your support so far, and so determined to keep this momentum going as the race heats up.

Thanks again for standing with us, and I’ll talk to you soon.

George

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv1q5k8hff28dk0550inmvn9ndbes0cjnda4m79o_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i60o34cjh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkmg5rfblbbeh7bm0aun794lesmft85grvmrnkno_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i60o34cjh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8bbjpnvoqu50fkml39cg8hrtl45jt11fae0i6io_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i60o34cjh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1ngf0q5n4e0e0ou7uti01ag7f1ve80qnnbm5nv8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i60o34cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

clean_body: = On January 6, 2021, hours after insurrectionists overran the Capitol, Rep. Jay Obernolte took one of his first votes in Congress to overturn the 2020 election. Donald Trump was just indicted for attempting to end democracy. Trump knew that his election conspiracies were total lies \- and Obernolte went along with it. Democrat Derek Marshall is running to defeat Obernolte, defend democracy, and hold insurrectionists accountable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = = In 2022, Donald Trump rewarded Obernolte for his loyalty with a “Complete and Total Endorsement.” Now, as Donald Trump faces over 70 felony indictments for conspiring to end democracy and stealing classified documents. = Thanks for your support, Marshall for Congress = Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. = To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. name: Fair Fight
subject: Here’s how you can help prevent a massive voter purge in GA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
We’re here to talk about Republicans’ most recent voter suppression attempt in GA, what Fair Fight’s doing about it right now, and how you can help. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67475477/419839236/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230802_f_voterpurge1_v1s2_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmEzOTU3ZS01ODMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EDZieQwAXmDW8HGvyBD42kcK8fqldP8Pvr9TEW01D70=&emci=6ebfacf9-5731-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=eba3957e-5831-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | We’re here to talk about Republicans’ most recent voter suppression attempt in Georgia, what Fair Fight’s doing about it right now, and how you can help. **First: Brad Raffensperger, the Georgia Secretary of State, announced that he plans to cancel over 191,000 voter registrations on August 13.** This is a continuation of Georgia Republicans’ shameful tradition of mass voter purges between election cycles, dating back to 2017. It’s a scheme to silence and disenfranchise voters — especially voters of color. **Next:** The Fair Fight team once again jumped into action. We quickly mobilized by launching an organizing effort to call and text tens of thousands of voters ahead of the August 13 deadline. As you read this, we’re ensuring they have the information and resources they need to stop their voter registrations from being canceled. **Finally:** To fund our organizing efforts across Georgia at this critical moment, we’re asking you to chip in to our Prevent the Purge Fund. Your support will help impacted voters get back on the rolls — and will ensure Fair Fight can continue our critical work to protect the freedom to vote in Georgia. [_**Will you rush a donation of $20 or anything you can to our Prevent the Purge Fund to stop Raffensperger from silencing voters?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67475479/419839238/309034870?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230802_f_voterpurge1_v1s2_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmEzOTU3ZS01ODMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EDZieQwAXmDW8HGvyBD42kcK8fqldP8Pvr9TEW01D70=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67475480/419839239/309034870?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230802_f_voterpurge1_v1s2_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmEzOTU3ZS01ODMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EDZieQwAXmDW8HGvyBD42kcK8fqldP8Pvr9TEW01D70=)

The Fair Fight Team

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Happy Birthday, Senator Jacky Rosen 🎂🎁

Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project **** **

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg64c9fp2h4lhn8u69qhadj9hvehv3e9h1jogps8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i68o72c1h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi0carqt63fh12a5na558ajsjg6iv203jr90cq2g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i68o72c1h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9nh58tdkfrj7kje0fcgpg3loktkk7f1mvulj6vg_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i68o72c1h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb73vvvi2ulnqjaedj68kqc8oh4ngodhio034hig_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i68o72c1h2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zduspmqe7sam6eh8794q23pjme7h3smbk3b5fh40_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i68o72c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5i15t6pfkehr9mhlbeam374me26cvlo99i1ia5o_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i68o72c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zovcmet043ad6cv7c6omk6b29qvp0k8iiqm579n8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i68o72c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn0957sc7ds947sl6more4rn9b4b227h5sot7pl0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i68o72c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlq5rd0s8724bc4ii0p9ibpmj9mtl0pj1tonbi30_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i68o72c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2ildvl9eatop3t56e6r9chnhq0t8m7vcl3a3an0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i68o72c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zldomjeagmfdrgno2f122j82u6nrft66cjv04vpg_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i68o72c1h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z438fao19nlgged97e2d0fjnn7rotdj4uh5alms8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i68o72c1h2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo8l8m2ugkgldged4t69s64l2mvvevg0e2806ij8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i68o72c1h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqqm2ubs7sljkjftig921iu84dibd452emkif4to_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i68o72c1h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi8i9mct9k0hco21e17tje4f0l9dsp2b85mo3i48_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i68o72c1h2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

Trump Train News

name: Ashley
subject: When you don't have a trust fund or politically powerful family, every grassroots donor really matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
I want to thank every one of you who stepped up and pitched in last month. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67476513/419842829/-1733172345?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20230801_na_ty_cand_mf_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjkzMDlmZC01YTMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cb-Ed6Q9DvL-T71sLzfzAG6cPtiKWVf2W52pVOX8hPY=)
---
Hey team, I know a lot of our inboxes get flooded with emails from campaigns asking for our support at the end of each month. **So it means a lot every time one of you believes this campaign is worth your time and hard-earned money to invest in.** As a grassroots campaign taking on a powerful incumbent, I can wholeheartedly say none of our work would be possible without you. I'm not taking a cent from corporate PACs. And I don't have a trust fund or politically powerful family to rely on. This campaign really is built by hard-working folks – students, retirees, teachers, veterans, parents, and anyone who thinks PA-01 deserves better. Together, we will kick GOP Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick out of office and build a Pennsylvania and a country where everyone can thrive, not just survive. Thanks again and stay cool out there 😎, Ashley
---
| Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Carmen=20Goers?=
subject: Why I signed the Term Limits Pledge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carmen for Congress]( "Paid for by Carmen for Congress")
body:
Joe Biden, Dianne Feinstein & Mitch McConnell are a few reasons | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2c8da58e5c74/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-in-the-8th-congressional-district-13563675?e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=d01ee6013c&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | Peter,
---
| There’s not enough money and power in the world to convince me to follow in Dianne Feinstein or Mitch McConnell’s footsteps!

Instead of trying to convince the American people that I still have the cognitive ability and wherewithal to offer due diligence in serving them at the age of 80, **I signed the U.S. Term Limits Amendment Pledge. **
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=ac53644f6a&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| Representing almost a million Washingtonians in Congress will be no small feat, and the aspiration of serving as a career politician hasn’t done a lot of good for our nation.

Our national debt is out of control and most Americans don’t feel their voices are being fairly represented by elected officials who appear to be obsessed with setting a new world record for number of years served in office!
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=5dfd02ba99&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| _By signing the U.S. Term Limits Pledge_ , I’m determined to return the power of a Representative Democracy to Washingtonians by ending the lifelong tenure of politicians.

**Peter, will you take a stand with me for a new chapter in American politics and ending the era of career politicians? **

[**Can I count on your support of $15, $25, or $35 today to show that political office will no longer represent a throne for lifelong elitists to sit on, but will embody the public service that competes to produce results for We The People?**](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=4235dbbbd4&e=0e51d1e991)

clean_body: Joe Biden, Dianne Feinstein & Mitch McConnell are a few reasons | | | | | | | Peter, | There’s not enough money and power in the world to convince me to follow in Dianne Feinstein or Mitch McConnell’s footsteps! Instead of trying to convince the American people that I still have the cognitive ability and wherewithal to offer due diligence in serving them at the age of 80, I signed the U.S. Term Limits Amendment Pledge. | | Representing almost a million Washingtonians in Congress will be no small feat, and the aspiration of serving as a career politician hasn’t done a lot of good for our nation. Our national debt is out of control and most Americans don’t feel their voices are being fairly represented by elected officials who appear to be obsessed with setting a new world record for number of years served in office! | | By signing the U.S. Term Limits Pledge , I’m determined to return the power of a Representative Democracy to Washingtonians by ending the lifelong tenure of politicians. Peter, will you take a stand with me for a new chapter in American politics and ending the era of career politicians? | "DONATE $25 »" | "DONATE $50 »" | "DONATE $100 »" | "DONATE $250 »" | "DONATE $500 »" | "DONATE $1000 »" | "DONATE $2500 »" | "DONATE $3300 »" | "DONATE $6600 »" | "DONATE ANY AMOUNT »" | For Washington, | | Carmen Goers Candidate for U.S. Congress, WA-8 | | | | | | | | | | | | "Paid for by Carmen for Congress" | | Copyright © 2023 Carmen for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Why is Biden doing this
body:
| | | **I might end up on a Biden watchlist for saying this:**

**Communist China is in a Cold War with the United States and is the greatest threat to us.**
It’s no secret that their dictator Xi Jinping wants total world domination - and with the Biden Family corruption in his pocket, there’s no telling how bad things will get.
My name is Colonel Mike Waltz, I’m the first Green Beret to ever serve in Congress, and I got a bone to pick with good-for-nothing communists and their Establishment Democrat allies who want America turned into a Chinese puppet state.

I get a lot of flak from both sides for calling out how bad things really are - but now the target on my back is growing and my list of allies is shrinking.

The Establishment despises me and wants me silenced, and if I’m going to continue to defend our country I’ll need cover from Patriots like you - **[Could you help me stay in the fight by making a contribution of $10 or $20 today?](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=f722072bcdf84999ab27bc196ef5fc53&_e=OCB2z7HSc0qWdoCSaWytaZxmVO7v1Spe2k7Boci8Pk4kMM_MHoPZxZlYbaEoLS_KG2LN8b6qfcgyxmGrENloel9KwEUvEHJVJCb2WYWNYpnFvPD3LGP0cKAtENz_0W2mE0oFaOPXb9FNJXt6paukDeq0nbCCVowyaqNTr7sii1lmvDksHyHnGD_oOJq2rPeOBpleUJ50Zbz0vGwDurNzSsCqGPakS32m0-Jyb18wU0tFFYlkyjNWOHp4jYGUVEj05bIUwJcw9buPQmrFDwvYuxKt4TIrG1_pSMXq2LX4nDa1KhwPq_n9ZPuGxxFPlS-j1484iupNTsAXRwN4U8k-M0sczaWb2bLOF38htvpanKM%3D)**

name: Attorney General Jason Miyares
subject: WATCH: AG Miyares DESTROYS the Left’s arguments on crime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
It's why left-wing prosecutors have all but stopped prosecuting crimes like shoplifting.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2d63505c9da4af595d8fc26d8db71a2&_e=__NY-JeVtBnrn4-IslGyi6By-y7YrCedjpm5NbtmqTPG3pzTvFxzEs38QhDm-zcwLQCegobtT-tAshsC6ySWS94YXN626zT_BzlB5oMThoBoHqpz_7k4nH8q_B8exqYQjWc9mVqVFIk9SPEzfLJ4bT5jx8FEgjjN0jUhRgMmsvoa3pAne-ve0WIr4oKzoKO4rYfN0KwhSz93mXe5i2lWQAp3lw0VOpghkTKu8IVD34s3FOCKsIs2-5bdHeMZcYEZaMmy496CaEoTAnPDQSMf1YCG9rAI-OY3rebGB376jEZX7n1pfUjhQPLeOR5WZcvzkA0oEfCfAG5ysJRwXW8tuWTWZfL9DiDVCgIb8PcRD9WljjcQWYQP1jly3Tw7rDE-)
---
Friend, _Is shoplifting a victimless crime?_ Radical prosecutors would like us to believe that. It's why left-wing prosecutors have all but stopped prosecuting crimes like shoplifting. **But you and I know that 's not the case, so I went on Fox to set the record straight.**
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2d63505c9da4af595d8fc26d8db71a2&_e=__NY-JeVtBnrn4-IslGyi6By-y7YrCedjpm5NbtmqTPG3pzTvFxzEs38QhDm-zcwLQCegobtT-tAshsC6ySWS94YXN626zT_BzlB5oMThoBoHqpz_7k4nH8q_B8exqYQjWc9mVqVFIk9SPEzfLJ4bT5jx8FEgjjN0jUhRgMmsvoa3pAne-ve0WIr4oKzoKO4rYfN0KwhSz93mXe5i2lWQAp3lw0VOpghkTKu8IVD34uyKPlFWC_1A0bs3Tm0QwN5TOzdk8HsOYGYbpLBr1rktwGK8r2hSikazdIjyFK-Mg5_dkpRDjk-aklsUxHGi8Qn0Ak87LgLzHbwZrm-3-zv13gDM4vPwh71yB_cnOgL0Tyrd6WRoKjW9uT3qTPMULli)
---
[**WATCH NOW**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2d63505c9da4af595d8fc26d8db71a2&_e=__NY-JeVtBnrn4-IslGyi6By-y7YrCedjpm5NbtmqTPG3pzTvFxzEs38QhDm-zcwLQCegobtT-tAshsC6ySWS94YXN626zT_BzlB5oMThoBoHqpz_7k4nH8q_B8exqYQjWc9mVqVFIk9SPEzfLJ4bT5jx8FEgjjN0jUhRgMmsvoa3pAne-ve0WIr4oKzoKO4rYfN0KwhSz93mXe5i2lWQAp3lw0VOpghkTKu8IVD34sfee4he0EccnGwd9xL9kXpE-ip1Rv4_lxb6X2Qipxgtk-3F4wb8AYUD54r5cITSx6GHCJ7Yrme4sPBXJntWATZ37FZXLTDZSgqgxGyYt9OKK4umLtSVAEN2GqWwqyY7BuAwb39B32FZSLbWaq9JgXb)
---
**You see folks argue that poverty creates crime._[But there's an enormous amount of data that shows crime creates poverty.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2d63505c9da4af595d8fc26d8db71a2&_e=__NY-JeVtBnrn4-IslGyi6By-y7YrCedjpm5NbtmqTPG3pzTvFxzEs38QhDm-zcwLQCegobtT-tAshsC6ySWS94YXN626zT_BzlB5oMThoBoHqpz_7k4nH8q_B8exqYQjWc9mVqVFIk9SPEzfLJ4bT5jx8FEgjjN0jUhRgMmsvoa3pAne-ve0WIr4oKzoKO4rYfN0KwhSz93mXe5i2lWQAp3lw0VOpghkTKu8IVD34seiCQ44udeB3LeyUU_fimiFcAgf7BByPixmMuOt3pvKC5c8TBSUybekqyMnbVW6vLtkCeNJd5YRkGHoijj6IcKIrcjhg-Iak0bZjCdL_j_lkDDRnMo1ferjM6To1bEVq5GVeDSFxNsYgGRCvPyLY14)_** The refusal to prosecute crimes like shoplifting leads to lawlessness, the flight of small businesses, and decline of the entire neighborhood. Small businesses create two-thirds of jobs -- but they can't operate in areas that don't take crime seriously. **Friend, I won 't stand by while other prosecutors simply make crime legal.** And I believe you won't stand by either. That's why I'm writing to you today: **Will you join my team and help me fight back against the lawless prosecutors who are fanning the flames of the crime surge?**
---

# [Ban Trump from being President if he's convicted of trying to steal the 2020 election](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td755dda2-e95e-4f05-9c0b-5a4794bf566b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | If Donald Trump is convicted of trying to steal the 2020 election, he might still be able to serve as president. It's frankly absurd. And it needs to be changed NOW. [**Tell Congress to change the law -- if necessary by Constitutional amendment -- to make it clear that those who try to destroy our democracy lose the right to lead it.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2505b016-1a8c-47d8-8c54-98fed2f70fb2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7q5hia9q4br5ntfmpbssug8lht2ligu9o5539ng_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i6cor0cdh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk39frqkul92mn7nm6etm1s15aj514grgckmnlpg_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i6cor0cdh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn4aaqmje7s7a29pag50g68mth79re4cfihna5e8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i6cor0cdh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zghf11gi058tsej395amdvbd9mldo1olls4tnms0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i6cor0cdh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Thanks to you, we had our best month since launching this campaign. | | I wanted to make sure I personally reached out to you, Fellow American. Thanks to your generosity, we had one of our best months since launching this campaign on February 21st. I've never run for office before. I am not a career politician who relies on the support of mega donors. This campaign is fueled by my personal investment and grassroots supporters like YOU. I cannot thank you enough, Fellow American. With your help, we'll win the White House, shut down the administrative state, and remind people what it means to actually be an American. Thanks for being a part of our team. Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Team Pramila
subject: We cannot keep living like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The best time to ban assault weapons was yesterday, the second best time is today.
#
_Content Warning: This email discusses the topic of gun violence. Please read with discretion._
Peter, the best time to ban assault weapons was yesterday, the second best time is today.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/ban-assault-weapons-petition_3/?source=em20230802-2770&t=1&akid=2770%2E420207%2EG1wnuO)
As GOP lawmakers try to distract people with fabricated culture wars, they continuously neglect the real crises in our communities. **It is our moral obligation as legislators and leaders to stop mass shootings and that starts with reinstating the assault weapons ban.**
**We must continue putting the pressure on legislators both in Congress and in our own communities to end the endemic of gun violence.[If you stand with our movement, please add your name to our petition to urge Congress to prioritize our safety and reinstate the assault weapons ban.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/ban-assault-weapons-petition_3/?source=em20230802-2770&t=2&akid=2770%2E420207%2EG1wnuO)**
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/ban-assault-weapons-petition_3/?=em20230802-2770&t=3&akid=2770%2E420207%2EG1wnuO)**
As the GOP continues to push extremist and right-wing MAGA hatred and division, our communities will continue to be put at risk. We need to do everything in our power to support immigrants, poor people, trans children, not only from the wrath of Republican policies but from those who wish our communities harm.
Furthermore, our country’s lack of gun regulation is continuing to spread to other countries. The U.S. is the number one source of semi-automatic weapons in El Salvador, approximately half a million guns are trafficked to Mexico each year, and 70% to 90% of guns recovered at crime scenes in Mexico have been tracked back to the U.S.
**Every action has a reaction****, Peter. And our country’s lack of action on gun violence is having a wider impact than we could ever imagine. We cannot keep living this way.[Add your name today to stand with Pramila and our movement as we continue shaking the status quo to fight for our safety and our future. We must ban assault weapons today. ](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/ban-assault-weapons-petition_3/?source=em20230802-2770&t=4&akid=2770%2E420207%2EG1wnuO)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230802-2770-footer&t=5&refcode2=2770_420207_G1wnuO&akid=2770%2E420207%2EG1wnuO)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=2770%2E420207%2EG1wnuO)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2770%2E420207%2EG1wnuO)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
August 2, 2023
Dear friend,
Great news.
Councilman JB Smiley will be our special guest at our meet-and-greet with Attorney Jerri Green, candidate for Memphis City Council District 2 (East Memphis and Cordova).
So come on out tomorrow to meet the candidate and hear a special announcement from Councilman JB Smiley.
Location information is below. RSVP’s are gratefully appreciated, but not required.
To RSVP for tomorrow, click here [bit.ly/tvpgreenparty] .
To learn more about Attorney Jerri Green, click here [https://www.jerrigreen.com/] .
https://bit.ly/tvpgreenparty [https://bit.ly/tvpgreenparty]
RSVP FOR OUR YARD SIGN PARTY FOR JERRI GREEN [https://bit.ly/tvpgreenparty]
Thanks for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

clean_body: [] August 2, 2023 Dear friend, Great news. Councilman JB Smiley will be our special guest at our meet-and-greet with Attorney Jerri Green, candidate for Memphis City Council District 2 (East Memphis and Cordova). So come on out tomorrow to meet the candidate and hear a special announcement from Councilman JB Smiley. Location information is below. RSVP’s are gratefully appreciated, but not required. To RSVP for tomorrow, click here [bit.ly/tvpgreenparty] . To learn more about Attorney Jerri Green, click here [] . [] RSVP FOR OUR YARD SIGN PARTY FOR JERRI GREEN [] Thanks for your support, Tennessee Voter Project Staff If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Express Donate: $25 [] Express Donate: $50 [] Express Donate: $100 [] Express Donate: $250 [] Express Donate: $500 [] Express Donate: $1000 [] Or, donate another amount [] Visit Our Website [] Check Your Voter Registration Status [] Register to Vote [] [] [] Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq. It is dedicated to growing the number of registered Democrats and supporting Democratic candidates. The time is now to register more Democrats and prepare for the 2023 elections. name: Wendy Davis
subject: Remember "Abortion Barbie"?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List[www
body:
Republicans thought I would be embarrassed to be called out for my pro-choice views. They were wrong. |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67479334/419850986/-1667455293?sourceid=1051622&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDhhYzE5MS02MjMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z_bUUEkzRti9zg1P6P1hpbwQUtfMF-rIXn_2tqol3yg=&emci=9cc3ece5-a82f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=8d8ac191-6231-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Hey Peter, it's Wendy Davis.

Barbie has been in the news lately, so I wanted to reach out. When I ran for Texas governor in 2014, Greg Abbott and his right-wing defenders nicknamed me "Abortion Barbie" — _and I'll never let them forget it_. That nickname was purposefully inflammatory and out of touch — and Republicans thought I would be embarrassed to be called out for my pro-choice views. _They were wrong_. **Let's not forget that back when I was running for Texas governor, kids playing with Barbies had more reproductive rights than they do right now as adults.**

If the GOP had their way, women would be just like Barbie: plastic, idealized stereotypes with a superficial place in a male-dominated world. _**That's why I'm asking you to donate to EMILYs List today**_. **[We need to elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot who can protect abortion rights. EMILYs List is the team that can help make it happen. Can you make a donation of any amount to EMILYs List today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67479341/419850993/-1667455293?sourceid=1051622&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDhhYzE5MS02MjMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z_bUUEkzRti9zg1P6P1hpbwQUtfMF-rIXn_2tqol3yg=&emci=9cc3ece5-a82f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=8d8ac191-6231-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** | [DONATE »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67479342/419850994/-1667455293?sourceid=1051622&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDhhYzE5MS02MjMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z_bUUEkzRti9zg1P6P1hpbwQUtfMF-rIXn_2tqol3yg=&emci=9cc3ece5-a82f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=8d8ac191-6231-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)
---
As someone who has been fighting for Texans for nearly 25 years, I know how important it is to protect and expand reproductive rights in every state. That means codifying _Roe v. Wade_ into law, expanding health care options nationwide, and electing pro-choice champions to state, local, and federal offices.
******Peter, we are in the fight of our lives for abortion rights. It has never been more important to elect pro-choice champions to every level of office, so I'm personally reaching out to ask: Can you donate any amount to EMILYs List to help women WIN today?**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-Women-This-August](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67479343/419850995/-1667455293?sourceid=1051622&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDhhYzE5MS02MjMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z_bUUEkzRti9zg1P6P1hpbwQUtfMF-rIXn_2tqol3yg=&emci=9cc3ece5-a82f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=8d8ac191-6231-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)******
Thank you for joining me in the fight —

Wendy Davis

****

name: Team Wilson
subject: Trump’s co-conspirator Jim Jordan?
body:
What happens when Donald Trump’s Jan 6 co-conspirators flip?| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67479705/419851289/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDA5ZmE0M2EtNjMzMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Jus6r_vt-1o8Lwf1jJvWsco9SEYhBNa8cVSBWf-UfdY=)
---
Friend, You may have seen the recent news: Donald Trump has been indicted on four separate criminal counts for his attempt to overturn the 2020 election. This is a positive first step toward justice and accountability for the anti-American coup that Trump and his minions planned and attempted that led to the violent riot at the U.S. Capitol. One intriguing detail from the latest indictment (it’s starting to become difficult to keep track of them all...) is the six unnamed co-conspirators listed for playing central roles in the conspiracy. Facts of the indictment show that dozens of Members of Congress were contacted by Trump and his co-conspirators in a desperate frenzy to block Congress’ ceremonial certification of the votes. We already know that **Jim Jordan** coordinated with Trump’s team and led White House strategy sessions around the conspiracy to defraud the people of free and fair election results. **Jordan clearly has something to hide, which is why he defied a lawful subpoena from the January 6th Committee.** So the $64,000 question is this: What happens when the unnamed co-conspirators flip on Trump to save themselves? **Who else will be implicated—perhaps even indicted—for their role in the illegal coup attempt and insurrection? **

---

This is a positive first step toward justice and accountability for the anti-American coup that Trump and his minions planned and attempted that led to the violent riot at the U.S. Capitol. One intriguing detail from the latest indictment (it’s starting to become difficult to keep track of them all...) is the six unnamed co-conspirators listed for playing central roles in the conspiracy. We know that a flood of emails around fundraising deadlines can be overwhelming. That’s why we’re so grateful to have your support — whether you chipped in or just opened an email like this one, it really helps us out. But the work is far from over. We’re still in the fight to defend our frontline Congresswomen and win back the House majority. Now we’re just getting started on our new monthly fundraising goal, and we’re projecting August to be even slower. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your help, Katie HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0vo1f197bifvs1614j4c3cahvsl05s93kj3ofa0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i6aob4c1h2bs)
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg94jjide9hiceapnh0plik4b3vfk4d8pi4cj370_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i6aob4c1h2bs)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlda3onbsocdrg8rlo5ee4b6vuq8po06vic6v7i8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i6aob4c1h2bs)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zji9mfjdpf0cdma5p8n644imvti75bsfgvorqii0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i6aob4c1h2bs)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjesr3tc5dmum47omuv1ivavacueuc5fossdomt8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i6aob4c1h2bs)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpvv70fjf8nt5blj8ern1r3vm6kvfa6n5sv3o708_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i6aob4c1h2bs)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl4nii1f28qpgvedm0jgnhtjvbrprhmjg1j13l1g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i6aob4c1h2bs)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zll2fkqse6d7vkemeb7cenf7gtqoctqom9tkedio_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i6aob4c1h2bs)**.

---

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdjnnipk38su9dc96peajsakcrs66erl1amq5m58_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i6aob4c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chgm6p37clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zean21nqlkgd042c8a22o3gbgm6jjtcf9b4a8g0o_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i6aob4c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z36hg0e5jltk8hh1qfa5eu21il8jvo0kql0hv7oo_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1i6aob4c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Re: Louis DeJoy and the USPS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Louis DeJoy has done everything he can to make the USPS more expensive and less convenient to use.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=793%2E35263%2Eleu7Ng)
Peter, Across Wisconsin, I hear people express their concerns about the USPS and the future of our postal service while Louis DeJoy remains Postmaster General. **I hear you — and I’m ready to take action.** Frankly, ever since Donald Trump appointed him in 2020, Postmaster General Louis DeJoy has done everything he can to make the USPS more expensive and less convenient to use. _It’s a shame._ DeJoy has enacted massive cuts to postal services, decommissioned mail-sorting machines, and slowed down mail delivery in the months leading up to the 2020 election — when millions of Americans were counting on voting by mail. Not only that, but late last year, a federal judge ruled that DeJoy’s harmful policies right before the 2020 elections harmed delivery. Seems awfully convenient that in a year with record-breaking vote-by-mail, Trump’s hand-picked appointee enacted changes that hurt mail delivery services... Enough is enough — it’s time for Louis DeJoy to be removed as Postmaster General before he degrades the USPS any further. **[If you agree, add your name today to our petition to call on the USPS Board of Governors to remove DeJoy from office as soon as possible.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2308_USPS_petition?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230802_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=793%2E35263%2Eleu7Ng)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2308_USPS_petition?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230802_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=793%2E35263%2Eleu7Ng)
---
Peter, the USPS is a vital service that millions of Americans count on for access to medicine, paychecks, ballots, and so much more — which is why I made sure passing legislation to improve the USPS was a priority last year.
But it’s clear that only new leadership will be enough to overcome Louis DeJoy’s crusade against the critical services the USPS provides.
Thank you for using your voice to bring awareness to this critical issue.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=793%2E35263%2Eleu7Ng) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=793%2E35263%2Eleu7Ng)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---

name: Bernie Moreno
subject: The border is still open...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate
body:

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=85a6cc4b46354206a7cbbd20f6f5c9db&_e=CUo-4L3TmLR-Kz3nQsdlP-0deCt4htQteYxMjblzr5RzPqqEfi8nEZXYti4OKB9JxeBJgUCTcE_m37LpzBCDIrtGZ0inBdZ_iHvzFJvhJcPDDQ2plI3FXbv2pIRTkXq6hbLfIy5DSN39DPn_s9G6oKBOrb_f3nW-Por958wuAMbh4WaI_IE6uus0sp6uv3rAtscTlrSG12p9DhqU0cqAHIMMJTGtJAgTjVDjS1xfxeyGLTtRs3Kmxk7HZiehEJkVYeUVUxlqcnZDSFNjn_VMmoXIyfKcIh1_KhXB6AIlCglc-fXMvhRzDNU4IKVPX6uscTAVSKCQqNsj0RZFKgv17IbMso6sStr4cDWzPF-xqgHm_QyU2OfYVymu1KNgDJhQpapnXjJM0p0wRkdak5HorQ%3D%3D)

Fellow conservative,

The media may not be covering it, Washington insiders may not be talking about it, **but our border is still as insecure as it has ever been,_and we have to fix it!_**

**My family and I came to this country from Colombia when I was 5 years old in search of the American Dream. It was one of the greatest days and honors of my life to be sworn in as a U.S. citizen.**

Watching millions break our laws and cross our wide-open borders illegally is **extraordinarily offensive** to someone like me who came here legally, followed the process, and waited 13 years to become a citizen.

_Becoming an American should be an honor!_

So, when I see people just walking across our border and being rewarded for breaking our laws, **it’s a kick in the gut.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=85a6cc4b46354206a7cbbd20f6f5c9db&_e=CUo-4L3TmLR-Kz3nQsdlP-0deCt4htQteYxMjblzr5RzPqqEfi8nEZXYti4OKB9JxeBJgUCTcE_m37LpzBCDIrtGZ0inBdZ_iHvzFJvhJcPDDQ2plI3FXbv2pIRTkXq6hbLfIy5DSN39DPn_s9G6oKBOrb_f3nW-Por958wuAMbh4WaI_IE6uus0sp6uv3rAtscTlrSG12p9DhqU0cqAHIMMJTGtJAgTjVDjS1xfxeyGLTtRs3Kmxk7HZiehEJkVq4ciiCrTVC-W-mo-bLvoIgkkMdEujdBVQ6DGQb6o93LMJYq2gjYH8EniqHlouxn3Z2HLTiouNbNIjg6OUXNhVeo5xUJeATFSoIJ825fLO1ZOsh2Qk0ai9gATNB8rEWk2xFOoO8J2k0ngMWUugZwAQQ%3D%3D)
If you cross our border illegally, your right for asylum should be forfeited. That shouldn’t be controversial.

As a proud American, I need your help to flip Ohio’s top-target, toss-up Senate seat and win back a Republican Senate majority so we can secure the border and enforce our laws.

[**If you agree with me, please stand with me by supporting my campaign with a donation of $10, $25, $50 or another amount today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=85a6cc4b46354206a7cbbd20f6f5c9db&_e=CUo-4L3TmLR-Kz3nQsdlP-0deCt4htQteYxMjblzr5RzPqqEfi8nEZXYti4OKB9JxeBJgUCTcE_m37LpzBCDIrtGZ0inBdZ_iHvzFJvhJcPDDQ2plI3FXbv2pIRTkXq6hbLfIy5DSN39DPn_s9G6oKBOrb_f3nW-Por958wuAMbh4WaI_IE6uus0sp6uv3rAtscTlrSG12p9DhqU0cqAHIMMJTGtJAgTjVDjS1xfxeyGLTtRs3Kmxk7HZiehEJkVM6DWnC1G8mu7wYJZ_sO2cxPcsPYWyHhi4AP6squ6OtEWW2Sri4KTZ9CbEPo1Xx-Q0cikG-Ik_kjjN1-QIWnb4ZBO2Lz15FISrR9142w_8F5KaOl-ZdTJS1x-u1EBZZNVhN3X0pudXrNmBqDyLniqcQ%3D%3D)

For America,

Bernie Moreno
Republican for U.S. Senate

[ ** Stand with Bernie ➮ Secure the Border **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=85a6cc4b46354206a7cbbd20f6f5c9db&_e=CUo-4L3TmLR-Kz3nQsdlP-0deCt4htQteYxMjblzr5RzPqqEfi8nEZXYti4OKB9JxeBJgUCTcE_m37LpzBCDIrtGZ0inBdZ_iHvzFJvhJcPDDQ2plI3FXbv2pIRTkXq6hbLfIy5DSN39DPn_s9G6oKBOrb_f3nW-Por958wuAMbh4WaI_IE6uus0sp6uv3rAtscTlrSG12p9DhqU0cqAHIMMJTGtJAgTjVDjS1xfxeyGLTtRs3Kmxk7HZiehEJkVA928gHMZD-Q2W6DXoR2-GEx120fQ00A1blT0P5NOPDPVjGeAyrCW_l7qaHLVsD4RwdCIxOlg3NwtYbrywbd8mcBQdmRvdwsx1V0k_ffw-6F441QI49m4ZOq6v14Hw2aTck2fpny8GY2HGkfo1bG1mw%3D%3D)

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

body:
A year ago today, Kansas voters proved that reproductive freedom is a fundamental right for everyone. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67481619/419853325/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGUzMjBhYy02NDMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rw7r_IGT9lam4JBnb_ipAyIr7cb_NECarFMa43nt6So=&emci=ef617b4d-3b31-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=d0e320ac-6431-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Team, After the Supreme Court overturned _Roe_ , Kansas suddenly became a litmus test. When abortion access was left for voters to decide, how would they act? **And what we saw was Kansas voters from all backgrounds come together and _overwhelmingly_ strike down a measure politicians had put on the ballot to ban access to abortion.** It’s proof that people across the country (even in “red” states) agree that we must protect the right to choose. [PROTECT ABORTION ACCESS EVERYWHERE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67481622/419853327/-1579333973?&refcode=E3591-20230802-KSWin1Yr-SB-AbortionReproRights&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGUzMjBhYy02NDMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rw7r_IGT9lam4JBnb_ipAyIr7cb_NECarFMa43nt6So=) A year ago today, we saw the spark that would propel wins in states like Vermont and Michigan, where we fought for reproductive freedom and _won._ **And we won’t stop until the voters restore the right to safe, legal abortion access.** Now, we’re gearing up to keep that spark ablaze in Ohio, our next major battle to codify _Roe._ **Next week’s special election will set the stage for another abortion ballot measure victory, and we need to help our friends on the ground get the vote out.** **[Will you help us honor the legacy that Kansas made for the fight to save abortion access by chipping in $15 or more today? clean_body: A year ago today, Kansas voters proved that reproductive freedom is a fundamental right for everyone. | | Team, After the Supreme Court overturned Roe , Kansas suddenly became a litmus test. When abortion access was left for voters to decide, how would they act? And what we saw was Kansas voters from all backgrounds come together and overwhelmingly strike down a measure politicians had put on the ballot to ban access to abortion. It’s proof that people across the country (even in “red” states) agree that we must protect the right to choose. = A year ago today, we saw the spark that would propel wins in states like Vermont and Michigan, where we fought for reproductive freedom and won. And we won’t stop until the voters restore the right to safe, legal abortion access. Now, we’re gearing up to keep that spark ablaze in Ohio, our next major battle to codify Roe. Next week’s special election will set the stage for another abortion ballot measure victory, and we need to help our friends on the ground get the vote out. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let's keep going, Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Peter, When the country lost its mind during COVID, when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue, Florida stood as a citadel of freedom and a refuge of sanity not only for our citizens, but for people throughout this country. We fought the media. We fought the Left. We fought bureaucrats like Fauci. We kept our state open. We kept our kids in school. And we ended up booming like never before. **We fought back against elites who wanted to plunge society into lockdown dystopia.** We bucked Fauci, we bucked the establishment, and we will do this nationwide when I'm President. **Anthony Fauci forced Americans to stay locked inside their homes and out of work, locked children out of school, demanded masks on their faces, forced them to get COVID jabs, and _lied before Congress._**
---

**As President, I'm going to be willing to stand in and make the tough decisions. You can't coddle bureaucrats like Dr. Fauci._The way you treat somebody like Dr. Fauci is very simple. You tell him, Anthony, you're fired._** I am tired of the excuses, and I refuse to put up with them any longer. Fauci has committed criminal offenses and the lack of accountability he has faced is dangerous. I need your support to take down the Washington elites who are bending the rules, protecting their own, and forcing the American people to pay the price. Please, if you can, will you join me in breaking the swamp?

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Thank you, Peter.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67484142/419855036/2043242937?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjUzNTk4NC02NjMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWLvE4hQyLE3PMx4OWLkmQno4f4l6BfD_x_LzyhAKOI=)
Peter,

I wanted to give a heartfelt **thank you** to everyone who donated to our campaign ahead of Monday’s fundraising deadline. With your support, we exceeded our goal for the month of July!

I’ve said this before, but I’m humbled that our campaign is made up of supporters who consistently come through for us when we need it most. Being able to count on your online support means I can spend less time dialing for dollars, and more time meeting with the people of this community – _like I did last weekend at the Stephenson County Fair!_
[
](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67484143/419855037/2043242937?refcode=em-8.2.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjUzNTk4NC02NjMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cWLvE4hQyLE3PMx4OWLkmQno4f4l6BfD_x_LzyhAKOI=)
_Is there anything better than a midwestern county fair?_ 🌭
I ran for Congress on the premise that we need our elected leaders who are accessible and willing to speak truthfully about the complex issues we face.

That's the work you're making possible, Peter. And with your help, I'm confident we'll earn this community's trust once again in the coming election.

Thanks for being a part of this team. We’ll be in touch soon.

Eric
