name: Andrea Salinas via Blue Amp Action
subject: I have my dad to thank
body:
You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/oinH9UvVGUmpBQnwg3vyqg2?unsubscribedata=SNdkHf9U8c0mm3%2Ba4EUKk6sRFY8sL%2B1LJEiZGi%2BhCJgZGtdWwQ7Cxj0jpyAJpTLkCgpD71zDIUotxFgf8zLRRLROCvrB1aA0fgrYypnceKtOOwyUn64wGQsh8p4RODppoc7yHpHoOdgkM7xwkcmRqCipSVLUJmAB0GYTvqyXMHiN6PrXHQExPaVs65IVqMuU4OT8GJ%2Btzm4Ewa8i9gzLhOmRa2PXe5684%2BK6QscBCPGCOqVwUPqyEmVK9NnaIB%2FPo5YbIY%2Ful%2B5UPEeeU5cieFo9Xgdp7QP2oJ%2BsXF%2FlY%2FjwJ0cX%2BMeq5BiulaqP01qP7M6Bl6X2tRzjzDX4BjhwE3JTxmykKx0lLM6tKAAEzrA0ztjtfBvYn%2FBrjbybFxCLllipYRATdbPe0hGAKIwDqwjgaGPmI8fysJ48uiv3W8K0HrB8YpvMWA0djDi9sDXK .
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/106667/images/unnamed%20%285%29.png]
Hi Peter, it’s Congresswoman Andrea Salinas. I know you’ve heard a lot from my team and me lately about our critical fundraising deadlines or the latest developments in our re-election campaign.
And while those are certainly important, I’m reaching out about something a little different today: My dad.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yyz_salinas-blueamp?amount=15&refcode2=f8a8f026-6731-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yyz_salinas-blueamp?amount=15&refcode2=f8a8f026-6731-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73]
My father, Roberto.
I know change is possible in a single generation, because that’s the story of my dad.
My dad immigrated from Mexico in 1950. He worked in the fields right alongside my grandparents whenever he wasn’t in school, picking tomatoes and cotton.
After a few years of high school, my dad marched down to the local recruiting office and signed up to join the U.S. Marine Corps. He served two tours in Vietnam and, in exchange for his service, received his U.S. citizenship.
Then in the decades that followed, my dad was able to turn the skills from his service into a good-paying union job that provided a middle-class upbringing for me and my sister.
He never had it easy. But with hard-work and determination, my dad paved his way from the fields to the middle class. And now, I’m fighting to ensure that every family across Oregon and the nation has that same chance.
In Congress, I’m fighting everyday to level the playing field for families like yours and mine. Whether it’s working to raise the minimum wage, create good-paying union jobs, or lower costs for working families, we have a lot of work to do, so I need you in this fight with me. So Peter, can I count on you to split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my re-election campaign so I can continue to fight for better opportunities for families like ours? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yyz_salinas-blueamp?amount=15&refcode2=f8a8f026-6731-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yyz_salinas-blueamp?amount=15&refcode2=f8a8f026-6731-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73]
Thank you,
Andrea
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/106667/images/unnamed%20%284%29.png] Cliff Schecter
President, Blue Amp Action
Amplify Good
Follow Us
https://twitter.com/cliffschecter [https://twitter.com/cliffschecter] https://www.linkedin.com/in/cliff-schecter-0873a448/ [https://www.linkedin.com/in/cliff-schecter-0873a448/]
Blue Amp Strategies
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com [info@blueampaction.com]
About BlueAmp Action:
We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world.
We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits.
And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t.
When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.
Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.
So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia.
Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

I know you’ve heard a lot from my team and me lately about our critical fundraising deadlines or the latest developments in our re-election campaign. And while those are certainly important, I’m reaching out about something a little different today: My dad. [] My father, Roberto. I know change is possible in a single generation, because that’s the story of my dad. My dad immigrated from Mexico in 1950. He worked in the fields right alongside my grandparents whenever he wasn’t in school, picking tomatoes and cotton. After a few years of high school, my dad marched down to the local recruiting office and signed up to join the U.S. Marine Corps. He served two tours in Vietnam and, in exchange for his service, received his U.S. citizenship. Then in the decades that followed, my dad was able to turn the skills from his service into a good-paying union job that provided a middle-class upbringing for me and my sister. He never had it easy. But with hard-work and determination, my dad paved his way from the fields to the middle class. And now, I’m fighting to ensure that every family across Oregon and the nation has that same chance. In Congress, I’m fighting everyday to level the playing field for families like yours and mine. Whether it’s working to raise the minimum wage, create good-paying union jobs, or lower costs for working families, we have a lot of work to do, so I need you in this fight with me. So Peter, can I count on you to split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my re-election campaign so I can continue to fight for better opportunities for families like ours? [] Donate [] Thank you, Andrea [] Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good Follow Us [] [] Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com [info@blueampaction.com] About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can unsubscribe: .

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67485843/419857730/-1207006173?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYyOTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDg4NjgxZTMtNjczMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eqNrw6UVYAaYnhlOrrOsxg__lEW8EKQO9sQTe5REWRc=&emci=5ec5704c-7f2d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=d88681e3-6731-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=7307312) Folks, it’s Mark Wes, campaign manager for Lexi Reese here in California, reaching out to get your thoughts on a subject I’ve been thinking a lot about: Listen, it’s one thing for candidates to condemn misinformation or attacks on our democracy. But on this campaign, we’re not just interested in talk — we’re interested in living our values. _**That’s why Lexi is one of the only Senate candidates in the entire country who’s not on Elon Musk's Twitter. As Lexi has said, Twitter has become a destructive dumpster fire that deliberately platforms overt bigotry and harmful conspiracy theories, and our campaign wants no part of it.**_ Will this make it harder to get our message out? Maybe. But we’re more interested in meeting Californians where they are and talking about real-life problems than getting swallowed up in the endless Twitter discourse. **But this campaign isn’t just about Lexi. It’s about you, and our grassroots supporters, and every person in California who’s looking for more out of their leaders in Washington. So we’d like to hear your views about this issue, team.** [_**What do you think of Lexi’s decision to run a Twitter-free campaign for U.S. Senate? Do you support it? Oppose it? Have questions about it? Take our short survey and let us know:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67485845/419857731/-1400246047?refcode=email_080223_twitter-surv&source=email_080223_twitter-surv&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYyOTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDg4NjgxZTMtNjczMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eqNrw6UVYAaYnhlOrrOsxg__lEW8EKQO9sQTe5REWRc=&emci=5ec5704c-7f2d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=d88681e3-6731-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=7307312) | | [Take the Survey →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67485848/419857732/-1400246047?refcode=email_080223_twitter-surv&source=email_080223_twitter-surv&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYyOTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDg4NjgxZTMtNjczMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eqNrw6UVYAaYnhlOrrOsxg__lEW8EKQO9sQTe5REWRc=&emci=5ec5704c-7f2d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=d88681e3-6731-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=7307312)

name: Mississippi GOP
subject: Save Mississippi Children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Mississippi Republican Party
body:
| | | [](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=c3a38aae715f4203aceb2a95def4be4d&_e=B7LvH8CHwvaH-MSaQ3l34WPUOqCJHrIYsH-6fj6PzsrrpBx_Hg83M149mTb_0EsfhKSKBZ7w9bsf92L1i0bvaXrbZcdAJqqoJeoQt8i4cL8qX9QPtwdFh_f9zlzU1CgnJ6kCPvZyws4AQsVVE1Rk0dHUNbhpKyMDnVWbfoYwL9WdcTZh73dZxlC7PY9g2gS7INC3IddYoeLpHUNm1yfOCE8cKZbnJhUN1PI1uveKJoM9Sln75UQD4UGPbFVVswifa_KT4soIO-rHMVpnNiPbNKiNBCu7fifix13Ttv5XLh6iHnIU7vMA_9ZwMNKxeAGu)
---
The children of Mississippi are the backbone of this state and the future of this nation.

Joe Biden and the Democrats want elementary-aged children to learn the intricacies of gender-altering surgeries. Democrats want the foundation of our children’s education to be taught within the parameters of critical race theory.

They do not care if the future of America, our children, learn true life lessons in their younger years. They do not care about developing them into bright and talented leaders and innovators that will carry on the legacy of Mississippi and America as a whole. It seems all they care about is the indoctrination of our kids.

**BUT WE CARE.**

Prove that you do too by **[supporting the Mississippi GOP](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=c3a38aae715f4203aceb2a95def4be4d&_e=B7LvH8CHwvaH-MSaQ3l34WPUOqCJHrIYsH-6fj6PzsrrpBx_Hg83M149mTb_0EsfhKSKBZ7w9bsf92L1i0bvaXrbZcdAJqqoJeoQt8i4cL8qX9QPtwdFh_f9zlzU1CgnJ6kCPvZyws4AQsVVE1Rk0dHUNbhpKyMDnVWbfoYwL9UwvZmFFmB2_60a-dXoumFoNq4YJ1fo8L66TR0M854PDfTRslYoG4fxeoCI3pUFrDp3MpMSIYJ5RBkpgkE15PZndZ4Dv1mM4acqo_NNQTpE1kCwNXLbvHPUCM37X-xBW7ULM_GgVtUffKAdW5CzWgYx)** today!
---
[**DONATE HERE TO STAND FOR OUR KIDS**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=c3a38aae715f4203aceb2a95def4be4d&_e=B7LvH8CHwvaH-MSaQ3l34WPUOqCJHrIYsH-6fj6PzsrrpBx_Hg83M149mTb_0EsfhKSKBZ7w9bsf92L1i0bvaXrbZcdAJqqoJeoQt8i4cL8qX9QPtwdFh_f9zlzU1CgnJ6kCPvZyws4AQsVVE1Rk0dHUNbhpKyMDnVWbfoYwL9UOAD4Akx_uGDkeJL8nUr9VHJkja8Zj2NueuV8u3o8ro07OvI1wIG3LFwBYZxctdqk0Ybci0aLDmjsF3HRY4p5LsQHyEQOMrh2xVOJ4ngaE1Ip0pQSUV-aBFaXzT5YPOBK7-lxcA0aw1Y9VJYcEMMcm)

Thank you, MSGOP

Peter, your commitment to keeping CO-08 blue does not go unnoticed.

On behalf of everyone at Caraveo HQ, thank you, Peter.

In July, we had an ambitious end of month goal of raising $15,000 online. Unfortunately, we fell just short of that goal, Peter, but still, **your commitment to this campaign does not go unnoticed.**

Whether you made a donation to help us meet our end of month goal or volunteered your time to elect Yadira Caraveo last year, your support has made a huge difference and helped Yadira win in 2022.

Our continued work to reelect Yadira in a close district like Colorado’s 8th district isn’t easy - but we appreciate your support through every deadline that comes our way. After all, we’ll be counting on you next year to win a tough reelection fight ahead.

**[We may have fallen short last month, but if you’re able to, a small donation of $8 - or whatever makes sense for you - would help set us up for success in August and the months to come ahead of our reelection campaign. clean_body: Peter, your commitment to keeping CO-08 blue does not go unnoticed. | = On behalf of everyone at Caraveo HQ, thank you, Peter. In July, we had an ambitious end of month goal of raising $15,000 online. Unfortunately, we fell just short of that goal, Peter, but still, your commitment to this campaign does not go unnoticed. Whether you made a donation to help us meet our end of month goal or volunteered your time to elect Yadira Caraveo last year, your support has made a huge difference and helped Yadira win in 2022. Our continued work to reelect Yadira in a close district like Colorado’s 8th district isn’t easy - but we appreciate your support through every deadline that comes our way. After all, we’ll be counting on you next year to win a tough reelection fight ahead. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | ********=****** | ******=****** ---|--- ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** | ******=******** Thank you, Team Caraveo | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: thanks for standing with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter – Last night marked the end of another month for our campaign, and I couldn’t be more grateful for the support you have shown throughout July.

Since Day 1 of my campaign, you made it clear you're ready to take on the political status quo. We have a long road ahead of us, but I’m so proud of everything we have already accomplished together.

From our launch to every fundraising deadline, you’re helping prove our campaign has the grassroots support needed to win this election and make history by electing the first trauma surgeon to Congress. Together, we can create life-saving change in Washington.

Thank you so much for standing with me,

Brian

name: Katie Porter
subject: Nearly half of voters are undecided
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Here’s what sets me apart
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=27535%2E3422442%2EhmTfI-)
In a recent TV interview I was asked what sets me apart from the other Democrats in this race, here’s what I shared:
* I’m the only Democrat in this race who has **never taken corporate PAC money.**
* I’m the only candidate rejecting contributions from federal lobbyists, and Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Big Bank executives.
* I currently represent an equal number of Democrats, Republicans, and independent voters in Congress.**I’ve been able to win in a purple district by talking with voters about the many goals we have in common** , like a strong economy and affordable housing.
* I’ve only been in Congress for five years, but I’ve used the power I have to make real change. I used a hearing to guarantee **free COVID testing** in the early days of the pandemic, and passed legislation to hold Big Pharma responsible for price gouging.

Derek, I'm running because Californians deserve a Senator who will stand up to big corporations and special interests and fight for them. **Our Senator will have the chance to guide our party’s messaging and priorities for decades to come.** The stakes of this race are high, and while polling shows us with a slight lead, our fundraising is lagging behind. [**Can you make a donation of $5 today to help power our campaign?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230802-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAK02_1_TVI_20230802_V1_F&refcode2=27535_3422442_hmTfI-&akid=27535%2E3422442%2EhmTfI-)
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230802-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAK02_1_TVI_20230802_V1_F&refcode2=27535_3422442_hmTfI-&akid=27535%2E3422442%2EhmTfI-)**
Thank you!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAK02_1_TVI_20230802_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=27535_3422442_hmTfI-&akid=27535%2E3422442%2EhmTfI-)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=27535%2E3422442%2EhmTfI-)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=27535%2E3422442%2EhmTfI-)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Andrew R.
subject: The Greater Good
body:
... it's a better way| | | Do you feel the same my friend? I'm tired of self-serving leaders who are more concerned about making a name for themselves than serving their constituents. The performative politics are playing to the extreme fringes of the parties and pitting Americans against one another. **That's why I stand with Will Hurd.** He knows that _**we're better together.**_ When we're divided, nothing gets done and Americans suffer the consequences. Will believes in the American dream in our shared values of freedom, justice, and equality. [_**Chip in $1 and help get his message on the first GOP debate stage in August! He's got to reach 40,000 donors by the 21st.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=ad379d99c1b943c4868dfb8ce9b0df21&_e=b38ywWVLbdAbjkBQ2Z9EB2LMPpDg0vadAlmwOQtSgmRN-bvx-dZRCTitD-YI5yHUr5TDn0AjQVjAyqjKY62r1aGXwOQCKYBF1lAZ1102HvYKRWq6bgxELrmtQ9eNo9l6Jmfa_5HU8wuhD17ao4lbA7DQUspG8Zuc6tP47syHLNOU71IrOox89jqMOPFJy7Ch1KsVzEESEs-y8bryoQ2TUC94L4wIVs5UaNH2jS8BylVmM7jM5xeHH-gTZGeqayVUuFu9rPYhuPiZ1W85Wt8J4RKZq5Q49r7sGDf9UyuLjKnGTsbxvHBibLMZiVWd7PQjYHf8uHYEfHJVxnpWo45u2CU7UcDgN7UVzHLMuMUJ5kb9Fh3uvXm1_j4PoNJqV5fq-ZGHtASWVZMoWRtyQzUNTg%3D%3D) Options are better for America – and I think Will Hurd is the best choice for our country. name: Deadline Approaching via Allred for TX
subject: our first major deadline of this campaign is TONIGHT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, this race is simply too important for us to come up short. Ted Cruz is beatable, but we can’t fall short in July. So please, split a donation of $25 before midnight between my campaign and Serve America to help us flip TX blue! → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
FIRST , Colin Allred launched his campaign and shattered Texas fundraising records on day one!
THEN , experts at Inside Elections and the Cook Political Report upgraded our chances of flipping this seat, shifting Texas from a Solid Republican seat to a BATTLEGROUND .

name: Working Families Party
subject: The next big abortion battle is in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Ohio is just one of several states in the country where Republican lawmakers are working to make it harder for voters to amend their state constitution, in large part to derail efforts to protect abortion rights and access in a post-Roe world. | | | Peter,
In less than one week, Ohio voters will head to the polls for an August special election that could decide the fate of abortion access and citizen-led ballot initiatives in the state. On the ballot is**Issue 1** : a Republican-backed ballot measure to raise the threshold for voters to amend the state constitution from a simple majority of 50% — to an arbitrary supermajority of 60%. This measure was designed to strangle democracy and preemptively kill a separate initiative set to be considered this November to codify abortion rights into the Ohio constitution. It is a shameless power grab that sets a dangerous precedent — and it needs to be rejected. [**Can you chip in to help us mobilize as many voters in Ohio as possible before Tuesday, and to keep fighting for abortion rights everywhere.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUQauvKr_0v-E9iG2M2zTRlyaqZ0zyq4aYPEj1SAlFqRjEX-ysRqxvclxDxIwya6XL2Vms7qW5rSWDnbe6q-3ZfALG7TAIZT0XL99yZ0BV7xJBv1Jedi4kMOWiEChE5MyeuRYR7xYCsX6k8egyex-sgSDxNoDuFyyPpZa30N0s5TMPV2eEoBEFoqeQb-XHDNCXEf9K9jAYOLBG4LJ1NOINaoxewyvUu4p2LQ-ktr4DgMhAQlv6uinhxLVrDGqfKNx7qaw4LKK6Cp0bMaBjQDDD8Sas4NrKgYzcfiwC-YsmBJlKTRy0fla-tzQJ-WVFQinAU2NGmsd-ZLzwbmC7DRdmImHYxGx60GOW3m9vydQHllk/3ye/IGEWFWkGQ6isguRJXYACgw/h0/cA5pHGAM5JhtxJ5FcUgozXvAi5ipJ5R-AyzqcA0g4OE) **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUQauvKr_0v-E9iG2M2zTRlyaqZ0zyq4aYPEj1SAlFqRjEX-ysRqxvclxDxIwya6XLemdI1-G8H7T7082RIYNud-a68c9RAwXPyk5arjeR18oOj2bbaV8Ylvh8FJXVEhqZi2VMoyYuy9XlSzPj2hNNilUFDKq4IGSxr9ATfTH17HnQPwFWUimF_hv7PFcu-bAPSN51ErZaZQg4IFu6YZlIJcUTJybdtRfXEexjH0nLFajsgfMqX1VOyTAP6VI205O8wPiMgJsvf0rIkWRxzWNT6hV3QL3sW9w4pa-VGptBQ4kAIOrCGA61-zsvztCB-_j69lpzMzhCKERwAmJCksRxsKQLiyxmba3_exvsCHTtQ38/3ye/IGEWFWkGQ6isguRJXYACgw/h1/6QbjT7KlQ_3aUDU8-g9T8jTAF7lo_0FDz1udZZwnfYQ)** Ohio is just one of several states in the country where Republican lawmakers are working to make it harder for voters to amend their state constitution, in large part to derail efforts to protect abortion rights and access in a post-Roe world. Republicans know abortion bans are massively unpopular among voters everywhere. name: Laphonza Butler
subject: Hi, I'm the president of EMILY's List
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
I am reaching out to personally share how excited I am that EMILY's List has endorsed Lateefah Simon.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=77%2E1163%2Emm7spX)
Hi, it's Laphonza Butler, president of EMILY's List.
**I am reaching out to personally share how excited I am that EMILY's List has endorsed Lateefah Simon.**
Lateefah has spent her life and career fighting for under-represented Americans to have a voice in government and society, and we know she is committed to continuing doing the same as California's 12th District's representative.
But we can't take anything for granted. With House Republicans increasing their anti-choice, anti-science, and anti-democratic attacks, we need to put our people power behind Lateefah and ensure she's in Congress to fight for our communities.
**[Please donate any amount now to help send Lateefah's bold, progressive leadership to Congress.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230802?refcode=em20230802&refcode2=77_1163_mm7spX&akid=77%2E1163%2Emm7spX)**
**[Donate $10 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230802?amount=10&refcode=em20230802&refcode2=77_1163_mm7spX&akid=77%2E1163%2Emm7spX)**
Whether as an organizer, an activist, or a community leader, Lateefah has been a champion for civil rights and for the women, families, and youth of California.
EMILY's List is proud to endorse this pro-choice champion for election, and we have full confidence in her ability to stand up to extremism and work to protect our democracy in Washington.
Now I'm asking for you to add your support. We're going to need a strong grassroots movement to build up this campaign and send Lateefah to Congress once and for all -- every donation counts.
**[Donate now to support Lateefah Simon and send a powerful, pro-choice champion to represent California's 12th Congressional District in Congress.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230802?refcode=em20230802&refcode2=77_1163_mm7spX&akid=77%2E1163%2Emm7spX)**
Thank you,
Laphonza Butler
President, EMILY's List
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-20230802?refcode=em20230802&refcode2=77_1163_mm7spX&akid=77%2E1163%2Emm7spX)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-wrapper?refcode=em20230802&t=2&refcode2=77_1163_mm7spX&akid=77%2E1163%2Emm7spX)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=77%2E1163%2Emm7spX)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=77%2E1163%2Emm7spX)

Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438,

With House Republicans increasing their anti-choice, anti-science, and anti-democratic attacks, we need to put our people power behind Lateefah and ensure she's in Congress to fight for our communities. Whether as an organizer, an activist, or a community leader, Lateefah has been a champion for civil rights and for the women, families, and youth of California. EMILY's List is proud to endorse this pro-choice champion for election, and we have full confidence in her ability to stand up to extremism and work to protect our democracy in Washington. Now I'm asking for you to add your support. We're going to need a strong grassroots movement to build up this campaign and send Lateefah to Congress once and for all -- every donation counts. Thank you, Laphonza Butler President, EMILY's List

subject: The BOLD CHURCH of Boise, Idaho
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=db9285e01e64483591d9c33297bb1ec6&_e=kr1xrRknreDx1HkfZcx_lcWeH5OTp3-tdpxXSw6qre_TgzJXbt9Vyv6dFlU8HsrvnP0ZVVdYcWDFIxKUGt9G1Mz6IXa2b4RZdnHDr98c09RlIGZBAW82Z_FDitr-rKPC_WT5hftL3TkE936mm1bAQF2F854_WmKR3-ptBdzpACUEdFsm4Ckiu_JpkMj6uwJebbHM93fWKPbwpijQBKdCrD-SjRKcTByEyID1v8HIH__OYmsaEXtTywLTPjZ8jA-YA60TuVtpVMF_K6ggLPqBR0pdXmR3iZwXNTS1NuWLnGccpFP0jUomSt6KhfjJ37nr)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Idaho was unreal!! First, we were welcomed by the state's largest newspaper with an article titled, "Keep your religion out of our government. _Dangerous activists_ coming to Idaho Capitol." As it turns out, we were not the dangerous ones, because a worshiper was assaulted by a Satanist at the event. You just can't make this up! The fire for the Gospel we witnessed in Idaho was POWERFUL, and no newspaper or Satanist can silence the sound of worship!! We praised, we worshiped, we prayed for Idaho and America and rang the liberty bell! Check out highlights of the revival below!
---

Friend,
I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART.
Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back.
My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government.
But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene.
_**When the Deep State invades your own home, it 's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse.**_
The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands.
I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family."
But that thought never even crossed my mind.
_**I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could 've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving.**_
Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option.
So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into...
...I have since been INDICTED **THREE** TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning.
**They 've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man.**
Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man.
_**But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn 't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God.**_
_**The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny.**_
So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign...
...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL _CONTINUE_ TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024.
We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it.
**We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY.**
Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you.
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e96c82dee39d4694bb047e5ed9e95fb5&_e=nYmw8JqIR7h3Gw022R9a2wqv2aDELZ5ZQCDLgLidWykvciaEFuSpfQ9W6vmHaLsgng2eGdKl8qyuReCO7BEkJKlgYrz5tSke_gOJ6nnWkhx7maNL2VLFkWZl9u1nXuxwTxF2FK63SmYWgAYuh4uac0efnJQOVPUkcZeZHI2DvMGIwIFHY6ThDyBh9C4AVbF14sCaxjyAa69OiCnDV6iAchqKaqHNNJ32YHBXYWFvEUhy6PzRMscfXTvCloXLnxfiYZqK0iDK-TcLTWTKS_ned00ce9yRm_E0wKXBVP7SRmYmf-sTJZd8mvhxyl-LPgpLozpVdQ4bz2YqtnKZBcaf2e9NIV9bewABh7Sog9TP8mY2qdbCWFhyHrKkF0a7WH3uIcVwzcuTCnIe7IRh73Vsg3aocFa88enGL5Oa-6T0QIY%3D)**

clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | | Friend, I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART. Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back. My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government. But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene. When the Deep State invades your own home, it 's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse. The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands. I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family." But that thought never even crossed my mind. I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could 've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving. Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option. So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into... ...I have since been INDICTED THREE TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning. They 've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man. Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man. But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn 't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God. The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny. So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign... ...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL CONTINUE TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024. We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it. We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY. Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you. But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. subject: Uphold Justice: President Trump Indictment Pattern Continues
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Pull the curtain back and reveal the puppet masters. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12616905?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=75308d54cc&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
| We stand here today in a time of determination and truth.

President Trump has been strategically & purposefully targeted with countless accusations, designed to create media fodder and distractions before the primary elections. Certain factions on the Left have no boundaries in their attempts to discredit his reputation. This is clearly evident by the orchestration of two unfounded impeachments during his presidency and the weaponizing of Federal law entities. Special Counsel Jack Smith’s indictment of former President Donald Trump on Tuesday matched what has become a familiar pattern: Trump is indicted on the same day as, or the day after, bad legal news emerges about President Joe Biden and his family.

We've created a purposeful petition to give you a voice and aimed at showing support to President Trump from these unjust indictments, and we need your backing.

[**Make your voice heard as a Citizen Cosponsor in our efforts show support of President Trump's against these unprecedented indictments >>**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=545f443468&e=25844e23a8)
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=8e37eafb2d&e=25844e23a8)
---
| [**Support President Trump's >>**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f32436752e&e=25844e23a8)

This petition is more than a piece of paper; it's an opportunity to bring forth your values, ensuring that future generations know the truth about this period in our nation's history.

[**Add your name to stand with the broad spectrum of Republicans**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=577fc93ae1&e=25844e23a8) \- whether you support DeSantis, Trump, or any other candidate - [**our DOJ shouldn't be a political weapon >>**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=efbf3da78a&e=25844e23a8)

[**Sign The Petition >>**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=75de661026&e=25844e23a8)

In the spirit of justice, we ask for your support. _**Regardless of who you back in the Republican primary,**_ we believe in the importance of equality before the law.

Thank you for your continued support and for standing for truth and justice.

[**Sign The Petition >>**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=c15d763251&e=25844e23a8)

---
| Best,

Eric Underwood
Chairman

name: Wiley
subject: RE: dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Hi there - I wanted to forward my email from before. Yesterday was World Lung Cancer Day, and I’m committed to advocating for more medical research funding and the continuation of Medicare and Medicaid. We must continue fighting to ensure all Americans have access to the health care they need.
If you’re ready to help me keep up this fight, chip in to my campaign with $1 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn?refcode=230802-email]
Thank you, Peter.
Wiley
----- Original Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn?refcode=230802-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn?refcode=230802-email]Peter-
Today is World Lung Cancer Day, and I want to tell you a story that I hold close to my heart – I lost my father to lung cancer in high school. He raised us on a farm and taught us valuable life lessons that have made me the person I am today.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn?refcode=230802-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn?refcode=230802-email]
My father's fight against lung cancer was a challenging time for my tight-knit family. As an impressionable young kid, I saw firsthand just how important accessible and affordable health care is. Early on, I realized that no American family should face a crisis like this without access to health care or struggle to afford life-saving treatment.
That’s one of the many reasons I’m in Congress today, fighting for North Carolina families.
Today, as we raise awareness on World Lung Cancer Day, I reaffirm my commitment to comprehensive health care reform. Elected officials like me must work tirelessly to ensure that every individual has access to quality health care regardless of their background or income. This includes early detection, preventive measures, and equitable access to essential treatments for all those affected by lung cancer and other illnesses.
To keep up this important fight, we must work together and elect leaders who know every American should have access to the health care they need. Can you chip in $1 today to help me fight for affordable, accessible health care? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn?refcode=230802-email&amount=1]
I miss my dad so much. But today, we can honor the memory of my father and countless others who have faced the pain of losing a loved one to cancer and ensure that no family has to endure this hardship without the support they need.
With heartfelt gratitude,
Wiley Nickel
Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today!
CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn?refcode=230802-email&recurring=true]
Follow Wiley Online:
https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC [https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC] http://twitter.com/wileynickel [http://twitter.com/wileynickel] http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc [http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc]
Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
Wiley Nickel for Congress
PO Box 563
Raleigh, NC 27602
United States

body:
Grassroots donors power our movement. Can we count on you?

| |

Hey Peter, July is famous in politics for being one of the most difficult months to energize voters. But for us here at Team URD, we hit our July goals and found that folks were more fired up than ever to help us elect Democrats across rural America. But we don’t do that with giant checks from corporations or special interests. We do it with support from grassroots Democrats like you. **In fact, for the month of July, our average donation was just $15.20!** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67493488/419867897/1646350971?refcode=urd-em-230802-julyaverage&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzI3ODBhZjYtNzAzMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xHaBxxTFf9qPjtjf3vRBFsNAsFPR4RtXLIFr2t7ZTA8=)** That’s right – $15.20 is the average contribution we got from our supporters. Peter — we’re so excited to announce that we’ve officially endorsed **Sharon Hurt** in the race for **Mayor of Nashville**!

A non-profit leader and lifelong public servant, Sharon has been a true advocate for **all** of Nashville’s communities. And, as Council Member At-Large she understands that Nashville must work to provide opportunities for the people and put marginalized, and oftentimes, forgotten communities first.

Here at The Collective PAC, we’re dedicated to increasing Black political representation at all levels of government, and we’re proud to support Sharon, someone who has **always** put the people of Nashville first.

Peter — we’re so excited to announce that we’ve officially endorsed Sharon Hurt in the race for Mayor of Nashville! A non-profit leader and lifelong public servant, Sharon has been a true advocate for all of Nashville’s communities. And, as Council Member At-Large she understands that Nashville must work to provide opportunities for the people and put marginalized, and oftentimes, forgotten communities first. Here at The Collective PAC, we’re dedicated to increasing Black political representation at all levels of government, and we’re proud to support Sharon, someone who has always put the people of Nashville first. Peter Willis —

Yesterday, Donald Trump was indicted by a federal grand jury on criminal charges that he tried to overturn the 2020 election results in the lead up to the violent, deadly January 6 attack on the US Capitol.

Since yesterday, Trump’s lackies have been pushing the idea that he shouldn’t have to face charges until after the 2024 election—if at all.

Trump cannot be allowed to hide behind his sycophantic, bigoted campaign to evade the justice system. It’s time for him to face the music.

Sign on if you agree: we all deserve a speedy trial and no more grandstanding from The Donald. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/trump_indictment_pt/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230803_PT_trumpindictment_0_3MO_stopdonaldviaourrevolution_na_na_trumpindictment&t=1011&akid=4510%2E5885482%2Eb32Thd)

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Here’s what I’ve been up to on the campaign trail.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67493739/419868723/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA0YjI5MmEtNzIzMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sodaR1juhH0J6cjDFZIAYE1b-8MVC_WvKDXnO3_laEY=) Friend,

I want to take a moment and thank you for your ongoing support of our campaign. Last week, we reached out about the importance of meeting our July fundraising target. You stepped up in a big way to help us get there. We met our monthly goal, and are now headed into August with momentum.

I also wanted to make sure you’re up-to-date with what's been happening on the campaign trail over the past few weeks -- July was packed with events. Below are some photos to give you an inside look.

Again, thank you so much for your support of our campaign. It means the world to me and everyone here at HQ.

All my best,

Laura
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67493740/419868724/-1241314520?refcode=em-8.2.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA0YjI5MmEtNzIzMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sodaR1juhH0J6cjDFZIAYE1b-8MVC_WvKDXnO3_laEY=)****
---

* * *
I had the pleasure of joining **Social Compassion in Legislation** for a celebration of their legislative accomplishments in service of animal welfare. This is an issue I care deeply about, and I look forward to continuing my work advancing animal welfare.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67493744/419868728/-1241314520?refcode=em-8.2.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA0YjI5MmEtNzIzMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sodaR1juhH0J6cjDFZIAYE1b-8MVC_WvKDXnO3_laEY=)

body:
Meanwhile, he’s taking FIVE weeks off for Senate recess.
#
Peter — while Senator Tuberville brings chaos to the lives of our troops and military families by blocking 200+ promotions, he’s taking FIVE weeks off for Senate recess.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35366?refcode=em20230802-3494&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3494%2E614464%2EXyfD3H)
Like me, and every current and former member of our armed forces, Senator Tuberville swore an oath to always do his duty for our country. But unlike the rest of us, he’s broken that oath.
**I’m running for U.S. Senate because our service members and their families deserve someone who will stand up for them in Washington** — not another politician like Tommy Tuberville or Josh Hawley, who use their own power to put the livelihoods of everyday, working people in jeopardy.
We’re building this campaign without a cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or defense contractors, so you’ll know I’ll always fight for real people like you. But I need your help to keep growing our grassroots movement. So Peter:

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6da3392705164ecd924435ca945dcc13&_e=pIhCyscj5ewPwJNqo_LOpYTJUAlZu4-Jvw08wnZ-a_y6wvMmxPFS1pa7TiQmoPCL8-dG99oONpEC6Dv5qSXVXX157xWUEcCD61WH1W9uUrFQtQaOJEiSMRPf4cVwHDXEZqAiPcA79FDZ8SfzxskTtgw8utocKObTVN-_IFNYbd97xFSBVMKrHxsuw3Msph0pS4VybnFHzUOpVp9uR7J_WKSbmRT66U3GW3T_HSeMbYKltCeP_9OKX6CKslPlo_52Xx44Cj4fSxdXlMb-PkhfTCqseAnoP0o-2N4Enj0gYcKG7bZlZewh_t58QOVAYZEYpmi8FxaXg7d_1YEN_A3HWuaf3tU7hr1KSBiOdugXc7yhDux6WFO28zOjfdta8hJDZ9J_DxNUeYOSBYWh2ta-0Q%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6da3392705164ecd924435ca945dcc13&_e=pIhCyscj5ewPwJNqo_LOpYTJUAlZu4-Jvw08wnZ-a_y6wvMmxPFS1pa7TiQmoPCL8-dG99oONpEC6Dv5qSXVXX157xWUEcCD61WH1W9uUrFQtQaOJEiSMRPf4cVwHDXEZqAiPcA79FDZ8SfzxskTtgw8utocKObTVN-_IFNYbd97xFSBVMKrHxsuw3Msph0pS4VybnFHzUOpVp9uR7J_WKSbmRT66U3GW3T_HSeMbYKltCeP_9OKX6CKslPlo_52wV7unqeObIArXWt-u3VzvYM4HerhcuEfhQgJaz8S1N2CTQcUMIyrVO4Qhy07oZ99DVs216t7acE8S-nPOTGMOE3gwzU5GGF0fFNuJgh2ahgIUMnq91_d4r8q4xA-3B-nNDDqkJS2kS_4TDkLw2bRSg%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6da3392705164ecd924435ca945dcc13&_e=pIhCyscj5ewPwJNqo_LOpYTJUAlZu4-Jvw08wnZ-a_y6wvMmxPFS1pa7TiQmoPCL8-dG99oONpEC6Dv5qSXVXX157xWUEcCD61WH1W9uUrFQtQaOJEiSMRPf4cVwHDXEZqAiPcA79FDZ8SfzxskTtgw8utocKObTVN-_IFNYbd97xFSBVMKrHxsuw3Msph0pS4VybnFHzUOpVp9uR7J_WKSbmRT66U3GW3T_HSeMbYKltCeP_9OKX6CKslPlo_52d07Nw2heCJhfJ8qwcF3p_Lhx2zK655_PKDTJEJ6ZYYmoQQ4VOjahzukgwca-2EIiLnSccvHquvZPDprITtgEtqmGHnjw23QIm1sgOX_b9rN6v2DUfN7v_G5kEHOngezuEgSC1il1cN4K_4R6nnnBAw%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. body:
Joe Biden has made a disastrous mistake >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/5cc12ad433012633/283e83b496cd6a91c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, The latest move in Joe Biden’s revenge politics: **KEEPING SPACE COMMAND HQ IN COLORADO** This is outrageous. **Over two and a half years ago, the Air Force CHOSE Huntsville, Alabama as the best place to house the headquarters for Space Command.** Now, instead of doing what is right for our national security, Joe Biden has injected politics into the military.
---
[**EXPOSE JOE BIDEN’S NONSENSE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/5cc12ad433012633/efba6763551bc266c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Colorado didn’t even fall into the top three choices... **_it was FIFTH!_** This decision is yet another broken promise from the Biden administration, who continues to politicize our military, destroy our recruiting, and misuse our tax dollars for their extremist social agenda. **This fight is ABSOLUTELY not over. I will continue to fight this as long as it takes to bring Space Command where it would best be served.** Peter, I hope you will join in and not back down. Joe Biden and his far-left cronies must be held accountable for meddling in the security of our nation.

| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kTGPozAQhX-N6UBmxmtDQXE5i-Kiu2aLbBeZsZPMChsE5tD--xNR9trvPY3ep3FxHvn21QlzEgAP9qsAEPhDAJzV6eOPPl_OttT381Ba_ab2I4WfAiB_zeF_9XWlCtHxeFBjC98BNUBUhK7WbS1lo6QuHl0doH0jkgYwOEWNbuoBjDbkVWNqqgvuQALKRgJIxBorakFJeXMS9c14qYWSO6fKT8mN_jMvW5wrmmIxdo-c5_U5qRfQr4G2JVQ7pyX4o3Ew9zeULoaFyZWfE6dc3rbkF8crp3tJU4yccwgCeiSFrRuGwQfvPJLAfsvxGoPnLQq0L1l9wHXaFgoCLfHVvRi5ODu-J4H2W-g7mVIOKQu0bWOUAH1NI3uB9vLYL7Ht7Ts84fMdaH8P9ce7_uVOxdL5eedx5FUboeT9WHCI_QsAAP__4MSLwg)

Friend,
According to news reports, I will be arraigned tomorrow in the belly of the beast: _Washington, D.C._
There’s something deeply troubling about learning details of your own arraignment – as your freedom hangs in the balance – from leaks from the press.
Some outlets indicate that I may even be ARRESTED.
The Swamp that I am on a mission to drain is trying to imprison me for life as an innocent man.
**But I am not afraid in the slightest.**
_This is the mission I signed up for when I first chose to run for president as a complete political outsider._
When you begin to drain the Swamp, you finally catch a glimpse of the vile monsters that had been lurking at the bottom.
Biden’s weaponized Department of Justice is one of those monstrous entities that is tearing our nation to pieces.
Crooked Joe does not have the courage to face me in a free and fair election at a time when our country is in serious decline, so he’s cravenly weaponized the DOJ to try and put me in JAIL as a last-ditch effort to stay in power as the least popular president in history.
There’s no other way to say it: our nation is teetering on the brink of tyranny.
And at this moment, I am reminded of the words of our Founding Fathers who said that America would be a Republic so long as you can keep it.
We will soon find out if we can keep it. . .
If you’re doing poorly due to the monstrous figures entrenched in the Washington Swamp, then please stop reading here. I only wanted to keep you updated on my reported arraignment tomorrow.
_Otherwise, I ask that you peacefully stand by my side now more than ever._

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: POLL: Senate race in a dead heat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
This will be our toughest fight yet.

| Peter —

We’ve always known that an open Senate seat in a swing state would be close. But, a new poll just further proved that.

A new poll released by the National Republican Senate Committee of Michigan voters shows a generic Republican candidate in a statistical dead heat with Elissa:
---
2024 Michigan Senate Race
Elissa Slotkin (D) 42%
Republican candidate (R) 44%
Undecided: 14%
| | | [DONATE NOW >> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67494187/419870463/1285278003?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230802-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkZDFkM2IzLTc0MzEtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1NBOckAn5aII5-eKIlt8xcbBjTlYfjS6sCGjW1GubPc=)
---
Despite the great success Michigan Democrats have had recently, Michiganders know it’s not at all permanent: Michigan is a swingy state that can go back and forth from Democrat to Republican if we don’t stay sharp and organized.

**While it’s clear this race will be our toughest fight yet, Elissa is no stranger to tough races, and we know exactly what it will take to win.** She’s won three tough elections in five years, and she has a serious, data-informed plan to win.

That’s why we’ve started building a foundation early to reach voters in every corner of Michigan and educate them on Elissa’s background, and why she’s the best person to represent our state in the U.S. Senate.

This poll shows that right now, 14% of Michigan voters are undecided and 46% of independent voters have yet to hear about Elissa, so there’s still a lot of work we have to do to win. We need to get to these folks through TV ads, digital outreach, and by expanding our ground game to meet people where they are.

**But the stakes are high – this poll proves that Democrats’ majority in the Senate will come down to what happens right here in Michigan.** We can’t take anything for granted, and we can’t take our foot off the gas.

So, if there was ever a time to make your first donation to help Elissa keep this seat blue, it’s right now.

[**_Will you split $10 between Elissa’s campaign for Senate and Fight for Progress in Michigan today?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67494188/419870464/1285278003?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230802-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkZDFkM2IzLTc0MzEtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1NBOckAn5aII5-eKIlt8xcbBjTlYfjS6sCGjW1GubPc=)

That’s why we’ve started building a foundation early to reach voters in every corner of Michigan and educate them on Elissa’s background, and why she’s the best person to represent our state in the U.S. Senate. This poll shows that right now, 14% of Michigan voters are undecided and 46% of independent voters have yet to hear about Elissa, so there’s still a lot of work we have to do to win. We need to get to these folks through TV ads, digital outreach, and by expanding our ground game to meet people where they are. But the stakes are high – this poll proves that Democrats’ majority in the Senate will come down to what happens right here in Michigan. We can’t take anything for granted, and we can’t take our foot off the gas. So, if there was ever a time to make your first donation to help Elissa keep this seat blue, it’s right now. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you. We couldn’t do any of this without you, Team Slotkin * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: Cori Bush via Justice Democrats
subject: [signatures needed] AIPAC is out of alignment with the Democratic Party, Democratic voters, and democracy itself.
body:
I’m unafraid to speak out for Palestinian human rights. More Democrats should join me.
#
Peter,
My campaign for Congress challenged the conventional wisdom that you have to uncritically support Israel’s government in order to win U.S. elections. I’ve joined other progressives in Congress who are unafraid to speak out for Palestinian human rights, and to hold our government accountable for its complicity in apartheid.
Our advocacy reflects a shift in Democratic voters, the majority of whom sympathize with Palestinians and don’t want our taxpayer dollars to fund human rights abuses.
**As we’ve built power, anti-Palestinian lobbying group AIPAC is mobilizing against us.** In 2022, AIPAC created its first-ever PAC and a SuperPAC called the United Democracy Project. Along with the Democratic Majority for Israel, **these groups spent $41 million to defeat progressives in 2022’s election cycle.**
**Pro-Trump billionaires poured millions of dollars into these PACs** , in order to shape the Democratic Party in primaries and support Republicans against Democrats in general elections. In addition to this anti-democratic work, **AIPAC PAC keeps endorsing insurrectionist Republicans.**
**Democrats need to recognize that AIPAC is an anti-democratic group, and reject support from AIPAC. That’s how we take back our power and refuse to be silenced when it comes to speaking out against injustice.**
[**Please sign now to tell Democratic candidates running in 2024: Do not take money from AIPAC PAC or its network of PACs. Reject endorsements and funding from these right-wing, anti-democratic groups.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136259?t=1&akid=30185%2E1203867%2Ekc_SMm)
**[Sign Now](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136259?t=2&akid=30185%2E1203867%2Ekc_SMm)**
More people are recognizing that AIPAC and its connected PACs are out of alignment with the Democratic Party, Democratic voters, and democracy itself.
After a Democratic candidate for Congress in North Carolina took donations from and embraced support from the AIPAC PAC, the North Carolina Democratic Party’s Progressive Caucus rescinded their endorsement of her.
The Caucus wrote: “We stand by our progressive American values of democracy and human rights for all.”
If we truly support democracy, human rights, justice, and equity, that means we have to take a stand for Palestinian rights. That may make us targets and anger those who want to maintain the unjust status quo. But we can’t let that stop us.
[**Will you sign the petition to tell Democratic candidates to refuse support from AIPAC?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136259?t=3&akid=30185%2E1203867%2Ekc_SMm)
**[Sign Now](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136259?t=4&akid=30185%2E1203867%2Ekc_SMm)**
Thank you for continuing to expand what’s possible as we build the world our communities need and deserve.
With love,
Rep. Cori Bush
Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=5&akid=30185%2E1203867%2Ekc_SMm) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=6&akid=30185%2E1203867%2Ekc_SMm) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230802-30185-footer&t=7&refcode2=30185_1203867_kc_SMm&akid=30185%2E1203867%2Ekc_SMm)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: We’re training the leaders of tomorrow, today
body:
This week, our Youth Civic Engagement Fellows graduate: | | |
---
Friend, As our 12 Youth Fellow students prepare to graduate from the fellowship this weekend, we’re already preparing for what’s next. In addition to training young BIPOC students on the skills they need to be organizers in their communities, our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC also holds an annual Campaign School to train, support, and elect women and people of color who are ready to run for office and win. In the past, campaign school graduates have gone on to run for Detroit City Clerk, City Council, Board of Police Commissioners, and more. Since graduating from our program, multiple people have already won races for elected office. To make our programs inclusive and accessible, both our Youth Fellowship and our Campaign School are completely free for participants. We even provide youth fellows with a $1,000 stipend upon graduation. This is all possible because of generous donations to our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC. [**Pitch in $5 now to power our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC as we provide people of all ages and backgrounds with the skills they need to give back to their communities and strengthen our multiracial democracy.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xiTp294kwQgL20EQO1kNre_TfaNn1GLYqKgiboxTbn-R0feGI8zGmlGuW4HPPFVL0bUuuiMSyGxIoxfi-Zct4ZOE6toCMEipqcfastxpkNqVPT_yCXsVR8j7weGkssTevj1Krz-n0SieqLwYQgqvSiZKu26SWT2GfsEq3gIWnYLdhzSYlLWQdQ2ikgcXx5ITG6pDJqpm4QE2esemhY-3ma3ONRGNG1e2xVQeHS_vtCBBaEFfaKZmJuz6VdtRPVj7XHLULNJ4NTIpFTjIt1SF3LzjFno6GIN0rbPOtVFbFIBc5IvmlOtIRPxMvs-S-ctEh3FgeNVXillkj_bE7vAzfRv1F_6i_MaNrEDzcmhhzg3Q/3ye/1jura2HqTJy6Xgl6_-mNjw/h0/vPiRszCWzeDyowBa-mtOpuxxJkdWbeGhwk2KwQbt7_8) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xiTp294kwQgL20EQO1kNre_TfaNn1GLYqKgiboxTbn-UjZ1XgRSOW-5PubRwCxtRcQ136gz7Kzp2J-nrUzfaJoU33RJnjIJjyg9OS4cSqy0LlvpUjWESFgfyrjnr4GHJhcgLnCLHcFXWpiOtWPasNGY1rhvswAk11SOYLGoF32QCVIAp0d6RjOQvOAVZAplLsLVJ0FXL7MaL59rdeX-sJPAnQAzlGpXFGxy8plXIkSjYmKsvhfEkq65jGydhwCA0kdbpsCLelQ4R2__zV-mr5yU3CV9IZTvqrelrUDNlcgPOstgQPzTtQEbesjmtpKQVy3PuCzsH4TdUtnpxYaZCMURVZvX8y_jLz3arwHcFSBo6zLYkZyosbE58YHSAjcnmJc0gfMhGkchJu7Zt8jgWDoJwZ0ROh5eQ_IZITYk4v-kQ/3ye/1jura2HqTJy6Xgl6_-mNjw/h1/K7toni57LP5WfAaEC8OWIG-nM5FOpk2oUOgQXY1hIlA)

Together, we’re providing young people with the skills to organize on the critical issues of our time from environmental justice to gun violence prevention, and we’re training candidates on how to run effective campaigns that are truly rooted in community.
This is how we put the power back in the hands of people, not greedy billionaires and corporations.
Always serving you,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Tue, Aug 1, 2023
Subject: We’re training the leaders of tomorrow, today
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
If there’s one positive thing that came out of Donald Trump’s presidency, it’s that more people got involved in politics for the first time to fight back against the hate and the harm caused by Trump’s words and actions. **In fact, in the 2020 presidential election, half of all young people ages 18 to 29 voted―an 11 point increase from the 2016 election.** 1
But, young people aren’t just fighting back against hate. **They’re getting involved in the critical issues of our time** , from environmental justice to the labor movement to reforming our criminal legal system to gun violence prevention, clean water, education justice, and more.
**To harness this energy, we started our Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship where we train young people ages 14 to 24 on grassroots organizing and communications, with a focus on training young people of color.** **From our past graduating classes, 83% of participants went on to become organizers in their communities** and 100% are either attending or have graduated from college.
This week, our latest cohort will graduate from the 2023 class and take their new-found skills back to their communities to help organize for change. Our current graduating class of 12 fellows is 100% BIPOC, 85% female, 7% male, and 7% non-binary.
This critical organizing training, and the $1,000 stipend for finishing the course, is made possible through generous donations to our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.
[**Donate today to support young people as they seek to give back to their communities and cultivate skills that are critical to the future of our multiracial democracy.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xiTp294kwQgL20EQO1kNre_TfaNn1GLYqKgiboxTbn-UVqU7YUmSSa97_UbDJXaczxrIiWjsmbCxQg2m28MPCYoFJanyg-I14FaysTtDy2N3qhNB1U8p0VQJ83ovm0UVy3LLGRYol6DB8-9wunrHY1M9hqNDXh6Ly6-1Fs_baEzPmOF8EVPf52aIjmcnAi22kWOa-moZdLNyBKJM9LuQ7nFUzCaaGPqhDNhlspkm74OMOrbWgnNW4ODkf3gMMVtLvIDWjHshl5KOnZsc-AF2B0Sd1MZFHOhzUzWe5eA1WEH2GlVqMoGmgAF6DBWiDE4JfgekvAF_SEk5t6fuLBPrUTCOfAy9SWsmAW5FT9A0Zx4A/3ye/1jura2HqTJy6Xgl6_-mNjw/h7/dMp3QK2YlR79OK9CkIABXuOazJTjtBAsuSRbg5vW1CY)

After this week’s Youth Fellowship graduation, **we’ll begin preparing for our third annual Rooted in Community Campaign School** to train, support, and elect women and people of color who are rooted in community.
Traditionally, two-thirds of participants are women, and that’s intentional. We need more women at all levels of government if we’re going to make the urgent, bold changes that people need in order to survive and thrive. And multiple graduates of our Campaign School have won their races for elected office.
Like me, the candidates we’re training want to better serve the communities that raised them. **To ensure that everyone can join—including low-wealth and working-class people—we make this intensive campaign training free for participants.**

clean_body: This week, our Youth Civic Engagement Fellows graduate: | | | Friend, As our 12 Youth Fellow students prepare to graduate from the fellowship this weekend, we’re already preparing for what’s next. In addition to training young BIPOC students on the skills they need to be organizers in their communities, our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC also holds an annual Campaign School to train, support, and elect women and people of color who are ready to run for office and win. In the past, campaign school graduates have gone on to run for Detroit City Clerk, City Council, Board of Police Commissioners, and more. Since graduating from our program, multiple people have already won races for elected office. To make our programs inclusive and accessible, both our Youth Fellowship and our Campaign School are completely free for participants. We even provide youth fellows with a $1,000 stipend upon graduation. This is all possible because of generous donations to our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Together, we’re providing young people with the skills to organize on the critical issues of our time from environmental justice to gun violence prevention, and we’re training candidates on how to run effective campaigns that are truly rooted in community. This is how we put the power back in the hands of people, not greedy billionaires and corporations. From our past graduating classes, 83% of participants went on to become organizers in their communities and 100% are either attending or have graduated from college. We need more women at all levels of government if we’re going to make the urgent, bold changes that people need in order to survive and thrive. And multiple graduates of our Campaign School have won their races for elected office. Like me, the candidates we’re training want to better serve the communities that raised them. To ensure that everyone can join—including low-wealth and working-class people—we make this intensive campaign training free for participants. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for building a future that includes all of us, not just the wealthy few. Always serving you, Rashida 1 * | Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003, not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

clean_body: Our team is in the middle of picking a brand-new sticker design, but we’re divided! Before we begin production, we wanted our supporters to get exclusive access to these designs. | | | | | Our team is in the middle of picking a brand-new sticker design, but we’re divided! Before we begin production, we wanted our most engaged and active supporters in your community to get exclusive access to these designs and share which is your favorite: There are many reasons why sticker season is special here at the DLCC... Reason #1: It’s our way of saying thank you. We made history last year – despite the GOP’s outsized spending, record fundraising, and a decades-long advantage at the state legislative ballot level – because of your continued support and commitment. Reason #2: Stickers allow you to express an important message: State legislatures are beacons of change – and grassroots supporters like you are the backbone of that work for a better future. Reason #3: We could all use a little fun in our day! And there’s no better place to start than by weighing in on which design should be our next sticker. It couldn’t be easier to vote: Happy Sticker Season, Team DLCC | ---|---|--- | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. | | August 2, 2023
---
| WEEKLY NEWSLETTER
---
| Issue 2
---
| | **A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)** Since the start of my campaign, I’ve been asked why I am running for Tim Kaine’s seat. This is not Tim Kaine’s seat, it's Virginia’s seat. Virginians deserve someone who shares their belief in God, family and country. Virginians deserve someone who will fight for them.

I am running for the U.S. Senate because we need leaders in Washington DC, not career politicians and bureaucrats. I fought for us for 25 years and I'm not done fighting. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)
---
|
---

name: Will Rollins
subject: A heartfelt thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67494616/419872261/-1669222325?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWY3Nzg5Ni03NzMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MVri_GL0Co8wFLcP5HDNqfEjExwGiITA_i_EljqJ3mg=)
Peter,

I want to give my heartfelt thanks to everyone who donated ahead of Monday’s end-of-month fundraising deadline. Not only did we meet our goal, July 31 saw more donations in a single day than any day aside from our launch day.

I’m humbled, Peter. With your help, our momentum is continuing to grow, and truth is, that’s _exactly_ what it’s going to take to flip this seat.

Yesterday's news gave us a clear look at what's at stake in our race. The Department of Justice has indicted former President Donald Trump. This time, over his efforts to stop the transfer of power after the 2020 election and for his role in the Jan. 6 Capitol attack.

**As a reminder, my opponent Ken Calvert was one of the MAGA members of Congress who violated his oath and joined Trump’s effort to overturn the election. He voted against creating an independent commission to investigate Jan. 6, and even called for charges against those who assaulted the Capitol to be dropped.**

While Calvert protected Trump, I was working alongside law enforcement to track down and arrest insurrectionists in my capacity as a counterterrorism prosecutor.

Unlike Calvert, I believe in the rule of law -- that's a big reason why I’m running to unseat him. We need a new generation of leaders who will put the country before party politics. And we need new leadership focused on fighting the battles for our future, not the former president’s battles over his past.

We have a long road ahead of us, and I'm thankful to have you by my side.

Will
