clean_body: | = Peter, I want to give my heartfelt thanks to everyone who donated ahead of Monday’s end-of-month fundraising deadline. Not only did we meet our goal, July 31 saw more donations in a single day than any day aside from our launch day. I’m humbled, Peter. With your help, our momentum is continuing to grow, and truth is, that’s exactly what it’s going to take to flip this seat. Yesterday's news gave us a clear look at what's at stake in our race. The Department of Justice has indicted former President Donald Trump. This time, over his efforts to stop the transfer of power after the 2020 election and for his role in the Jan. 6 Capitol attack. As a reminder, my opponent Ken Calvert was one of the MAGA members of Congress who violated his oath and joined Trump’s effort to overturn the election. He voted against creating an independent commission to investigate Jan. 6, and even called for charges against those who assaulted the Capitol to be dropped. While Calvert protected Trump, I was working alongside law enforcement to track down and arrest insurrectionists in my capacity as a counterterrorism prosecutor. Unlike Calvert, I believe in the rule of law -- that's a big reason why I’m running to unseat him. We need a new generation of leaders who will put the country before party politics. And we need new leadership focused on fighting the battles for our future, not the former president’s battles over his past. We have a long road ahead of us, and I'm thankful to have you by my side. Will | = | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Toxic neonics are killing off bees and threatening people and the planet
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1910680?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) that it’s time to BAN toxic neonics that are driving bees and pollinators closer to EXTINCTION!** [**Add your name now! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1910681?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Friend, bees might be small, but they are mighty. Bees and other essential pollinators are responsible for _**1 in 3 bites**_ that we eat, including **75%** of our most nutritious foods like fruits, veggies, and nuts. It’s hard to imagine a world with far less of the healthy foods we love readily available at the local grocery store! But that’s what could happen if the massive decline in bees continues. **_An “insect apocalypse.” A “second Silent Spring.” A “catastrophic collapse of nature’s ecosystems.”_ **We aren’t being dramatic here, Friend. This is how scientists are describing the loss of bees and other insects and the impact it would have on our planet! _**A key driver in this devastating pollinator decline?**_ Neonicotinoids. Also known as neonics, these toxic pesticides are _**FATAL**_ to bees. Neonics can impact bees’ ability to navigate and reproduce and can even kill bees directly on contact. But they’re also the _MOST WIDELY USED INSECTICIDES_ in agriculture. The EPA has a chance to **BAN neonics** once and for all. Instead, it might actually _**APPROVE**_ these pesticides for another 15 years! We can’t let that happen, Friend. _**So we’re counting on environmentalists like YOU to be a voice for the bees today:**_ [**Will you speak up and take action now to protect our pollinators, our food supply, and the planet? **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1910682?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1910683?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Neonics can directly hurt PEOPLE, too, Friend. These toxic pesticides can make their way into the _**very food you eat.**_ They have been linked to health impacts like birth defects of the heart and brain, hormone disruption, and autism.
But Big Ag pesticide corporations continue to DOWNPLAY the harms of neonics and the devastating effects they have on pollinators, people, and the planet. Driven by their GREEDY and RECKLESS pursuit of money, these companies are putting us all at RISK in order to make a profit.
The European Union has already banned the worst neonics, and now we need the EPA to follow suit and protect us, too. _**Please, Friend, your voice is critical in the fight to protect the health of bees, humans, and the Earth.**_ [**SIGN NOW: Tell the EPA to BAN toxic neonics before it’s too late! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1910684?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1910683?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Your voice is critical to protecting our pollinators,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---
##### Email Preferences:
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D251140&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)
##### Learn more:
[www.foe.org/news](http://www.foe.org/news) [www.foe.org/about-us](http://www.foe.org/about-us) [www.foeaction.org](http://www.foeaction.org)
---

[](https://www.facebook.com/foe.us?fref=ts) [](https://twitter.com/foe_us) [](https://www.flickr.com/photos/foeaction/)

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: They know that we can win.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
It goes without saying that there's a great deal of dark money involved in the fight against climate change right now. That dark money is intended for us to not act in this situation.
We have lobbyists from companies like Exxon Mobil who are bragging about their role in shaping our federal legislation, curtailing our ambitions, and fighting against key provisions to draw down our carbon emissions.
So many of the people that are in charge of blocking action on climate will not see the world that they’re leaving to generations to come.
**We have a moral responsibility to leave this world better than we found it.** This is not about theory anymore, this is not about challenging the science anymore.
Wildfires will impact all of us.
Floods and waters will impact all of us.
But they will not impact all of us equally. The most vulnerable communities will be left behind — **but we can stop it.**
It doesn’t have to be this way. Not only can we stop it, and not only can we draw down our emissions, but we can create millions of jobs doing so — millions of good, union jobs.
We can transition to renewable energy.
We can build infrastructure that all people can enjoy that’s not just attuned to the wealthy.
We can restore our lands.
We can build this world, and this world is close. So close. And that is why we see dark money mobilizing the way it is right now. **Because they know that we can win.**
So we're going to keep fighting.
Thanks for being a part of this,
Alexandria
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230802-2.wOqmmg&refcode=em20230802-4739-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=4739%2E2526796%2E9GvREJ)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230802-2?refcode=em20230802-4739-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=20&refcode2=4739_2526796_9GvREJ&akid=4739%2E2526796%2E9GvREJ)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230802-4739-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=21&akid=4739%2E2526796%2E9GvREJ)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=22&akid=4739%2E2526796%2E9GvREJ) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=23&akid=4739%2E2526796%2E9GvREJ) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=24&akid=4739%2E2526796%2E9GvREJ)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=4739%2E2526796%2E9GvREJ)

name: SIGN THE LETTER ( via VPP)
subject: Add your name to thank President Biden!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You’ve been handpicked as one of our top supporters »
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50921?t=6&akid=9682%2E878179%2EUSuTk7) **Listen, President Biden has been an INCREDIBLE President and defender of our democracy.** [**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50921?t=7&akid=9682%2E878179%2EUSuTk7) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50921?t=8&akid=9682%2E878179%2EUSuTk7)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear President Biden,**

**_I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!_**

Over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs.

**I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, especially now that Donald Trump is running for President again.**

So as your reelection race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country! [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50921?t=9&akid=9682%2E878179%2EUSuTk7) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50921?t=10&akid=9682%2E878179%2EUSuTk7)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: John Padora

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
| | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=8cc08efcc0224d54b3969b4e2731c4a1&_e=HkJmv5zCc3WKdeKrNADZgcBMV5udGVqJCKIQwuMN74mJnaOEdB1kB8LuIezmezAe8aywZDhXqO2eBu3SSsmrpWeuyf1aSULJCGuiqiqQWSM6txgSDg9BuIK65DQ366062SXdlZ1bzpppvcxehQUWAPx-up5w2rRlSg0Hr5Q9Cw5ix2A-re7EC0rjKqtKArbi8n6dSmaCIJ4f_BNrFnek01-HRqEbabHIXioVuqWJYk-QamA4yMj1iuu9iukFVHbn1Vhl2F2wptXnGeNE1aLTbH0SryFYm_LCBdXjH1Fyt2mQ-5FF4hDK_5BNAmfSTWFButYX0Ah6GDldrEsy9Zr4DTpOsAVstGHgHcNbKb8r7OtxqL77kFo02ErqyGlgDXS8It9zBFf_6bkjaAlh-6x1tg%3D%3D) Hi there folks, My name is John Padora and I’m a Democrat running to represent Colorado’s 4th District in Congress. [**I hope you’ll join my team by becoming a Founding Donor of my campaign.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=8cc08efcc0224d54b3969b4e2731c4a1&_e=HkJmv5zCc3WKdeKrNADZgcBMV5udGVqJCKIQwuMN74mJnaOEdB1kB8LuIezmezAe8aywZDhXqO2eBu3SSsmrpWeuyf1aSULJCGuiqiqQWSM6txgSDg9BuIK65DQ366062SXdlZ1bzpppvcxehQUWAPx-up5w2rRlSg0Hr5Q9Cw5ix2A-re7EC0rjKqtKArbi8n6dSmaCIJ4f_BNrFnek01-HRqEbabHIXioVuqWJYk-QamA4yMj1iuu9iukFVHbnL5f2D8YbdfcOwvsEMxdc2ZYrXMcLeMs3ZhJQPf523kt5J_Yo717NffwMTh6uS3nLoSR8Zbsc5JKEOBc6qlE1lZJq63xcBzop7bmDKSrDuHe3N7_XRoXWa4ElA2f9L1kbf8l2m2KAivBBYKdHW360Xw%3D%3D) I decided to run for Congress because I know two things: Colorado has lots of great people, and we’ve had a lot of poor representation in Washington. We’ve had the bad luck of seeing folks like Lauren Boebert and my opponent, Ken Buck, head to our nation’s capital to benefit themselves rather than to fight for us. I’m the grandson of a farmer and the child of a nurse and a carpenter. I was raised to understand that the middle class built this country – **and we’re the one’s being left behind by Democrats and Republicans alike.** But I know I can change that. And I want to go to Washington to change that. **I want to fight for YOU because I believe that YOU deserve access to quality affordable health care. I believe your kids should have the opportunity at a great education, and they shouldn’t have to be afraid of someone coming into their school to harm them or their classmates. I believe we should work to address the climate crisis and create strong, good-paying union jobs along the way. I believe a woman should have the right to make her own medical decisions. And I believe that everyone deserves a chance at the American Dream — no matter where you come from, what color your skin is, who you love, or who you pray to.** Those are the values I’ll bring to Washington to fight for you. clean_body: | | | Hi there folks, My name is John Padora and I’m a Democrat running to represent Colorado’s 4th District in Congress. I decided to run for Congress because I know two things: Colorado has lots of great people, and we’ve had a lot of poor representation in Washington. We’ve had the bad luck of seeing folks like Lauren Boebert and my opponent, Ken Buck, head to our nation’s capital to benefit themselves rather than to fight for us. I’m the grandson of a farmer and the child of a nurse and a carpenter. I was raised to understand that the middle class built this country – and we’re the one’s being left behind by Democrats and Republicans alike. But I know I can change that. And I want to go to Washington to change that. I want to fight for YOU because I believe that YOU deserve access to quality affordable health care. I believe your kids should have the opportunity at a great education, and they shouldn’t have to be afraid of someone coming into their school to harm them or their classmates. I believe we should work to address the climate crisis and create strong, good-paying union jobs along the way. I believe a woman should have the right to make her own medical decisions. And I believe that everyone deserves a chance at the American Dream — no matter where you come from, what color your skin is, who you love, or who you pray to. Those are the values I’ll bring to Washington to fight for you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | We can win this race together and give Colorado’s 4th Distrcit the representation it deserves. But I know I can’t do it without supporters like you. I’m grateful to have you on my side. All the best, John Padora * Paid for by Padora for Colorado

clean_body: This is the THIRD ATTEMPT to destroy our movement. This is the THIRD ATTEMPT to destroy our movement. | | | Friend, I wanted you to hear this directly from me... ...Biden 's Department of Justice has ONCE AGAIN INDICTED me - this time, over the events that took place on January 6th. As you know, I did nothing wrong. It's well-documented that I told Americans to act "PEACEFULLY" and discouraged the use of any violence. This is nothing but an egregious act of Election Interference and a final act of desperation from Crooked Joe as he crashes in the polls. The entire Biden Administration knows that I'm the ONLY candidate who would defeat Crooked Joe in a free and fair election. They know how much support we have from the hardworking people of our country. But more importantly, they know that I 'm the only candidate who can dismantle the Deep State and end their stranglehold on our nation. So, their only hope is to try and send me to JAIL for the rest of my life. A Soros-backed state prosecutor first tried to break us when he indicted and arrested me earlier this spring despite having committed no crime at all. But when it became clear that his attack failed to break us, Crooked Joe summoned a federal prosecutor to INDICT me despite having committed no crime once again. Now, they 're hoping that they've finally dealt the final blow by indicting me in the belly of the beast: Washington, D.C. If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me. Their grip will close even tighter around YOU. As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way. And even after 3 indictments, I will continue to stand in their way, because the fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It 's not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well - and I will NEVER let them take it from you. If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don't have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | | Thank you, | Donald J. _# SIGNATURE DUE BY 11:59 PM #_
Listen, the Supreme Court’s decision to take up this case could have horrible repercussions for victims of domestic abuse.

Laws like this are in place to ensure that firearms stay out of the hands of dangerous individuals.

To put things in perspective – 1 in 3 women and 1 in 4 men have experienced some form of physical violence by a partner.

subject: Fighting with optimism, with faith, and with hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We will always fight back against attacks on our fundamental freedoms. | | |
---
Peter -- What is going on in Florida is _shocking_. FIRST: Extremist so-called “leaders” banned books and attempted to erase our history. THEN: They announced plans to teach students that enslaved people benefited from slavery. NOW: They’re doubling down, seeking to debate what is fact. Let me be clear, there is no roundtable, no lecture, and no invitation we will accept to debate an undeniable fact: __There were no redeeming qualities of slavery.__ **We will not stop fighting back against extremist, so-called leaders who try to prevent our children from learning our true and full history.**[If you’re ready to join our fight, I hope you’ll make a contribution today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zCGwti0VNLZHg96qeIEvJxcZvqglZ4DutSVgmxhDKmtRNM9BYPt1BHQvRB267Do-N2rIAo1dvredWOx3j-I1sQKLjBUUr_I0zlXY1GwA1kNf4EikotPqq-HK78TTBlHLiDxy1g8lIwmDPsai8CMOVO26ujwfkJkF5ZK6pC9-aLm5rYzXTPCnOXwGbB_qtbNGFAkX4dtGdc5dWKgKZtxrPlVlchNrGSyxltDYM4AbgJ-hzAzz6kDtXqMYqxFgvfp6Qb3t8hnczndep4YDcru6qdAHR8HKdAJcm7Mz0W_g3SNpsbjaBjoIiwxuo44UlYHrTk68n9mhUYC4vOglm-lDcrGRv89Ab77CU3DWlkFRvPWgv16k4Lfq96xTnr8xMlaMw/3ye/HntvcagFRgaaSW9_HxY9ag/h0/2BVjfGKikm2282uVnkchIL6CpWzMPfWbtisFyTn1f8E) **Now, let me tell you about the future we are fighting for together, Peter.** We’re fighting for a future where: _Every child_ can learn our true and full history. _Every woman_ has the freedom to make decisions about her own body. _Every voter_ has the freedom to make their voice heard. And where _every family_ can live free from violence and hate, and _every person_ has the opportunity to thrive. [We are fighting for a future where our fundamental freedoms remain intact. name: Alex Padilla
subject: It’s hot!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
my legislation would protect workers from excessive heat
#

Hi friend,
In case you haven’t noticed, it’s been hot this summer.
And as California and the rest of the country face punishing heat waves, record-breaking temperatures are increasingly dangerous for workers.**But right now, there is no federal standard to ensure the health and safety of workers exposed to dangerous heat conditions.**
That’s wrong. Our farmworkers, factory workers, postal workers, construction workers, and all who work in these conditions deserve protections.
That’s why I’m doing two things:
**First** , I’ve reintroduced the _Asunción Valdivia Heat Illness and Fatality Prevention Act._ This bill would direct the Occupational Safety and Health Administration to establish a standard to protect workers from hazardous heat, including:
🚰 access to water,
🧊 paid breaks in cool spaces,
🚑 emergency response, and
⏲️ limitations on the amount of time exposed to heat.
**Second** , I’m calling on President Biden to use administrative action to implement enforceable workplace federal heat standards -- modeled off my bill -- as quickly as possible to protect workers against extreme heat.
**The climate crisis has accelerated the dangers of extreme heat across the country. So we can’t afford to wait:
**
**[Please add your name to stand with me, the United Farm Workers, the AFL-CIO, the International Brotherhood of Teamsters, UNITE HERE!, National Domestic Workers Alliance, and more in support of federal standards to protect workers from dangerous heat conditions in the workplace.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/August-Heat-em-230802-1/?source=em230802-1-30&refcode2=1458.159979.hjW8um&akid=1458%2E159979%2EhjW8um)**
**[SIGN ON](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/August-Heat-em-230802-1/?source=em230802-1-30&refcode2=1458.159979.hjW8um&akid=1458%2E159979%2EhjW8um)**
Thank you,
Alex Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1458%2E159979%2EhjW8um)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: An affront to democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=3219%2E5257348%2E5Xr4KD ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

Not long ago, I asked you to split a donation between [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em_tndems.9kt31A&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_GEN_AC90_20230802_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=3219%2E5257348%2E5Xr4KD ]Rep. Justin Jones
of Nashville and Rep. Justin Pearson of Memphis, Tennessee. Now with their
special elections in just one day, I’m asking you to make a donation
again.

Here’s why.

Republicans in the Tennessee House of Representatives expelled Rep. Jones
and Rep. Pearson from the chamber for standing up to the NRA and
protesting gun violence after a mass shooter slaughtered 6 people in a
Nashville school — including 3 nine-year old children.

Following the shooting, Reps. Jones and Pearson stood alongside more than
1,000 youth protesters who staged a peaceful protest at the state Capitol
for gun safety legislation.

Republicans called these young protesters “insurrectionists,” and the GOP
House Speaker went so far as to say it was “at least equivalent, maybe
worse” than the January 6 insurrection at the U.S. Capitol.

Soon after, Reps. Jones and Pearson were singled out for an expulsion vote
along with one of their white Democratic colleagues who joined in the
protest.

But only Reps. Pearson and Jones were expelled. Tennessee Republicans
tried to send a very clear message with that vote: That two young Black
men, democratically elected by their constituents to represent them in the
Capitol, can be silenced in an authoritarian show of force against
dissent.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em_tndems.9kt31A&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_GEN_AC90_20230802_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=3219%2E5257348%2E5Xr4KD ]Representatives Justin Pearson and Justin Jones raising their fists

Photo credit: Reuters/Cheney Orr

It was an affront to democracy and one of the most blatantly authoritarian
and unconscionable actions taken by Republicans yet, expulsion from
office.

Following their expulsions, local governments in Nashville and Memphis
appointed Reps. Jones and Pearson to the seats that Republicans had forced

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Emerge is a national organization working to recruit, train, and get Democratic women elected across the country, and we are so grateful to have you on our team. Our alums are strong voices for Democratic values — and they are running up and down the ballot to fight for working families. They are fighting for critical issues that affect our communities, such as the environment, accessible and affordable health care, social justice, and education equity. We need more alums fighting for us across the country.

But, Fellow Conservative, we cannot take this for granted. **Montana may be in the toss-up category today,_but this race is far from over._**

This campaign is powered by grassroots patriots like YOU, and I need your continued support to carry this fight all the way to victory on Election Day. [**Can I count on you to step up TODAY to help keep our momentum going?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=15298bcb2d494df19a78c3a2bce28e9e&_e=4fbX9bVZ14pUPTjxIPoVMa-e6HfPx7WJh3WEnc2QVzdjA3fTkWIlYc1pUFj0HiZ030eeROhCBhg8y6nR_diawPU7vsaZh87Y-jE-Kyr4WQQbVtCVvn60Pd-AbQWpJNzdKnkNvFTFbXSRe2rZY4DesnpeypliWnbjA6zTRvWk5SPwZ1QsmR5JTRmAGKQgizls8UvhzQYQoAOZ3tBMP80q_WYaz1FsZDP-kzSBvSvOsg2xlB9bsLo_MwhuTwElZmhkdafM6UaoyYOcDhAV5Rl1Sjj-OFbJ55RDrf-jW_2BD-qm0kPOZ_y_yZH3ReWIxgfxkM_rx7W-XoYDPPMpsEdoTrsvN-D1k8PPmGslaP5SGHg5OkBy_y4LcsaSkvhynTyEqa5Md84zDoorpaCJzhExDA%3D%3D)

[**KEEP THE MOMENTUM
TAKE BACK THE SENATE **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=15298bcb2d494df19a78c3a2bce28e9e&_e=4fbX9bVZ14pUPTjxIPoVMa-e6HfPx7WJh3WEnc2QVzdjA3fTkWIlYc1pUFj0HiZ030eeROhCBhg8y6nR_diawPU7vsaZh87Y-jE-Kyr4WQQbVtCVvn60Pd-AbQWpJNzdKnkNvFTFbXSRe2rZY4DesnpeypliWnbjA6zTRvWk5SPwZ1QsmR5JTRmAGKQgizls8UvhzQYQoAOZ3tBMP80q_WYaz1FsZDP-kzSBvSvOsg2xlB9bsLo_MwhuTwElZmhk3WgbC3X_Hqj65NOzF8xfEZMj-C5qkKceZhw79nzlJ7jNsrjDLOMc9ZoZTLGkMjkeZSBLgLS2R_QxCjzh7rhT2L9igHwF2nYdFfVx0TK9Vlnr6VEP0dk9eGCdzabQsviy6g6XfMxse8T4HZ-fYcNxKw%3D%3D)

I’m not a career politician - but it’s clear as day to anyone that national Democrats will see this rating change as a signal that they need to double down and pour as much money into this race as humanly possible to keep this Senate seat in their column.

**After all, the 2024 Senate race in Montana will determine whether Republicans or Democrats control the Senate. **

That is why the other side is MOTIVATED beyond belief. Democrats continue to shower Senator Tester with millions every month, **meaning our campaign will likely be outspent for the remainder of the summer.**

**[Unless we use this TOSS-UP news to redouble our own fundraising efforts RIGHT NOW. This is a race in which every SINGLE DOLLAR is going to count. name: Kurt Kroemer
subject: I was asked about an Assault Weapons Ban on TV
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kroemer for Congress
body:
As the CEO of the Red Cross in Arizona, I’ve deployed to hundreds of disaster sites. Nothing could prepare me for what I’m about to share.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67496798/419880566/215820969?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230731-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2U3YjJiNGMtODIzMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3kRxVtZtrWU9po_EdqofuRvVF363hYDcgRgfEd5IeXk=)
---
| Peter,
I've spent my life as a public servant and a problem solver. I decided to run for Congress because I think we can all agree - we’ve got enough career politicians, how about electing some new leaders for a change?** **** ** [**Before I share more, if you agree we need real public servants in Washington, can you rush a contribution to my campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67496799/419880567/-521182646?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2U3YjJiNGMtODIzMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3kRxVtZtrWU9po_EdqofuRvVF363hYDcgRgfEd5IeXk=) As the CEO of the Red Cross in Arizona, I’ve deployed to hundreds of disaster sites. Nothing could prepare me for what I’m about to share. My heart was broken into two. **I’ve always said this would be the Courageous Campaign that wasn’t afraid to answer the tough questions. ** I was interviewed on Sunday and I was asked if I support an Assault Weapons Ban. I’m not afraid to answer - will you take a look? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67496800/419880568/-521182646?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2U3YjJiNGMtODIzMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3kRxVtZtrWU9po_EdqofuRvVF363hYDcgRgfEd5IeXk=) After the horrific mass shooting in El Paso in 2019, I immediately went to the scene. We were there 6 hours later. **Cowardly politicians did nothing to protect these families on that day - and today, still nothing.** We know we need courageous leaders in Washington. clean_body: As the CEO of the Red Cross in Arizona, I’ve deployed to hundreds of disaster sites. Nothing could prepare me for what I’m about to share. | = | Peter, I've spent my life as a public servant and a problem solver. I decided to run for Congress because I think we can all agree - we’ve got enough career politicians, how about electing some new leaders for a change? = As the CEO of the Red Cross in Arizona, I’ve deployed to hundreds of disaster sites. Nothing could prepare me for what I’m about to share. My heart was broken into two. I’ve always said this would be the Courageous Campaign that wasn’t afraid to answer the tough questions. I was interviewed on Sunday and I was asked if I support an Assault Weapons Ban. name: Team Cori
subject: Sign to guarantee housing as a human right:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori Bush understands how urgently we need housing justice for all. | |
---
Peter, Rep. Cori Bush has been unhoused, living in a car with her two children. She doesn’t want anyone else to experience that trauma, stress, stigma, and pain, which is why she’s led on housing justice in Congress. **Two years ago today, Cori led her fellow members of Congress in a 5-day demonstration to extend the federal eviction moratorium as it was set to expire.** Sleeping on the steps of the U.S. Capitol, she negotiated with the White House and Congress, and succeeded in delaying evictions -- keeping 11 million people in their homes. **But as Cori has said, we must do more than prevent evictions.** We have a housing crisis including skyrocketing rents, and our work won’t be done until we guarantee housing as a human right for every person in the country. **That’s why Cori just reintroduced the Unhoused Bill of Rights, affirming the dignity of unhoused people and laying out how we can end the unhoused crisis by 2027.** [**Please sign on today to support Cori Bush’s Unhoused Bill of Rights and ensure the government secures housing as a human right.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl-vRswUTt0wSRsVUTolC16FlPmuDzJQydwN7_mJQ7OdzvzM1wplDXG6QWlZ6H5U1O6wVKQmBmjtgRFxTMA8AwToI4zWCHHze1R4ZcfVbRDlfqHA4xwBIHkH5Vm0L_qzuN4LjpoNmn5RBxLxh739NL0g-JMBFpiyz04uRZbelYI3BIBs4V76r8bLAOTRzKSyJEMtGAbrGACLBHl4vHCznnBAdiQwcFVjt-WwhfA8pILcVIs7-QMjq8mEpB-Sx3GW9qJcMYGGpwID0urtznHaMAgtrl4cDoS7IYSRXn7YfNxek1XQ1ze0KkaW6yRJcAZGq0MqYgmivOZ3rfKCVL0YUegUZD9lgq0meC7GZNhEJ7xaA/3ye/XV3o7hYITx2UGjdtAID4Kw/h0/VGzxWm0cfYq9ugf4RfmZAr5BDDQFqkIc-qrXoQ6ALOY) **[SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl-vRswUTt0wSRsVUTolC16FlPmuDzJQydwN7_mJQ7OdzvzM1wplDXG6QWlZ6H5U1O6wVKQmBmjtgRFxTMA8AwTIsqXItnhO1VNTsbuxDrC4hWGJplQw_rFsfYHIWivb_tDJON-34zRHg-nA13w8j0FQCxrqcZlRCjDbY3t4RJLhtYlGSBU9V1AZjQMxPmPjpaap0DAYDaY73kcDz5gx55smhbuDmauAjbQI-cHwwCskRSpQiMpfhy_t2tb_iO2KFxjE551CNL_9a9UZFDDNtVRNCxmOt4KhCZ83taOTT-XSR7ZXtuRC4pas1IyEMS6O49mY5XyaSyYWU8NWwueArJORRvovoFnULzixqXx1-aCVA/3ye/XV3o7hYITx2UGjdtAID4Kw/h1/nO0X5KSFsMjJLR5A53fQdJRBTnRwtPPZLYnTYhsF6hk) ** This is urgent: Rising housing costs continue to rapidly outpace wages, forcing more families to live on the streets. **We have the power and the money to guarantee housing as a human right, but we need the will to reorient congressional priorities.** Cori Bush’s just-reintroduced Unhoused Bill of Rights provides a blueprint for the federal government to permanently end the unhoused crisis by 2027 with holistic, health-based, and non-carceral solutions. The legislation calls on the Department of Health and Human Services to declare the unhoused crisis a public health emergency, and calls for rigorous federal investments into homeless assistance programs, affordable housing initiatives, and wraparound services that keep people permanently housed. [**Can you help demonstrate the public support behind Cori Bush’s Unhoused Bill of Rights by signing on as a grassroots co-sponsor today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl-vRswUTt0wSRsVUTolC16FlPmuDzJQydwN7_mJQ7OdzvzM1wplDXG6QWlZ6H5U1O6wVKQmBmjtgRFxTMA8AwTuPNXNc0Us0wP_XFhhASUx44W0_bkeYM_Spj9mOT_80W3cJLXEWAb0osfItNj_pdBSpTYXj1EfEcdpZ6r4nkcqTUUrjlVGSmoPxZh8IK2zOYFkjSxpuE6_UMf6v_kgaVEY0n65c80GFbbmlf6k-gvfa1OxK7t9USbRp50BHzK5O6LhifqmYV2R4TvC4Pns_coxKaML4CnI7_D1eOEJFhSo4XFrfXnKJ6V267ErMCjB7yL8WakqkXatFYOTNdeHqWj7mL6aR5D-CX42Fw2cH7j7w/3ye/XV3o7hYITx2UGjdtAID4Kw/h2/RxUVpY20aW0-M1caGhG6JNgYYTefOVn-B-xAHF8Lt4s) Thank you for taking action in support of our unhoused neighbors. In solidarity, Team Cori
**[SUPPORT OUR MOVEMENT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xwzzY8tdrL0SKWe0pNh792tpBV9ifA-oP0D1nGeqeSq700SLPB2cZ4IVTyDTjpDpPnTSN3nJ9iuQPNRzKQplc5IzgxFab4D5cFw862yyA26aKh88kFp2Om9yk_ov941FwTkWo3OtGGQf6I5HpG-nSOAaJwxrEbbWnRCL1ArcIdM3CxVVmhS379cQDgH9raR2LyK64pqdxMe1VjjgEqET5cdFcxcdSHpKm862YjwOaVriwsnC2UGpXR5eIZDKgYbNMZ1OM__f-RsZnTWxLCFGayNCTIMcLlxfxu3eeikW5HI5OqbOZBJw9HO5V9KZd82MmBebGqO9XLf9kVi1cyY6o3JIEKxSqICYH0Uw-bakW1OA/3ye/XV3o7hYITx2UGjdtAID4Kw/h3/AVAViM4fjWR3pHbkF6AFZ5JEsnH4B6nRxCEdiR-uzes) **

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: 561 YEARS in prison
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Just think of it... | | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=1f1fab604ff04015920512dd2daddc0d&_e=VQHU309N1Nh-GtOJc4v9eFaGsU-GpevYyQyXf5IvS1rdyN8tO3MTKvjwSHbddE2amffsmi8cS2idMCVRBWOF3vXr4VfUH8c1JevtajxWm8QE64liGUy7TzbXCpUmcTsJDp-4VtN3NwIdzSYyl-GArFOe-yvzttLoQYkoOa7ElnMn3Ua8fLLDEhpTqkr19TVYekHm-zTHykMiCEkwpQwaQvQGRv1xT3PLmg3us-hJ5PXSe-iMfUMSODdluNW2pIZFuIyJ07TKkGJOEvUZIz7EnZf04GpTGrOQNIcuKOXV2ri2kYqW12yUekuLq1-9R3L-8Kld2PpJ_hCFPyxLcZGZw-e2zUpGyYfQO9N0H3NUMvq-Jo8FaDVMS-dJ6JtpLGSmQzKdz3O1WnVVNhXlEqrPPffHcOzzi2Z2PmMQoSWwo_eXyEgVvnGmshxMdLVcs1tPag5ag4S4q-x9uHTBrjnKyQfhygkrLClKUgGAsZQYhVIX0JRDPYFYterEmQeVZ1Ru)
---
| | Friend,

---
With Crooked Joe’s corrupt DOJ having unlawfully INDICTED yours truly _yet again_ , reports indicate that I could now face a combined **561 YEARS** in prison from the Left’s witch hunts.
---
6 LIFETIMES... _
_
---
...There’s only ONE MESSAGE someone can send by trying to throw you in jail for 6 lifetimes, and that’s _**FEAR**._

---
The fear that if you vote for the ONLY candidate who puts you FIRST, you too could be harassed, indicted, and even _ARRESTED_ by the current Marxist regime in Washington.

---
Because these endless witch hunts and indictments aren’t really about me, they’re about _YOU_ having a voice in your own country.

---
I’m just standing in the Left’s way – _and I always will._

---
Rest assured, Friend, if there’s ONE thing I’m willing to risk _my freedom_ for, it’s __YOUR FREEDOM__.

---
**But while the Democrats continue to send America barreling towards tyranny, I ask that YOU peacefully stand with me during these dark times – as one** _**UNITED**_**Republican Party – and PROVE that we will NEVER SURRENDER the country we hold so dear.**

---
_However, if you’re struggling right now due to Crooked Joe’s policies and the sinister Swamp creatures in Washington, please just hit the back button and go about your day. In that case, I don’t want you to even think about donating!_

---

I want to start by thanking you for all your support in July! Because of grassroots supporters like you, we managed to sustain the resources to not only lay further groundwork for 2024, but also to allow us to help Democratic candidates for Virginia state legislative offices this year.

Now, as August begins and Congress is on recess, I’m making sure to travel throughout my district and hear from more people about what issues matter most to them. **I’d love to get your input too.**

[**Will you take our August Issues Survey and tell us your top priorities for Congress to work on once it gets back in session?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67497358/419882507/-1497056533?ms=EM_SURV_230802TY_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_SURV_230802TY_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmQ3ZjY1Ny04NjMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5H68oOleCc2TmknPUPie1Bd_y7SKHJ0I5zOeHHmViiE=&emci=ddd6b009-7c31-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=82d7f657-8631-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Take Our Survey ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67497359/419882508/-1497056533?ms=EM_SURV_230802TY_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_SURV_230802TY_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmQ3ZjY1Ny04NjMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5H68oOleCc2TmknPUPie1Bd_y7SKHJ0I5zOeHHmViiE=&emci=ddd6b009-7c31-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=82d7f657-8631-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) Recently, I was proud to help secure funding to upgrade buses in Loudoun County to have reduced or zero emissions. As Congress continues its annual appropriations process, I’m hopeful that I can deliver further results for my constituents.

But I’m also concerned about the looming threat of a government shutdown — and just how far MAGA Republicans in the House will go in their efforts to cut retirement benefits, climate protections, and safety net programs as Congress approaches its deadline to fund the government.

There’s sure to be a lot of noise (much of it based on lies) in the weeks ahead. I want to be sure that your voices are elevated above it as much as possible. And the first step is getting a clear picture of what you want Congress to focus on.

[**So will you take a minute or two and fill out our survey? I’m looking forward to reading your responses!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67497360/419882509/-1497056533?ms=EM_SURV_230802TY_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_SURV_230802TY_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmQ3ZjY1Ny04NjMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5H68oOleCc2TmknPUPie1Bd_y7SKHJ0I5zOeHHmViiE=&emci=ddd6b009-7c31-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=82d7f657-8631-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)

name: Joanna Weiss
subject: I’m so thankful to have your support.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67497362/419882567/-1695430967?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2UyYzExZDMtODYzMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vmm83g4iZOQqFn3_izG0-CsMAc5P_bXhO-HX7850PVM=)
I have some great news to share, Peter.

With your help, our campaign was able to surpass our online fundraising goal for the month of July. We could not have done this without you, Peter, and I’m so appreciative to have your support.

From the start, our goal was to build a true grassroots campaign fueled by the people of this community. In my view, the way we power this campaign should reflect the type of representative I plan to be in Congress.

I’m not doing this for special interests or the corporate PACs. This is about putting our district first in everything I do, and listening and learning every step of the way.

Speaking of listening and learning, I wanted to share a special photo from the campaign trail. Last month in Washington, I had the honor of meeting with former Congresswoman Gabrielle Giffords -- a gun violence survivor and gun violence prevention champion.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67497363/419882568/-129347026?refcode=em-8.2.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2UyYzExZDMtODYzMS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vmm83g4iZOQqFn3_izG0-CsMAc5P_bXhO-HX7850PVM=)
I’ve heard from many people across the district that the gun violence epidemic needs to be addressed. It was enlightening to talk to Gabrielle about the path toward workable solutions. I look forward to sharing them with you when I see you on the trail!

Thanks again for all that you do.

In unity,

Joanna

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Since launching this campaign on February 21st, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. Because of your support, we've not only qualified for this month's debate,but the next one too! This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, | | | ---|---|--- | | This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. **With a Republican-held Senate, we can put an END to the woke, socialist policies that have hurt Americans across the country. We can bring back American dominance, and we can put our country back on the right track.**

name: Jon Tester
subject: Politics isn’t a game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| Peter,

Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana.

That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic senators looking out for them.

Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, **I will always work for you.**

When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us.

[**So, if you can, I’m personally asking you to split a $10 or more donation between UNITEDemocrats and my campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal. We’re slightly behind right now and anything you can give keeps me fighting for you in the Senate. »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67498322/419886247/-890498101?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230802_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhNjM0NDdmLThjMzEtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6SS_2pB34u5WoaGc_ZAvgWHiA5Z7BAjf4u_NCx15Pao=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67498328/419886253/-890498101?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230802_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhNjM0NDdmLThjMzEtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6SS_2pB34u5WoaGc_ZAvgWHiA5Z7BAjf4u_NCx15Pao=)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: This is really important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_073023_EOM_A_Boe_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_073023_EOM_A_Boe_act]
Friend –
On Monday, the Biden Administration announced that it will keep Space Command in Colorado. Here’s why this is so important.
Just before Trump left office, he overruled the Air Force Generals and announced his plan to move Space Command from Colorado to Alabama.
Trump made clear he was playing political games, rewarding a state that voted for him and punishing a state that didn’t.
We were not elected to play games with our national security and military readiness.
That’s why I’ve spent the last two and a half years fighting to ensure that Space Command’s permanent location would be decided based on national security priorities, not politics. And this week, that work came to fruition – Space Command will remain, as it should, in Colorado.
Our state has long been a leader in the aerospace industry and with Space Command here for good, we will continue to lead the United States in space for generations to come.
I could not do this work without you, team.
Thank you so much,
Michael

Bennet for Colorado
PO Box 3078
Denver, CO 80201
United States
